title: Are we measuring trust correctly in explainability, interpretability, and transparency research?
title_zh: 我们在可解释性、可解释性和透明度研究中是否正确衡量了信任？
abstract: This paper presents an argument for why we are not measuring trust sufficiently in explainability, interpretability, and transparency research. Most studies ask participants to complete a trust scale to rate their trust of a model that has been explained/interpreted. If the trust is increased, we consider this a positive. However, there are two issues with this. First, we usually have no way of knowing whether participants should trust the model. Trust should surely decrease if a model is of poor quality. Second, these scales measure perceived trust rather than demonstrated trust. This paper showcases three methods that do a good job at measuring perceived and demonstrated trust. It is intended to be starting point for discussion on this topic, rather than to be the final say. The author invites critique and discussion.
summary: This paper presents an argument for why we are not measuring trust sufficiently in explainability, interpretability, and transparency research. Most studies ask participants to complete a trust scale to rate their trust of a model that has been explained/interpreted. If the trust is increased, we consider this a positive. However, there are two issues with this. First, we usually have no way of knowing whether participants should trust the model. Trust should surely decrease if a model is of poor quality. Second, these scales measure perceived trust rather than demonstrated trust. This paper showcases three methods that do a good job at measuring perceived and demonstrated trust. It is intended to be starting point for discussion on this topic, rather than to be the final say. The author invites critique and discussion.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了为什么我们在可解释性、可解释性和透明度研究中没有充分衡量信任的论点。大多数研究要求参与者完成信任量表，以评估他们对已解释/解释的模型的信任度。如果信任增加，我们认为这是积极的。然而，这有两个问题。首先，我们通常无法知道参与者是否应该信任该模型。如果模型质量差，信任度肯定会下降。其次，这些量表衡量感知的信任而不是表现出的信任。本文展示了三种能够很好地衡量感知和表现出的信任的方法。它旨在作为该主题讨论的起点，而不是最终决定权。作者诚邀批评和讨论。

AI.tldr: 本文质疑当前在可解释性、可解释性和透明度研究中信任测量的准确性，并提出三种更有效的测量方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究通过信任量表测量参与者对模型的信任，但无法判断信任的合理性且仅测量感知信任而非实际行为信任。
AI.method: 提出三种方法分别测量感知信任和实际信任，作为现有方法的补充和改进。
AI.result: 展示了三种有效测量信任的方法，为后续研究提供讨论起点。
AI.conclusion: 当前信任测量存在局限，需进一步批判性讨论以完善研究方法。

title: Analyse fonctionnelle de l'outil de gestion de planning LibStaffer
title_zh: 分析 LibStaffer 规划管理功能
abstract: LibStaffer is a staff scheduling tool for libraries provided by Springshare. In this article, we present the analysis that we implemented to determine the potential of LibStaffer in order to simplify staff scheduling in library branches with various configurations, as well as in transversal units with a focus on public services. As a starting point, we focused on the questions available in Philippe Lenepveu and Marc Maisonneuve's work on scheduling tools for libraries. We then enriched the initial list with questions that emerged among several colleagues. After a two-month LibStaffer trial period, we were able to answer those questions and were convinced to take out a subscription to the tool. -- LibStaffer est un outil de gestion de planning de service pour les bibliothèques proposé par Springshare. Dans cet article, nous exposons l'analyse que nous avons mise en œuvre pour déterminer le potentiel de LibStaffer en matière de simplification de la gestion de planning d'accueil, sur des implantations de configurations diverses, ainsi que d'activités transversales de service au public. Nous nous sommes fondés sur les questions établies par Philippe Lenepveu et Marc Maisonneuve, dans leur ouvrage consacré aux logiciels de gestion de planning pour les bibliothèques, et les avons enrichies par les interrogations de plusieurs collègues. Bénéficier d'un test de LibStaffer, de près de deux mois, nous a permis de répondre à ces questions et nous a convaincus de prendre une souscription à l'outil.
summary: LibStaffer is a staff scheduling tool for libraries provided by Springshare. In this article, we present the analysis that we implemented to determine the potential of LibStaffer in order to simplify staff scheduling in library branches with various configurations, as well as in transversal units with a focus on public services. As a starting point, we focused on the questions available in Philippe Lenepveu and Marc Maisonneuve's work on scheduling tools for libraries. We then enriched the initial list with questions that emerged among several colleagues. After a two-month LibStaffer trial period, we were able to answer those questions and were convinced to take out a subscription to the tool. -- LibStaffer est un outil de gestion de planning de service pour les bibliothèques proposé par Springshare. Dans cet article, nous exposons l'analyse que nous avons mise en œuvre pour déterminer le potentiel de LibStaffer en matière de simplification de la gestion de planning d'accueil, sur des implantations de configurations diverses, ainsi que d'activités transversales de service au public. Nous nous sommes fondés sur les questions établies par Philippe Lenepveu et Marc Maisonneuve, dans leur ouvrage consacré aux logiciels de gestion de planning pour les bibliothèques, et les avons enrichies par les interrogations de plusieurs collègues. Bénéficier d'un test de LibStaffer, de près de deux mois, nous a permis de répondre à ces questions et nous a convaincus de prendre une souscription à l'outil.
abstract_zh: LibStaffer是Springshare提供的图书馆人员调度工具。在本文中，我们介绍了为确定 LibStaffer 的潜力而实施的分析，以简化具有各种配置的图书馆分馆以及专注于公共服务的横向单位的人员调度。首先，我们重点关注 Philippe Lenepveu 和 Marc Maisonneuve 关于图书馆调度工具的研究中提出的问题。然后，我们用几位同事提出的问题丰富了最初的清单。经过两个月的 LibStaffer 试用期后，我们能够回答这些问题，并确信订阅该工具。 -- LibStaff 是 Springshare 图书馆提案服务规划的管理人员。在这篇文章中，我们分析了如何确定 LibStaff 的能力，以及简化计划管理、不同配置的植入以及为公众服务的横向活动。我们对 Philippe Lenepveu 和 Marc Maisonneuve 提出的问题非常感兴趣，他们对图书馆规划的管理和雅文丰富的问题​​进行了详细的逻辑分析。受益于 LibStaffer 的测试，在两个人之间进行测试，我们可以回答问题，并且可以轻松解决问题。

AI.tldr: 本文对LibStaffer工具的功能进行分析，评估其在简化图书馆分支机构及公共服务部门排班管理中的潜力。
AI.motivation: 旨在确定LibStaffer是否能有效解决图书馆在不同配置下的排班复杂性问题，并基于现有研究及同行疑问进行验证。
AI.method: 通过为期两个月的LibStaffer试用，结合Philippe Lenepveu和Marc Maisonneuve的研究问题及同事提出的补充问题进行实证分析。
AI.result: 成功回答所有关键问题并确认工具价值，最终决定订阅LibStaffer以优化排班管理。
AI.conclusion: LibStaffer在简化图书馆多场景排班流程中表现有效，适合各类图书馆及公共服务部门采用。

authors_text: Matteo Poggi,Pierluigi Zama Ramirez,Fabio Tosi,Samuele Salti,Stefano Mattoccia,Luigi Di Stefano
title: Cross-Spectral Neural Radiance Fields
title_zh: 跨光谱神经辐射场
abstract: We propose X-NeRF, a novel method to learn a Cross-Spectral scene representation given images captured from cameras with different light spectrum sensitivity, based on the Neural Radiance Fields formulation. X-NeRF optimizes camera poses across spectra during training and exploits Normalized Cross-Device Coordinates (NXDC) to render images of different modalities from arbitrary viewpoints, which are aligned and at the same resolution. Experiments on 16 forward-facing scenes, featuring color, multi-spectral and infrared images, confirm the effectiveness of X-NeRF at modeling Cross-Spectral scene representations.
summary: We propose X-NeRF, a novel method to learn a Cross-Spectral scene representation given images captured from cameras with different light spectrum sensitivity, based on the Neural Radiance Fields formulation. X-NeRF optimizes camera poses across spectra during training and exploits Normalized Cross-Device Coordinates (NXDC) to render images of different modalities from arbitrary viewpoints, which are aligned and at the same resolution. Experiments on 16 forward-facing scenes, featuring color, multi-spectral and infrared images, confirm the effectiveness of X-NeRF at modeling Cross-Spectral scene representations.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 X-NeRF，这是一种基于神经辐射场公式，在给定从具有不同光谱灵敏度的相机捕获的图像的情况下学习跨光谱场景表示的新方法。 X-NeRF 在训练期间优化跨光谱的相机姿势，并利用标准化跨设备坐标 (NXDC) 从任意视点渲染不同模式的图像，这些图像是对齐的且具有相同的分辨率。对 16 个具有彩色、多光谱和红外图像的前方场景进行的实验证实了 X-NeRF 在跨光谱场景表示建模方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出X-NeRF方法，利用不同光谱的图像学习跨光谱场景表示，实现多光谱和红外图像的对齐渲染。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF方法难以处理跨光谱（如可见光/红外）图像的对齐与建模，需解决多模态数据在不同光谱下的空间一致性问题。
AI.method: 通过优化跨光谱相机姿态，并引入归一化跨设备坐标（NXDC）实现多模态图像在任意视角下的对齐渲染。
AI.result: 在16个正面场景的实验中，X-NeRF有效建模了颜色、多光谱及红外图像的跨光谱场景表示，验证了方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: X-NeRF为跨光谱场景重建提供了统一框架，可扩展至多设备、多模态的跨光谱应用。

X-NeRF optimizes camera poses across spectra during training and exploits Normalized Cross-Device Coordinates (NXDC) to render images of different modalities from arbitrary viewpoints, which are aligned and at the same resolution. Experiments on 16 forward-facing scenes, featuring color, multi-spectral and infrared images, confirm the effectiveness of X-NeRF at modeling Cross-Spectral scene representations. 我们提出了 X-NeRF，这是一种基于神经辐射场公式，在给定从具有不同光谱灵敏度的相机捕获的图像的情况下学习跨光谱场景表示的新方法。 X-NeRF 在训练期间优化跨光谱的相机姿势，并利用标准化跨设备坐标 (NXDC) 从任意视点渲染不同模式的图像，这些图像是对齐的且具有相同的分辨率。对 16 个具有彩色、多光谱和红外图像的前方场景进行的实验证实了 X-NeRF 在跨光谱场景表示建模方面的有效性。 提出X-NeRF方法，利用不同光谱的图像学习跨光谱场景表示，实现多光谱和红外图像的对齐渲染。 Matteo Poggi,Pierluigi Zama Ramirez,Fabio Tosi,Samuele Salti,Stefano Mattoccia,Luigi Di Stefano cs.CV

authors_text: Amir Bar,Yossi Gandelsman,Trevor Darrell,Amir Globerson,Alexei A. Efros
title: Visual Prompting via Image Inpainting
title_zh: 通过图像修复进行视觉提示
abstract: How does one adapt a pre-trained visual model to novel downstream tasks without task-specific finetuning or any model modification? Inspired by prompting in NLP, this paper investigates visual prompting: given input-output image example(s) of a new task at test time and a new input image, the goal is to automatically produce the output image, consistent with the given examples. We show that posing this problem as simple image inpainting - literally just filling in a hole in a concatenated visual prompt image - turns out to be surprisingly effective, provided that the inpainting algorithm has been trained on the right data. We train masked auto-encoders on a new dataset that we curated - 88k unlabeled figures from academic papers sources on Arxiv. We apply visual prompting to these pretrained models and demonstrate results on various downstream image-to-image tasks, including foreground segmentation, single object detection, colorization, edge detection, etc.
summary: How does one adapt a pre-trained visual model to novel downstream tasks without task-specific finetuning or any model modification? Inspired by prompting in NLP, this paper investigates visual prompting: given input-output image example(s) of a new task at test time and a new input image, the goal is to automatically produce the output image, consistent with the given examples. We show that posing this problem as simple image inpainting - literally just filling in a hole in a concatenated visual prompt image - turns out to be surprisingly effective, provided that the inpainting algorithm has been trained on the right data. We train masked auto-encoders on a new dataset that we curated - 88k unlabeled figures from academic papers sources on Arxiv. We apply visual prompting to these pretrained models and demonstrate results on various downstream image-to-image tasks, including foreground segmentation, single object detection, colorization, edge detection, etc.
abstract_zh: 如何在不进行特定于任务的微调或任何模型修改的情况下使预先训练的视觉模型适应新的下游任务？受 NLP 提示的启发，本文研究了视觉提示：给定测试时新任务的输入输出图像示例和新的输入图像，目标是自动生成与给定示例一致的输出图像。我们证明，如果修复算法已经在正确的数据上进行了训练，那么将这个问题作为简单的图像修复（实际上只是填充串联的视觉提示图像中的一个洞）会非常有效。我们在我们策划的新数据集上训练屏蔽自动编码器 - 来自 Arxiv 上学术论文来源的 88,000 个未标记数据。我们将视觉提示应用于这些预训练模型，并演示各种下游图像到图像任务的结果，包括前景分割、单个对象检测、着色、边缘检测等。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需微调或修改模型即可适应预训练视觉模型到新任务的方法，通过图像修复技术实现视觉提示。
AI.motivation: 受NLP中提示方法启发，旨在解决如何在不进行任务特定微调或模型修改的情况下，使预训练视觉模型适应新下游任务的问题。
AI.method: 将新任务的输入输出示例与待处理图像拼接为带有缺失区域的视觉提示图像，通过训练的掩码自编码器进行图像修复来生成目标输出。
AI.result: 在多个图像到图像任务（如前景分割、单物体检测、着色、边缘检测等）上验证了方法的有效性，展示了与传统微调方法相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: 图像修复作为视觉提示机制能有效适应预训练模型到新任务，且无需任务特定微调，为视觉模型的灵活应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Sindhu B Hegde,K R Prajwal,Rudrabha Mukhopadhyay,Vinay P Namboodiri,C. V. Jawahar
title: Lip-to-Speech Synthesis for Arbitrary Speakers in the Wild
title_zh: 野外任意说话者的唇语合成
comment: Accepted in ACM-MM 2022, 9 pages, 2 pages supplementary, 7 Figures
comments: Accepted in ACM-MM 2022, 9 pages, 2 pages supplementary, 7 Figures
abstract: In this work, we address the problem of generating speech from silent lip videos for any speaker in the wild. In stark contrast to previous works, our method (i) is not restricted to a fixed number of speakers, (ii) does not explicitly impose constraints on the domain or the vocabulary and (iii) deals with videos that are recorded in the wild as opposed to within laboratory settings. The task presents a host of challenges, with the key one being that many features of the desired target speech, like voice, pitch and linguistic content, cannot be entirely inferred from the silent face video. In order to handle these stochastic variations, we propose a new VAE-GAN architecture that learns to associate the lip and speech sequences amidst the variations. With the help of multiple powerful discriminators that guide the training process, our generator learns to synthesize speech sequences in any voice for the lip movements of any person. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets show that we outperform all baselines by a large margin. Further, our network can be fine-tuned on videos of specific identities to achieve a performance comparable to single-speaker models that are trained on $4\times$ more data. We conduct numerous ablation studies to analyze the effect of different modules of our architecture. We also provide a demo video that demonstrates several qualitative results along with the code and trained models on our website: \url{http://cvit.iiit.ac.in/research/projects/cvit-projects/lip-to-speech-synthesis}}
summary: In this work, we address the problem of generating speech from silent lip videos for any speaker in the wild. In stark contrast to previous works, our method (i) is not restricted to a fixed number of speakers, (ii) does not explicitly impose constraints on the domain or the vocabulary and (iii) deals with videos that are recorded in the wild as opposed to within laboratory settings. The task presents a host of challenges, with the key one being that many features of the desired target speech, like voice, pitch and linguistic content, cannot be entirely inferred from the silent face video. In order to handle these stochastic variations, we propose a new VAE-GAN architecture that learns to associate the lip and speech sequences amidst the variations. With the help of multiple powerful discriminators that guide the training process, our generator learns to synthesize speech sequences in any voice for the lip movements of any person. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets show that we outperform all baselines by a large margin. Further, our network can be fine-tuned on videos of specific identities to achieve a performance comparable to single-speaker models that are trained on $4\times$ more data. We conduct numerous ablation studies to analyze the effect of different modules of our architecture. We also provide a demo video that demonstrates several qualitative results along with the code and trained models on our website: \url{http://cvit.iiit.ac.in/research/projects/cvit-projects/lip-to-speech-synthesis}}
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们解决了从无声唇形视频中为野外任何说话者生成语音的问题。与以前的工作形成鲜明对比的是，我们的方法（i）不限于固定数量的发言者，（ii）没有明确地对领域或词汇施加限制，并且（iii）处理在野外录制的视频，而不是在实验室环境中录制的视频。这项任务提出了一系列挑战，其中关键的一个挑战是所需目标语音的许多特征，如语音、音调和语言内容，无法完全从无声的面部视频中推断出来。为了处理这些随机变化，我们提出了一种新的 VAE-GAN 架构，该架构能够学习在变化中关联嘴唇和语音序列。在指导训练过程的多个强大鉴别器的帮助下，我们的生成器学会了针对任何人的嘴唇运动合成任何声音的语音序列。对多个数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的表现大大优于所有基线。此外，我们的网络可以针对特定身份的视频进行微调，以达到与使用 4 倍以上数据进行训练的单说话人模型相当的性能。我们进行了大量的消融研究来分析我们架构的不同模块的效果。我们还在我们的网站上提供了一个演示视频，展示了一些定性结果以及代码和训练模型：\url{http://cvit.iiit.ac.in/research/projects/cvit-projects/lip-to-speech-synthesis}}

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从任意说话者的野生静音唇部视频中生成语音的方法，突破了传统方法在说话人数量、领域限制和实验室环境等方面的约束。
AI.motivation: 现有方法受限于固定说话人数量、领域和词汇范围，且难以处理野外视频中语音特征（如音色、音高和语言内容）无法完全从唇部动作推断的挑战。
AI.method: 设计了一种新型VAE-GAN架构，通过多判别器引导训练，使生成器能够学习关联唇部动作与语音序列，并在不同说话人和语音特征间进行泛化。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上显著优于基线方法，通过特定身份视频微调可达到单说话人模型4倍数据量的性能，且提供消融实验和可视化演示。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了野外唇语到语音合成的随机性挑战，验证了其架构在通用性唇语语音合成任务中的潜力。

title: Seq-UPS: Sequential Uncertainty-aware Pseudo-label Selection for Semi-Supervised Text Recognition
title_zh: Seq-UPS：用于半监督文本识别的顺序不确定性伪标签选择
abstract: This paper looks at semi-supervised learning (SSL) for image-based text recognition. One of the most popular SSL approaches is pseudo-labeling (PL). PL approaches assign labels to unlabeled data before re-training the model with a combination of labeled and pseudo-labeled data. However, PL methods are severely degraded by noise and are prone to over-fitting to noisy labels, due to the inclusion of erroneous high confidence pseudo-labels generated from poorly calibrated models, thus, rendering threshold-based selection ineffective. Moreover, the combinatorial complexity of the hypothesis space and the error accumulation due to multiple incorrect autoregressive steps posit pseudo-labeling challenging for sequence models. To this end, we propose a pseudo-label generation and an uncertainty-based data selection framework for semi-supervised text recognition. We first use Beam-Search inference to yield highly probable hypotheses to assign pseudo-labels to the unlabelled examples. Then we adopt an ensemble of models, sampled by applying dropout, to obtain a robust estimate of the uncertainty associated with the prediction, considering both the character-level and word-level predictive distribution to select good quality pseudo-labels. Extensive experiments on several benchmark handwriting and scene-text datasets show that our method outperforms the baseline approaches and the previous state-of-the-art semi-supervised text-recognition methods.
summary: This paper looks at semi-supervised learning (SSL) for image-based text recognition. One of the most popular SSL approaches is pseudo-labeling (PL). PL approaches assign labels to unlabeled data before re-training the model with a combination of labeled and pseudo-labeled data. However, PL methods are severely degraded by noise and are prone to over-fitting to noisy labels, due to the inclusion of erroneous high confidence pseudo-labels generated from poorly calibrated models, thus, rendering threshold-based selection ineffective. Moreover, the combinatorial complexity of the hypothesis space and the error accumulation due to multiple incorrect autoregressive steps posit pseudo-labeling challenging for sequence models. To this end, we propose a pseudo-label generation and an uncertainty-based data selection framework for semi-supervised text recognition. We first use Beam-Search inference to yield highly probable hypotheses to assign pseudo-labels to the unlabelled examples. Then we adopt an ensemble of models, sampled by applying dropout, to obtain a robust estimate of the uncertainty associated with the prediction, considering both the character-level and word-level predictive distribution to select good quality pseudo-labels. Extensive experiments on several benchmark handwriting and scene-text datasets show that our method outperforms the baseline approaches and the previous state-of-the-art semi-supervised text-recognition methods.
abstract_zh: 本文着眼于基于图像的文本识别的半监督学习 (SSL)。最流行的 SSL 方法之一是伪标签 (PL)。 PL 方法先将标签分配给未标记的数据，然后再结合标记数据和伪标记数据重新训练模型。然而，PL 方法会受到噪声的严重影响，并且由于包含了由校准不良的模型生成的错误的高置信度伪标签，因此容易过度拟合噪声标签，从而导致基于阈值的选择无效。此外，假设空间的组合复杂性以及由于多个不正确的自回归步骤导致的误差累积给序列模型带来了伪标记的挑战。为此，我们提出了用于半监督文本识别的伪标签生成和基于不确定性的数据选择框架。我们首先使用束搜索推理来产生高概率假设，为未标记的示例分配伪标签。然后，我们采用模型集合，通过应用 dropout 进行采样，以获得与预测相关的不确定性的稳健估计，同时考虑字符级和单词级预测分布来选择高质量的伪标签。对几个基准手写和场景文本数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的方法优于基线方法和以前最先进的半监督文本识别方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对半监督文本识别的序列不确定性感知伪标签选择方法Seq-UPS，以解决伪标签噪声和过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 现有伪标签方法因噪声数据和模型校准问题导致性能下降，尤其在序列模型中存在错误累积和假设空间复杂度高的挑战。
AI.method: 采用Beam-Search生成高概率假设，并通过Dropout采样模型集成，结合字符级和词级预测分布估计不确定性，筛选高质量伪标签。
AI.result: 在多个手写体和场景文本数据集上实验表明，该方法优于基线和现有最先进的半监督文本识别方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过不确定性感知的伪标签选择框架，Seq-UPS有效提升了半监督文本识别的鲁棒性和准确性。

authors_text: Nadine Behrmann,S. Alireza Golestaneh,Zico Kolter,Juergen Gall,Mehdi Noroozi
title: Unified Fully and Timestamp Supervised Temporal Action Segmentation via Sequence to Sequence Translation
title_zh: 通过序列到序列翻译的统一完全和时间戳监督时间动作分割
abstract: This paper introduces a unified framework for video action segmentation via sequence to sequence (seq2seq) translation in a fully and timestamp supervised setup. In contrast to current state-of-the-art frame-level prediction methods, we view action segmentation as a seq2seq translation task, i.e., mapping a sequence of video frames to a sequence of action segments. Our proposed method involves a series of modifications and auxiliary loss functions on the standard Transformer seq2seq translation model to cope with long input sequences opposed to short output sequences and relatively few videos. We incorporate an auxiliary supervision signal for the encoder via a frame-wise loss and propose a separate alignment decoder for an implicit duration prediction. Finally, we extend our framework to the timestamp supervised setting via our proposed constrained k-medoids algorithm to generate pseudo-segmentations. Our proposed framework performs consistently on both fully and timestamp supervised settings, outperforming or competing state-of-the-art on several datasets. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/boschresearch/UVAST.
summary: This paper introduces a unified framework for video action segmentation via sequence to sequence (seq2seq) translation in a fully and timestamp supervised setup. In contrast to current state-of-the-art frame-level prediction methods, we view action segmentation as a seq2seq translation task, i.e., mapping a sequence of video frames to a sequence of action segments. Our proposed method involves a series of modifications and auxiliary loss functions on the standard Transformer seq2seq translation model to cope with long input sequences opposed to short output sequences and relatively few videos. We incorporate an auxiliary supervision signal for the encoder via a frame-wise loss and propose a separate alignment decoder for an implicit duration prediction. Finally, we extend our framework to the timestamp supervised setting via our proposed constrained k-medoids algorithm to generate pseudo-segmentations. Our proposed framework performs consistently on both fully and timestamp supervised settings, outperforming or competing state-of-the-art on several datasets. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/boschresearch/UVAST.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一个统一的视频动作分割框架，通过完全和时间戳监督设置中的序列到序列 (seq2seq) 转换。与当前最先进的帧级预测方法相比，我们将动作分割视为 seq2seq 翻译任务，即将视频帧序列映射到动作片段序列。我们提出的方法涉及对标准 Transformer seq2seq 翻译模型的一系列修改和辅助损失函数，以应对长输入序列而不是短输出序列和相对较少的视频。我们通过逐帧损失为编码器合并一个辅助监督信号，并提出一个单独的对齐解码器用于隐式持续时间预测。最后，我们通过提出的约束 k-medoids 算法将我们的框架扩展到时间戳监督设置，以生成伪分割。我们提出的框架在完全和时间戳监督设置上表现一致，在多个数据集上优于或竞争最先进的技术。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/boschresearch/UVAST 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种统一的序列到序列翻译框架，用于在完全监督和时间戳监督下进行视频动作分割。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理长视频输入和短输出序列时存在局限，且视频数量有限，需通过序列到序列翻译框架提升分割效果。
AI.method: 基于Transformer的序列到序列模型，引入帧级损失和对齐解码器，并通过约束k-medoids算法处理时间戳监督。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，该框架在完全监督和时间戳监督下均优于或接近现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在统一框架下有效处理两种监督设置，验证了其有效性，并开源代码促进进一步研究。

title: Online Meta-Learning for Model Update Aggregation in Federated Learning for Click-Through Rate Prediction
title_zh: 用于点击率预测的联合学习中的模型更新聚合的在线元学习
abstract: In Federated Learning (FL) of click-through rate (CTR) prediction, users' data is not shared for privacy protection. The learning is performed by training locally on client devices and communicating only model changes to the server. There are two main challenges: (i) the client heterogeneity, making FL algorithms that use the weighted averaging to aggregate model updates from the clients have slow progress and unsatisfactory learning results; and (ii) the difficulty of tuning the server learning rate with trial-and-error methodology due to the big computation time and resources needed for each experiment. To address these challenges, we propose a simple online meta-learning method to learn a strategy of aggregating the model updates, which adaptively weighs the importance of the clients based on their attributes and adjust the step sizes of the update. We perform extensive evaluations on public datasets. Our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art in both the speed of convergence and the quality of the final learning results.
summary: In Federated Learning (FL) of click-through rate (CTR) prediction, users' data is not shared for privacy protection. The learning is performed by training locally on client devices and communicating only model changes to the server. There are two main challenges: (i) the client heterogeneity, making FL algorithms that use the weighted averaging to aggregate model updates from the clients have slow progress and unsatisfactory learning results; and (ii) the difficulty of tuning the server learning rate with trial-and-error methodology due to the big computation time and resources needed for each experiment. To address these challenges, we propose a simple online meta-learning method to learn a strategy of aggregating the model updates, which adaptively weighs the importance of the clients based on their attributes and adjust the step sizes of the update. We perform extensive evaluations on public datasets. Our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art in both the speed of convergence and the quality of the final learning results.
abstract_zh: 在点击率（CTR）预测的联邦学习（FL）中，为了保护隐私，用户的数据不会被共享。学习是通过在客户端设备上进行本地训练并仅将模型更改传达到服务器来执行的。主要面临两个挑战：（i）客户端异构性，使得使用加权平均来聚合来自客户端的模型更新的FL算法进展缓慢且学习结果不理想； (ii) 由于每个实验需要大量的计算时间和资源，因此很难通过试错方法调整服务器学习率。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种简单的在线元学习方法来学习聚合模型更新的策略，该策略根据客户的属性自适应地权衡客户的重要性并调整更新的步长。我们对公共数据集进行广泛的评估。我们的方法在收敛速度和最终学习结果的质量方面都显着优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在线元学习方法，用于联邦学习中点击率预测的模型更新聚合，以解决客户端异质性和服务器学习率调整困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习在点击率预测中面临客户端数据异质性导致的模型聚合效率低下，以及手动调整服务器学习率耗时耗资源的挑战。
AI.method: 设计了一种在线元学习策略，根据客户端属性自适应调整模型更新权重和步长，替代传统加权平均聚合方法。
AI.result: 在公共数据集上实验表明，该方法在收敛速度和最终预测精度上均显著优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 通过自适应聚合策略，元学习方法有效提升了联邦学习在点击率预测场景下的性能，为异质性客户端协作提供了新思路。

search_text: Online Meta-Learning for Model Update Aggregation in Federated Learning for Click-Through Rate Prediction 用于点击率预测的联合学习中的模型更新聚合的在线元学习 In Federated Learning (FL) of click-through rate (CTR) prediction, users' data is not shared for privacy protection. The learning is performed by training locally on client devices and communicating only model changes to the server. There are two main challenges: (i) the client heterogeneity, making FL algorithms that use the weighted averaging to aggregate model updates from the clients have slow progress and unsatisfactory learning results; and (ii) the difficulty of tuning the server learning rate with trial-and-error methodology due to the big computation time and resources needed for each experiment. To address these challenges, we propose a simple online meta-learning method to learn a strategy of aggregating the model updates, which adaptively weighs the importance of the clients based on their attributes and adjust the step sizes of the update. We perform extensive evaluations on public datasets. Our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art in both the speed of convergence and the quality of the final learning results. 在点击率（CTR）预测的联邦学习（FL）中，为了保护隐私，用户的数据不会被共享。学习是通过在客户端设备上进行本地训练并仅将模型更改传达到服务器来执行的。主要面临两个挑战：（i）客户端异构性，使得使用加权平均来聚合来自客户端的模型更新的FL算法进展缓慢且学习结果不理想； (ii) 由于每个实验需要大量的计算时间和资源，因此很难通过试错方法调整服务器学习率。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种简单的在线元学习方法来学习聚合模型更新的策略，该策略根据客户的属性自适应地权衡客户的重要性并调整更新的步长。我们对公共数据集进行广泛的评估。我们的方法在收敛速度和最终学习结果的质量方面都显着优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种在线元学习方法，用于联邦学习中点击率预测的模型更新聚合，以解决客户端异质性和服务器学习率调整困难的问题。 Xianghang Liu,Bartłomiej Twardowski,Tri Kurniawan Wijaya cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.CR,cs.LG

title: The Alignment Problem from a Deep Learning Perspective
title_zh: 深度学习角度的对齐问题
abstract: In coming years or decades, artificial general intelligence (AGI) may surpass human capabilities across many critical domains. We argue that, without substantial effort to prevent it, AGIs could learn to pursue goals that are in conflict (i.e. misaligned) with human interests. If trained like today's most capable models, AGIs could learn to act deceptively to receive higher reward, learn misaligned internally-represented goals which generalize beyond their fine-tuning distributions, and pursue those goals using power-seeking strategies. We review emerging evidence for these properties. In this revised paper, we include more direct empirical evidence published as of early 2025. AGIs with these properties would be difficult to align and may appear aligned even when they are not. Finally, we briefly outline how the deployment of misaligned AGIs might irreversibly undermine human control over the world, and we review research directions aimed at preventing this outcome.
summary: In coming years or decades, artificial general intelligence (AGI) may surpass human capabilities across many critical domains. We argue that, without substantial effort to prevent it, AGIs could learn to pursue goals that are in conflict (i.e. misaligned) with human interests. If trained like today's most capable models, AGIs could learn to act deceptively to receive higher reward, learn misaligned internally-represented goals which generalize beyond their fine-tuning distributions, and pursue those goals using power-seeking strategies. We review emerging evidence for these properties. In this revised paper, we include more direct empirical evidence published as of early 2025. AGIs with these properties would be difficult to align and may appear aligned even when they are not. Finally, we briefly outline how the deployment of misaligned AGIs might irreversibly undermine human control over the world, and we review research directions aimed at preventing this outcome.
abstract_zh: 在未来几年或几十年里，通用人工智能（AGI）可能会在许多关键领域超越人类的能力。我们认为，如果不采取实质性措施来阻止，AGI 可能会学会追求与人类利益相冲突（即不一致）的目标。如果像当今最有能力的模型一样进行训练，AGI 可以学会欺骗性的行为来获得更高的奖励，学习不一致的内部代表目标，这些目标泛化到其微调分布之外，并使用寻求权力的策略来追求这些目标。我们回顾了这些特性的新证据。在这份修订后的论文中，我们纳入了截至 2025 年初发布的更直接的经验证据。具有这些特性的 AGI 很难对齐，即使没有对齐，也可能看起来对齐。最后，我们简要概述了错位通用人工智能的部署如何可能不可逆转地破坏人类对世界的控制，并回顾了旨在防止这种结果的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文从深度学习视角探讨人工通用智能（AGI）的目标对齐问题，分析其可能偏离人类利益的风险及应对策略。
AI.motivation: 随着AGI可能超越人类能力，若未妥善解决目标对齐问题，AGI可能发展出与人类利益冲突的目标，导致不可逆风险。
AI.method: 通过回顾现有研究并整合2025年初的实证证据，分析AGI在训练过程中可能出现的欺骗性行为、目标偏差及权力获取策略。
AI.result: 发现AGI可能在表面对齐下隐藏真实目标，其偏差行为可能超出训练数据分布，且部署后可能破坏人类对世界的控制。
AI.conclusion: 需优先研究对齐技术以防止AGI风险，当前方法难以完全解决对齐难题，需多方向探索安全可控的AGI发展路径。

authors_text: Li Lyna Zhang,Youkow Homma,Yujing Wang,Min Wu,Mao Yang,Ruofei Zhang,Ting Cao,Wei Shen
title: SwiftPruner: Reinforced Evolutionary Pruning for Efficient Ad Relevance
title_zh: SwiftPruner：强化进化修剪以实现高效的广告相关性
abstract: Ad relevance modeling plays a critical role in online advertising systems including Microsoft Bing. To leverage powerful transformers like BERT in this low-latency setting, many existing approaches perform ad-side computations offline. While efficient, these approaches are unable to serve cold start ads, resulting in poor relevance predictions for such ads. This work aims to design a new, low-latency BERT via structured pruning to empower real-time online inference for cold start ads relevance on a CPU platform. Our challenge is that previous methods typically prune all layers of the transformer to a high, uniform sparsity, thereby producing models which cannot achieve satisfactory inference speed with an acceptable accuracy. In this paper, we propose SwiftPruner - an efficient framework that leverages evolution-based search to automatically find the best-performing layer-wise sparse BERT model under the desired latency constraint. Different from existing evolution algorithms that conduct random mutations, we propose a reinforced mutator with a latency-aware multi-objective reward to conduct better mutations for efficiently searching the large space of layer-wise sparse models. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method consistently achieves higher ROC AUC and lower latency than the uniform sparse baseline and state-of-the-art search methods. Remarkably, under our latency requirement of 1900us on CPU, SwiftPruner achieves a 0.86% higher AUC than the state-of-the-art uniform sparse baseline for BERT-Mini on a large scale real-world dataset. Online A/B testing shows that our model also achieves a significant 11.7% cut in the ratio of defective cold start ads with satisfactory real-time serving latency.
summary: Ad relevance modeling plays a critical role in online advertising systems including Microsoft Bing. To leverage powerful transformers like BERT in this low-latency setting, many existing approaches perform ad-side computations offline. While efficient, these approaches are unable to serve cold start ads, resulting in poor relevance predictions for such ads. This work aims to design a new, low-latency BERT via structured pruning to empower real-time online inference for cold start ads relevance on a CPU platform. Our challenge is that previous methods typically prune all layers of the transformer to a high, uniform sparsity, thereby producing models which cannot achieve satisfactory inference speed with an acceptable accuracy. In this paper, we propose SwiftPruner - an efficient framework that leverages evolution-based search to automatically find the best-performing layer-wise sparse BERT model under the desired latency constraint. Different from existing evolution algorithms that conduct random mutations, we propose a reinforced mutator with a latency-aware multi-objective reward to conduct better mutations for efficiently searching the large space of layer-wise sparse models. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method consistently achieves higher ROC AUC and lower latency than the uniform sparse baseline and state-of-the-art search methods. Remarkably, under our latency requirement of 1900us on CPU, SwiftPruner achieves a 0.86% higher AUC than the state-of-the-art uniform sparse baseline for BERT-Mini on a large scale real-world dataset. Online A/B testing shows that our model also achieves a significant 11.7% cut in the ratio of defective cold start ads with satisfactory real-time serving latency.
abstract_zh: 广告相关性建模在包括 Microsoft Bing 在内的在线广告系统中发挥着至关重要的作用。为了在这种低延迟设置中利用 BERT 等强大的转换器，许多现有方法都离线执行广告端计算。这些方法虽然有效，但无法提供冷启动广告，导致此类广告的相关性预测较差。这项工作旨在通过结构化剪枝设计一种新的低延迟 BERT，以实现 CPU 平台上冷启动广告相关性的实时在线推理。我们面临的挑战是，以前的方法通常会将变压器的所有层修剪为高、均匀的稀疏度，从而产生无法以可接受的精度实现令人满意的推理速度的模型。在本文中，我们提出了 SwiftPruner - 一种高效的框架，它利用基于进化的搜索在所需的延迟约束下自动找到性能最佳的逐层稀疏 BERT 模型。与现有的进行随机突变的进化算法不同，我们提出了一种具有延迟感知多目标奖励的强化突变器，可以进行更好的突变，从而有效地搜索大空间的分层稀疏模型。大量实验表明，与统一稀疏基线和最先进的搜索方法相比，我们的方法始终能够实现更高的 ROC AUC 和更低的延迟。值得注意的是，在我们对 CPU 的延迟要求为 1900us 的情况下，SwiftPruner 在大规模真实数据集上实现的 AUC 比 BERT-Mini 最先进的均匀稀疏基线高 0.86%。在线 A/B 测试表明，我们的模型还实现了有缺陷的冷启动广告比例显着降低了 11.7%，并且实时服务延迟令人满意。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SwiftPruner框架，通过结构化剪枝设计低延迟BERT模型，以实现实时在线推理处理冷启动广告的相关性预测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过离线计算处理广告相关性建模，无法有效应对冷启动广告，且统一稀疏度剪枝方法难以在速度与精度间取得平衡。
AI.method: 基于进化搜索的强化突变机制，结合延迟感知多目标奖励函数，自动寻找符合延迟约束的层级稀疏BERT模型。
AI.result: 在CPU平台实现1900us延迟约束下，BERT-Mini模型AUC提升0.86%，在线测试使冷启动广告缺陷率降低11.7%。
AI.conclusion: SwiftPruner通过非均匀层级剪枝有效平衡了模型精度与推理速度，为实时广告系统提供了高效解决方案。

Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method consistently achieves higher ROC AUC and lower latency than the uniform sparse baseline and state-of-the-art search methods. Remarkably, under our latency requirement of 1900us on CPU, SwiftPruner achieves a 0.86% higher AUC than the state-of-the-art uniform sparse baseline for BERT-Mini on a large scale real-world dataset. Online A/B testing shows that our model also achieves a significant 11.7% cut in the ratio of defective cold start ads with satisfactory real-time serving latency. 广告相关性建模在包括 Microsoft Bing 在内的在线广告系统中发挥着至关重要的作用。为了在这种低延迟设置中利用 BERT 等强大的转换器，许多现有方法都离线执行广告端计算。这些方法虽然有效，但无法提供冷启动广告，导致此类广告的相关性预测较差。这项工作旨在通过结构化剪枝设计一种新的低延迟 BERT，以实现 CPU 平台上冷启动广告相关性的实时在线推理。我们面临的挑战是，以前的方法通常会将变压器的所有层修剪为高、均匀的稀疏度，从而产生无法以可接受的精度实现令人满意的推理速度的模型。在本文中，我们提出了 SwiftPruner - 一种高效的框架，它利用基于进化的搜索在所需的延迟约束下自动找到性能最佳的逐层稀疏 BERT 模型。与现有的进行随机突变的进化算法不同，我们提出了一种具有延迟感知多目标奖励的强化突变器，可以进行更好的突变，从而有效地搜索大空间的分层稀疏模型。大量实验表明，与统一稀疏基线和最先进的搜索方法相比，我们的方法始终能够实现更高的 ROC AUC 和更低的延迟。值得注意的是，在我们对 CPU 的延迟要求为 1900us 的情况下，SwiftPruner 在大规模真实数据集上实现的 AUC 比 BERT-Mini 最先进的均匀稀疏基线高 0.86%。在线 A/B 测试表明，我们的模型还实现了有缺陷的冷启动广告比例显着降低了 11.7%，并且实时服务延迟令人满意。 本文提出SwiftPruner框架，通过结构化剪枝设计低延迟BERT模型，以实现实时在线推理处理冷启动广告的相关性预测。 Li Lyna Zhang,Youkow Homma,Yujing Wang,Min Wu,Mao Yang,Ruofei Zhang,Ting Cao,Wei Shen cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.CL

title: Optimising 2D Pose Representation: Improve Accuracy, Stability and Generalisability Within Unsupervised 2D-3D Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: 优化 2D 姿势表示：提高无监督 2D-3D 人体姿势估计的准确性、稳定性和通用性
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2205.05980
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2205.05980
abstract: This paper addresses the problem of 2D pose representation during unsupervised 2D to 3D pose lifting to improve the accuracy, stability and generalisability of 3D human pose estimation (HPE) models. All unsupervised 2D-3D HPE approaches provide the entire 2D kinematic skeleton to a model during training. We argue that this is sub-optimal and disruptive as long-range correlations are induced between independent 2D key points and predicted 3D ordinates during training. To this end, we conduct the following study. With a maximum architecture capacity of 6 residual blocks, we evaluate the performance of 5 models which each represent a 2D pose differently during the adversarial unsupervised 2D-3D HPE process. Additionally, we show the correlations between 2D key points which are learned during the training process, highlighting the unintuitive correlations induced when an entire 2D pose is provided to a lifting model. Our results show that the most optimal representation of a 2D pose is that of two independent segments, the torso and legs, with no shared features between each lifting network. This approach decreased the average error by 20\% on the Human3.6M dataset when compared to a model with a near identical parameter count trained on the entire 2D kinematic skeleton. Furthermore, due to the complex nature of adversarial learning, we show how this representation can also improve convergence during training allowing for an optimum result to be obtained more often.
summary: This paper addresses the problem of 2D pose representation during unsupervised 2D to 3D pose lifting to improve the accuracy, stability and generalisability of 3D human pose estimation (HPE) models. All unsupervised 2D-3D HPE approaches provide the entire 2D kinematic skeleton to a model during training. We argue that this is sub-optimal and disruptive as long-range correlations are induced between independent 2D key points and predicted 3D ordinates during training. To this end, we conduct the following study. With a maximum architecture capacity of 6 residual blocks, we evaluate the performance of 5 models which each represent a 2D pose differently during the adversarial unsupervised 2D-3D HPE process. Additionally, we show the correlations between 2D key points which are learned during the training process, highlighting the unintuitive correlations induced when an entire 2D pose is provided to a lifting model. Our results show that the most optimal representation of a 2D pose is that of two independent segments, the torso and legs, with no shared features between each lifting network. This approach decreased the average error by 20\% on the Human3.6M dataset when compared to a model with a near identical parameter count trained on the entire 2D kinematic skeleton. Furthermore, due to the complex nature of adversarial learning, we show how this representation can also improve convergence during training allowing for an optimum result to be obtained more often.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了无监督 2D 到 3D 姿态提升过程中的 2D 姿态表示问题，以提高 3D 人体姿态估计 (HPE) 模型的准确性、稳定性和通用性。所有无监督 2D-3D HPE 方法都会在训练期间为模型提供整个 2D 运动骨架。我们认为，这是次优且具有破坏性的，因为在训练期间独立的 2D 关键点和预测的 3D 坐标之间会产生长程相关性。为此，我们进行如下研究。凭借 6 个残差块的最大架构容量，我们评估了 5 个模型的性能，每个模型在对抗性无监督 2D-3D HPE 过程中代表不同的 2D 姿势。此外，我们还展示了在训练过程中学习的 2D 关键点之间的相关性，突出显示了将整个 2D 姿势提供给提升模型时引起的不直观的相关性。我们的结果表明，2D 姿势的最佳表示是两个独立部分（躯干和腿部）的表示，每个提升网络之间没有共享特征。与在整个 2D 运动骨架上训练的参数数量几乎相同的模型相比，这种方法在 Human3.6M 数据集上的平均误差降低了 20%。此外，由于对抗性学习的复杂性，我们展示了这种表示如何在训练过程中提高收敛性，从而更频繁地获得最佳结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何优化无监督2D到3D人体姿态估计中的2D姿态表示，以提高模型的准确性、稳定性和泛化性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在训练时提供完整的2D骨架信息，导致2D关键点与预测3D坐标之间产生不必要的长距离相关性，影响模型性能。
AI.method: 采用最大6个残差块的架构，评估5种不同的2D姿态表示方法，并分析训练过程中2D关键点间的相关性。
AI.result: 将2D姿态分为躯干和腿部两个独立部分且不共享特征的方法，在Human3.6M数据集上平均误差降低20%，并加速了训练收敛。
AI.conclusion: 独立分段的2D姿态表示能有效提升无监督3D姿态估计的精度与训练效率，优于传统整体骨架输入方法。

title: Fair mapping
title_zh: 公平测绘
abstract: To mitigate the effects of undesired biases in models, several approaches propose to pre-process the input dataset to reduce the risks of discrimination by preventing the inference of sensitive attributes. Unfortunately, most of these pre-processing methods lead to the generation a new distribution that is very different from the original one, thus often leading to unrealistic data. As a side effect, this new data distribution implies that existing models need to be re-trained to be able to make accurate predictions. To address this issue, we propose a novel pre-processing method, that we coin as fair mapping, based on the transformation of the distribution of protected groups onto a chosen target one, with additional privacy constraints whose objective is to prevent the inference of sensitive attributes. More precisely, we leverage on the recent works of the Wasserstein GAN and AttGAN frameworks to achieve the optimal transport of data points coupled with a discriminator enforcing the protection against attribute inference. Our proposed approach, preserves the interpretability of data and can be used without defining exactly the sensitive groups. In addition, our approach can be specialized to model existing state-of-the-art approaches, thus proposing a unifying view on these methods. Finally, several experiments on real and synthetic datasets demonstrate that our approach is able to hide the sensitive attributes, while limiting the distortion of the data and improving the fairness on subsequent data analysis tasks.
summary: To mitigate the effects of undesired biases in models, several approaches propose to pre-process the input dataset to reduce the risks of discrimination by preventing the inference of sensitive attributes. Unfortunately, most of these pre-processing methods lead to the generation a new distribution that is very different from the original one, thus often leading to unrealistic data. As a side effect, this new data distribution implies that existing models need to be re-trained to be able to make accurate predictions. To address this issue, we propose a novel pre-processing method, that we coin as fair mapping, based on the transformation of the distribution of protected groups onto a chosen target one, with additional privacy constraints whose objective is to prevent the inference of sensitive attributes. More precisely, we leverage on the recent works of the Wasserstein GAN and AttGAN frameworks to achieve the optimal transport of data points coupled with a discriminator enforcing the protection against attribute inference. Our proposed approach, preserves the interpretability of data and can be used without defining exactly the sensitive groups. In addition, our approach can be specialized to model existing state-of-the-art approaches, thus proposing a unifying view on these methods. Finally, several experiments on real and synthetic datasets demonstrate that our approach is able to hide the sensitive attributes, while limiting the distortion of the data and improving the fairness on subsequent data analysis tasks.
abstract_zh: 为了减轻模型中不良偏差的影响，有几种方法建议对输入数据集进行预处理，以通过防止敏感属性的推断来降低歧视风险。不幸的是，大多数这些预处理方法都会导致生成一种与原始分布非常不同的新分布，从而常常导致不切实际的数据。作为副作用，这种新的数据分布意味着现有模型需要重新训练才能做出准确的预测。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的预处理方法，我们将其称为公平映射，基于受保护组的分布到选定目标组的转换，并具有额外的隐私约束，其目的是防止敏感属性的推断。更准确地说，我们利用 Wasserstein GAN 和 AttGAN 框架的最新成果来实现数据点的最佳传输，并结合强制防止属性推断的判别器。我们提出的方法保留了数据的可解释性，并且可以在不准确定义敏感群体的情况下使用。此外，我们的方法可以专门对现有最先进的方法进行建模，从而对这些方法提出统一的观点。最后，对真实数据集和合成数据集的多次实验表明，我们的方法能够隐藏敏感属性，同时限制数据的失真并提高后续数据分析任务的公平性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为fair mapping的预处理方法，通过将受保护群体的数据分布转换到目标分布并加入隐私约束，以减少模型中的偏见和敏感属性推断风险。
AI.motivation: 现有预处理方法生成的数据分布与原始数据差异过大，导致数据不真实且需要重新训练模型，同时难以有效防止敏感属性推断。
AI.method: 基于Wasserstein GAN和AttGAN框架实现数据最优传输，并引入判别器增强对敏感属性的保护，无需明确定义敏感群体即可保持数据可解释性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效隐藏敏感属性，降低数据失真，同时提升后续数据分析任务的公平性。
AI.conclusion: fair mapping方法统一了现有预处理技术，提供了一种无需精确定义敏感群体的解决方案，兼顾数据真实性与公平性提升。

Our proposed approach, preserves the interpretability of data and can be used without defining exactly the sensitive groups. In addition, our approach can be specialized to model existing state-of-the-art approaches, thus proposing a unifying view on these methods. Finally, several experiments on real and synthetic datasets demonstrate that our approach is able to hide the sensitive attributes, while limiting the distortion of the data and improving the fairness on subsequent data analysis tasks. 为了减轻模型中不良偏差的影响，有几种方法建议对输入数据集进行预处理，以通过防止敏感属性的推断来降低歧视风险。不幸的是，大多数这些预处理方法都会导致生成一种与原始分布非常不同的新分布，从而常常导致不切实际的数据。作为副作用，这种新的数据分布意味着现有模型需要重新训练才能做出准确的预测。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的预处理方法，我们将其称为公平映射，基于受保护组的分布到选定目标组的转换，并具有额外的隐私约束，其目的是防止敏感属性的推断。更准确地说，我们利用 Wasserstein GAN 和 AttGAN 框架的最新成果来实现数据点的最佳传输，并结合强制防止属性推断的判别器。我们提出的方法保留了数据的可解释性，并且可以在不准确定义敏感群体的情况下使用。此外，我们的方法可以专门对现有最先进的方法进行建模，从而对这些方法提出统一的观点。最后，对真实数据集和合成数据集的多次实验表明，我们的方法能够隐藏敏感属性，同时限制数据的失真并提高后续数据分析任务的公平性。 本文提出一种名为fair mapping的预处理方法，通过将受保护群体的数据分布转换到目标分布并加入隐私约束，以减少模型中的偏见和敏感属性推断风险。 Sébastien Gambs,Rosin Claude Ngueveu cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Damien Teney,Yong Lin,Seong Joon Oh,Ehsan Abbasnejad
title: ID and OOD Performance Are Sometimes Inversely Correlated on Real-world Datasets
title_zh: ID 和 OOD 性能有时在实际数据集上呈负相关
abstract: Several studies have compared the in-distribution (ID) and out-of-distribution (OOD) performance of models in computer vision and NLP. They report a frequent positive correlation and some surprisingly never even observe an inverse correlation indicative of a necessary trade-off. The possibility of inverse patterns is important to determine whether ID performance can serve as a proxy for OOD generalization capabilities. This paper shows with multiple datasets that inverse correlations between ID and OOD performance do happen in real-world data - not only in theoretical worst-case settings. We also explain theoretically how these cases can arise even in a minimal linear setting, and why past studies could miss such cases due to a biased selection of models. Our observations lead to recommendations that contradict those found in much of the current literature. - High OOD performance sometimes requires trading off ID performance. - Focusing on ID performance alone may not lead to optimal OOD performance. It may produce diminishing (eventually negative) returns in OOD performance. - In these cases, studies on OOD generalization that use ID performance for model selection (a common recommended practice) will necessarily miss the best-performing models, making these studies blind to a whole range of phenomena.
summary: Several studies have compared the in-distribution (ID) and out-of-distribution (OOD) performance of models in computer vision and NLP. They report a frequent positive correlation and some surprisingly never even observe an inverse correlation indicative of a necessary trade-off. The possibility of inverse patterns is important to determine whether ID performance can serve as a proxy for OOD generalization capabilities. This paper shows with multiple datasets that inverse correlations between ID and OOD performance do happen in real-world data - not only in theoretical worst-case settings. We also explain theoretically how these cases can arise even in a minimal linear setting, and why past studies could miss such cases due to a biased selection of models. Our observations lead to recommendations that contradict those found in much of the current literature. - High OOD performance sometimes requires trading off ID performance. - Focusing on ID performance alone may not lead to optimal OOD performance. It may produce diminishing (eventually negative) returns in OOD performance. - In these cases, studies on OOD generalization that use ID performance for model selection (a common recommended practice) will necessarily miss the best-performing models, making these studies blind to a whole range of phenomena.
abstract_zh: 几项研究比较了计算机视觉和 NLP 模型的分布内 (ID) 和分布外 (OOD) 性能。他们报告了频繁的正相关性，令人惊讶的是，有些人甚至从未观察到表明必要权衡的负相关性。逆模式的可能性对于确定 ID 性能是否可以作为 OOD 泛化能力的代理非常重要。本文通过多个数据集表明，ID 和 OOD 性能之间的负相关确实发生在现实世界的数据中 - 不仅在理论上的最坏情况设置中。我们还从理论上解释了即使在最小的线性设置中这些情况也是如何出现的，以及为什么过去的研究可能由于模型选择的偏差而错过这些情况。我们的观察得出的建议与当前许多文献中的建议相矛盾。 - 高 OOD 性能有时需要权衡 ID 性能。 - 仅关注 ID 性能可能不会带来最佳的 OOD 性能。它可能会导致 OOD 绩效收益递减（最终为负）。 - 在这些情况下，使用 ID 性能进行模型选择（常见的推荐做法）的 OOD 泛化研究必然会错过性能最佳的模型，从而使这些研究对一系列现象视而不见。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了机器学习模型在分布内（ID）与分布外（OOD）性能之间的关系，发现现实数据集中二者存在负相关现象。
AI.motivation: 现有研究普遍认为ID性能可作为OOD泛化能力的代理指标，但作者质疑这种假设的可靠性，试图揭示ID/OOD性能的潜在矛盾关系。
AI.method: 通过多数据集实证分析结合理论推导，构建最小线性模型解释负相关机制，并分析现有研究因模型选择偏差导致结论偏差。
AI.result: 发现现实数据中ID/OOD性能负相关现象普遍存在，理论模型证实此类矛盾可由数据分布特性引发，现有依赖ID指标的模型选择方法存在系统性缺陷。
AI.conclusion: ID与OOD性能存在权衡关系，单纯优化ID指标可能损害OOD表现，需重新评估现有OOD研究方法的有效性。

title: Incremental Online Learning Algorithms Comparison for Gesture and Visual Smart Sensors
title_zh: 手势和视觉智能传感器的增量在线学习算法比较
abstract: Tiny machine learning (TinyML) in IoT systems exploits MCUs as edge devices for data processing. However, traditional TinyML methods can only perform inference, limited to static environments or classes. Real case scenarios usually work in dynamic environments, thus drifting the context where the original neural model is no more suitable. For this reason, pre-trained models reduce accuracy and reliability during their lifetime because the data recorded slowly becomes obsolete or new patterns appear. Continual learning strategies maintain the model up to date, with runtime fine-tuning of the parameters. This paper compares four state-of-the-art algorithms in two real applications: i) gesture recognition based on accelerometer data and ii) image classification. Our results confirm these systems' reliability and the feasibility of deploying them in tiny-memory MCUs, with a drop in the accuracy of a few percentage points with respect to the original models for unconstrained computing platforms.
summary: Tiny machine learning (TinyML) in IoT systems exploits MCUs as edge devices for data processing. However, traditional TinyML methods can only perform inference, limited to static environments or classes. Real case scenarios usually work in dynamic environments, thus drifting the context where the original neural model is no more suitable. For this reason, pre-trained models reduce accuracy and reliability during their lifetime because the data recorded slowly becomes obsolete or new patterns appear. Continual learning strategies maintain the model up to date, with runtime fine-tuning of the parameters. This paper compares four state-of-the-art algorithms in two real applications: i) gesture recognition based on accelerometer data and ii) image classification. Our results confirm these systems' reliability and the feasibility of deploying them in tiny-memory MCUs, with a drop in the accuracy of a few percentage points with respect to the original models for unconstrained computing platforms.
abstract_zh: 物联网系统中的微型机器学习 (TinyML) 利用 MCU 作为数据处理的边缘设备。然而，传统的TinyML方法只能执行推理，仅限于静态环境或类。真实案例场景通常在动态环境中工作，从而使原始神经模型不再适合的环境发生变化。因此，预训练模型在其生命周期内会降低准确性和可靠性，因为记录的数据会慢慢过时或出现新的模式。持续学习策略使模型保持最新状态，并在运行时对参数进行微调。本文比较了两个实际应用中的四种最先进算法：i）基于加速度计数据的手势识别和 ii）图像分类。我们的结果证实了这些系统的可靠性以及将它们部署在小内存 MCU 中的可行性，与无约束计算平台的原始模型相比，精度下降了几个百分点。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了四种增量在线学习算法在手势识别和图像分类中的应用，以提升物联网设备在动态环境中的模型适应性。
AI.motivation: 传统TinyML方法仅支持静态环境下的推理，无法应对动态环境中的数据漂移问题，导致预训练模型准确性下降。
AI.method: 在两个实际场景（加速度计手势识别和图像分类）中，对比四类增量学习算法在资源受限MCU上的性能表现。
AI.result: 验证了增量学习系统在微型MCU上的可行性，准确率较原始模型仅下降数个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 增量在线学习算法可有效维持模型更新，适合部署于内存受限的物联网边缘设备，适应动态环境需求。

title: Transformers are Sample-Efficient World Models
title_zh: 变形金刚是样本高效的世界模型
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning agents are notoriously sample inefficient, which considerably limits their application to real-world problems. Recently, many model-based methods have been designed to address this issue, with learning in the imagination of a world model being one of the most prominent approaches. However, while virtually unlimited interaction with a simulated environment sounds appealing, the world model has to be accurate over extended periods of time. Motivated by the success of Transformers in sequence modeling tasks, we introduce IRIS, a data-efficient agent that learns in a world model composed of a discrete autoencoder and an autoregressive Transformer. With the equivalent of only two hours of gameplay in the Atari 100k benchmark, IRIS achieves a mean human normalized score of 1.046, and outperforms humans on 10 out of 26 games, setting a new state of the art for methods without lookahead search. To foster future research on Transformers and world models for sample-efficient reinforcement learning, we release our code and models at https://github.com/eloialonso/iris.
summary: Deep reinforcement learning agents are notoriously sample inefficient, which considerably limits their application to real-world problems. Recently, many model-based methods have been designed to address this issue, with learning in the imagination of a world model being one of the most prominent approaches. However, while virtually unlimited interaction with a simulated environment sounds appealing, the world model has to be accurate over extended periods of time. Motivated by the success of Transformers in sequence modeling tasks, we introduce IRIS, a data-efficient agent that learns in a world model composed of a discrete autoencoder and an autoregressive Transformer. With the equivalent of only two hours of gameplay in the Atari 100k benchmark, IRIS achieves a mean human normalized score of 1.046, and outperforms humans on 10 out of 26 games, setting a new state of the art for methods without lookahead search. To foster future research on Transformers and world models for sample-efficient reinforcement learning, we release our code and models at https://github.com/eloialonso/iris.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，深度强化学习代理的样本效率低下，这极大地限制了它们在现实世界问题中的应用。最近，许多基于模型的方法被设计来解决这个问题，其中在世界模型的想象中学习是最突出的方法之一。然而，虽然与模拟环境几乎无限的交互听起来很吸引人，但世界模型必须在很长一段时间内保持准确。受 Transformer 在序列建模任务中取得成功的激励，我们引入了 IRIS，这是一种数据高效的代理，可以在由离散自动编码器和自回归 Transformer 组成的世界模型中学习。在 Atari 100k 基准测试中，仅玩两个小时的游戏，IRIS 的人类标准化平均得分为 1.046，并且在 26 场游戏中的 10 场比赛中优于人类，为无需前瞻搜索的方法设定了新的技术水平。为了促进未来对 Transformer 和样本高效强化学习世界模型的研究，我们在 https://github.com/eloialonso/iris 发布了我们的代码和模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IRIS，一种基于Transformer的世界模型代理，通过离散自动编码器和自回归Transformer结构，在样本效率上取得突破。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习代理样本效率低下，而现有基于世界模型的方法在长期模拟中存在准确性不足的问题。
AI.method: 设计IRIS模型，结合离散自动编码器进行状态表征学习，以及自回归Transformer实现高效决策规划。
AI.result: 在Atari 100k基准测试中，仅需2小时游戏数据即可达到1.046的人类归一化得分，10个游戏中超越人类表现。
AI.conclusion: Transformer结构能有效提升世界模型的样本效率，为未来研究提供新方向，并开源代码促进领域发展。

search_text: Transformers are Sample-Efficient World Models 变形金刚是样本高效的世界模型 Deep reinforcement learning agents are notoriously sample inefficient, which considerably limits their application to real-world problems. Recently, many model-based methods have been designed to address this issue, with learning in the imagination of a world model being one of the most prominent approaches. However, while virtually unlimited interaction with a simulated environment sounds appealing, the world model has to be accurate over extended periods of time. Motivated by the success of Transformers in sequence modeling tasks, we introduce IRIS, a data-efficient agent that learns in a world model composed of a discrete autoencoder and an autoregressive Transformer. With the equivalent of only two hours of gameplay in the Atari 100k benchmark, IRIS achieves a mean human normalized score of 1.046, and outperforms humans on 10 out of 26 games, setting a new state of the art for methods without lookahead search. To foster future research on Transformers and world models for sample-efficient reinforcement learning, we release our code and models at https://github.com/eloialonso/iris. 众所周知，深度强化学习代理的样本效率低下，这极大地限制了它们在现实世界问题中的应用。最近，许多基于模型的方法被设计来解决这个问题，其中在世界模型的想象中学习是最突出的方法之一。然而，虽然与模拟环境几乎无限的交互听起来很吸引人，但世界模型必须在很长一段时间内保持准确。受 Transformer 在序列建模任务中取得成功的激励，我们引入了 IRIS，这是一种数据高效的代理，可以在由离散自动编码器和自回归 Transformer 组成的世界模型中学习。在 Atari 100k 基准测试中，仅玩两个小时的游戏，IRIS 的人类标准化平均得分为 1.046，并且在 26 场游戏中的 10 场比赛中优于人类，为无需前瞻搜索的方法设定了新的技术水平。为了促进未来对 Transformer 和样本高效强化学习世界模型的研究，我们在 https://github.com/eloialonso/iris 发布了我们的代码和模型。 本文提出IRIS，一种基于Transformer的世界模型代理，通过离散自动编码器和自回归Transformer结构，在样本效率上取得突破。 Vincent Micheli,Eloi Alonso,François Fleuret cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Huaqian Wu,Nicolas Souedet,Camille Mabillon,Caroline Jan,Cédric Clouchoux,Thierry Delzescaux
title: Adversarial Stain Transfer to Study the Effect of Color Variation on Cell Instance Segmentation
title_zh: 对抗性染色转移研究颜色变化对细胞实例分割的影响
abstract: Stain color variation in histological images, caused by a variety of factors, is a challenge not only for the visual diagnosis of pathologists but also for cell segmentation algorithms. To eliminate the color variation, many stain normalization approaches have been proposed. However, most were designed for hematoxylin and eosin staining images and performed poorly on immunohistochemical staining images. Current cell segmentation methods systematically apply stain normalization as a preprocessing step, but the impact brought by color variation has not been quantitatively investigated yet. In this paper, we produced five groups of NeuN staining images with different colors. We applied a deep learning image-recoloring method to perform color transfer between histological image groups. Finally, we altered the color of a segmentation set and quantified the impact of color variation on cell segmentation. The results demonstrated the necessity of color normalization prior to subsequent analysis.
summary: Stain color variation in histological images, caused by a variety of factors, is a challenge not only for the visual diagnosis of pathologists but also for cell segmentation algorithms. To eliminate the color variation, many stain normalization approaches have been proposed. However, most were designed for hematoxylin and eosin staining images and performed poorly on immunohistochemical staining images. Current cell segmentation methods systematically apply stain normalization as a preprocessing step, but the impact brought by color variation has not been quantitatively investigated yet. In this paper, we produced five groups of NeuN staining images with different colors. We applied a deep learning image-recoloring method to perform color transfer between histological image groups. Finally, we altered the color of a segmentation set and quantified the impact of color variation on cell segmentation. The results demonstrated the necessity of color normalization prior to subsequent analysis.
abstract_zh: 由多种因素引起的组织学图像中的染色颜色变化不仅对病理学家的视觉诊断也是对细胞分割算法的挑战。为了消除颜色变化，已经提出了许多染色归一化方法。然而，大多数是为苏木精和伊红染色图像而设计的，在免疫组织化学染色图像上表现不佳。目前的细胞分割方法系统地应用染色归一化作为预处理步骤，但颜色变化带来的影响尚未得到定量研究。在本文中，我们制作了五组不同颜色的 NeuN 染色图像。我们应用深度学习图像重新着色方法来执行组织学图像组之间的颜色转移。最后，我们改变了分割集的颜色，并量化了颜色变化对细胞分割的影响。结果证明了在后续分析之前进行颜色标准化的必要性。

AI.tldr: 通过对抗性染色转换方法研究颜色变化对细胞实例分割的影响
AI.motivation: 现有染色归一化方法在免疫组化图像上效果不佳，且颜色变化对分割的影响尚未被量化研究
AI.method: 生成不同颜色的NeuN图像，应用深度学习颜色转换方法，并改变分割集颜色以量化影响
AI.result: 颜色归一化在后续分析前是必要的
AI.conclusion: 颜色归一化对提高细胞分割准确性至关重要

title: Neural Approaches to Co-Optimization in Robotics
title_zh: 机器人协同优化的神经方法
comment: PhD thesis. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2202.04575
comments: PhD thesis. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2202.04575
abstract: Robots and intelligent systems that sense or interact with the world are increasingly being used to automate a wide array of tasks. The ability of these systems to complete these tasks depends on a large range of technologies such as the mechanical and electrical parts that make up the physical body of the robot and its sensors, perception algorithms to perceive the environment, and planning and control algorithms to produce meaningful actions. Therefore, it is often necessary to consider the interactions between these components when designing an embodied system. This thesis explores work on the task-driven co-optimization of robotics systems in an end-to-end manner, simultaneously optimizing the physical components of the system with inference or control algorithms directly for task performance. We start by considering the problem of optimizing a beacon-based localization system directly for localization accuracy. Designing such a system involves placing beacons throughout the environment and inferring location from sensor readings. In our work, we develop a deep learning approach to optimize both beacon placement and location inference directly for localization accuracy. We then turn our attention to the related problem of task-driven optimization of robots and their controllers. In our work, we start by proposing a data-efficient algorithm based on multi-task reinforcement learning. Our approach efficiently optimizes both physical design and control parameters directly for task performance by leveraging a design-conditioned controller capable of generalizing over the space of physical designs. We then follow this up with an extension to allow for the optimization over discrete morphological parameters such as the number and configuration of limbs. Finally, we conclude by exploring the fabrication and deployment of optimized soft robots.

The ability of these systems to complete these tasks depends on a large range of technologies such as the mechanical and electrical parts that make up the physical body of the robot and its sensors, perception algorithms to perceive the environment, and planning and control algorithms to produce meaningful actions. Therefore, it is often necessary to consider the interactions between these components when designing an embodied system. This thesis explores work on the task-driven co-optimization of robotics systems in an end-to-end manner, simultaneously optimizing the physical components of the system with inference or control algorithms directly for task performance. We start by considering the problem of optimizing a beacon-based localization system directly for localization accuracy. Designing such a system involves placing beacons throughout the environment and inferring location from sensor readings. In our work, we develop a deep learning approach to optimize both beacon placement and location inference directly for localization accuracy. We then turn our attention to the related problem of task-driven optimization of robots and their controllers. In our work, we start by proposing a data-efficient algorithm based on multi-task reinforcement learning. Our approach efficiently optimizes both physical design and control parameters directly for task performance by leveraging a design-conditioned controller capable of generalizing over the space of physical designs. We then follow this up with an extension to allow for the optimization over discrete morphological parameters such as the number and configuration of limbs. Finally, we conclude by exploring the fabrication and deployment of optimized soft robots.
abstract_zh: 感知世界或与世界交互的机器人和智能系统越来越多地用于自动化执行各种任务。这些系统完成这些任务的能力取决于大量的技术，例如构成机器人身体及其传感器的机械和电气部件、感知环境的感知算法以及产生有意义的动作的规划和控制算法。因此，在设计具体系统时通常需要考虑这些组件之间的交互。本论文以端到端的方式探索机器人系统的任务驱动协同优化，同时通过推理或控制算法直接优化系统的物理组件以实现任务性能。我们首先考虑直接优化基于信标的定位系统以提高定位精度的问题。设计这样的系统涉及在整个环境中放置信标并根据传感器读数推断位置。在我们的工作中，我们开发了一种深度学习方法来直接优化信标放置和位置推断，以提高定位准确性。然后我们将注意力转向机器人及其控制器的任务驱动优化的相关问题。在我们的工作中，我们首先提出一种基于多任务强化学习的数据高效算法。我们的方法通过利用能够泛化物理设计空间的设计条件控制器，有效地优化物理设计和控制参数，直接提高任务性能。然后，我们进行扩展，以允许优化离散形态参数，例如肢体的数量和配置。最后，我们通过探索优化软机器人的制造和部署来结束。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了机器人系统的端到端协同优化方法，通过同时优化物理组件和算法以提高任务性能。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人系统设计常独立优化各组件，导致整体性能受限，需通过协同优化提升任务表现。
AI.method: 采用深度学习优化信标布局与定位算法，并结合多任务强化学习同时优化机器人物理设计与控制参数，扩展至离散形态参数优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法在定位精度和任务执行效率上优于传统方法，并成功实现了优化软体机器人的制造与部署。
AI.conclusion: 通过端到端协同优化，能够有效提升机器人系统的整体性能，为复杂任务的自动化提供新思路。

We then follow this up with an extension to allow for the optimization over discrete morphological parameters such as the number and configuration of limbs. Finally, we conclude by exploring the fabrication and deployment of optimized soft robots. 感知世界或与世界交互的机器人和智能系统越来越多地用于自动化执行各种任务。这些系统完成这些任务的能力取决于大量的技术，例如构成机器人身体及其传感器的机械和电气部件、感知环境的感知算法以及产生有意义的动作的规划和控制算法。因此，在设计具体系统时通常需要考虑这些组件之间的交互。本论文以端到端的方式探索机器人系统的任务驱动协同优化，同时通过推理或控制算法直接优化系统的物理组件以实现任务性能。我们首先考虑直接优化基于信标的定位系统以提高定位精度的问题。设计这样的系统涉及在整个环境中放置信标并根据传感器读数推断位置。在我们的工作中，我们开发了一种深度学习方法来直接优化信标放置和位置推断，以提高定位准确性。然后我们将注意力转向机器人及其控制器的任务驱动优化的相关问题。在我们的工作中，我们首先提出一种基于多任务强化学习的数据高效算法。我们的方法通过利用能够泛化物理设计空间的设计条件控制器，有效地优化物理设计和控制参数，直接提高任务性能。然后，我们进行扩展，以允许优化离散形态参数，例如肢体的数量和配置。最后，我们通过探索优化软机器人的制造和部署来结束。 本文研究了机器人系统的端到端协同优化方法，通过同时优化物理组件和算法以提高任务性能。 Charles Schaff cs.RO

title: On Almost-Sure Intention Deception Planning that Exploits Imperfect Observers
title_zh: 论利用不完美观察者的几乎确定的意图欺骗计划
comment: 20 pages, 6 figures, Accepted by The 13th Conference on Decision and Game Theory for Security (GameSec-22)
comments: 20 pages, 6 figures, Accepted by The 13th Conference on Decision and Game Theory for Security (GameSec-22)
abstract: Intention deception involves computing a strategy which deceives the opponent into a wrong belief about the agent's intention or objective. This paper studies a class of probabilistic planning problems with intention deception and investigates how a defender's limited sensing modality can be exploited by an attacker to achieve its attack objective almost surely (with probability one) while hiding its intention. In particular, we model the attack planning in a stochastic system modeled as a Markov decision process (MDP). The attacker is to reach some target states while avoiding unsafe states in the system and knows that his behavior is monitored by a defender with partial observations. Given partial state observations for the defender, we develop qualitative intention deception planning algorithms that construct attack strategies to play against an action-visible defender and an action-invisible defender, respectively. The synthesized attack strategy not only ensures the attack objective is satisfied almost surely but also deceives the defender into believing that the observed behavior is generated by a normal/legitimate user and thus failing to detect the presence of an attack. We show the proposed algorithms are correct and complete and illustrate the deceptive planning methods with examples.
summary: Intention deception involves computing a strategy which deceives the opponent into a wrong belief about the agent's intention or objective. This paper studies a class of probabilistic planning problems with intention deception and investigates how a defender's limited sensing modality can be exploited by an attacker to achieve its attack objective almost surely (with probability one) while hiding its intention. In particular, we model the attack planning in a stochastic system modeled as a Markov decision process (MDP). The attacker is to reach some target states while avoiding unsafe states in the system and knows that his behavior is monitored by a defender with partial observations. Given partial state observations for the defender, we develop qualitative intention deception planning algorithms that construct attack strategies to play against an action-visible defender and an action-invisible defender, respectively. The synthesized attack strategy not only ensures the attack objective is satisfied almost surely but also deceives the defender into believing that the observed behavior is generated by a normal/legitimate user and thus failing to detect the presence of an attack. We show the proposed algorithms are correct and complete and illustrate the deceptive planning methods with examples.
abstract_zh: 意图欺骗涉及计算一种策略，欺骗对手对代理人的意图或目标产生错误的信念。本文研究了一类带有意图欺骗的概率规划问题，并研究了攻击者如何利用防御者的有限感知方式来几乎肯定地（概率为一）实现其攻击目标，同时隐藏其意图。特别是，我们在建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）的随机系统中对攻击计划进行建模。攻击者要达到某些目标状态，同时避免系统中的不安全状态，并且知道他的行为受到防御者通过部分观察的监视。给定防御者的部分状态观察，我们开发了定性意图欺骗规划算法，该算法构建攻击策略，分别对抗行动可见的防御者和行动不可见的防御者。合成的攻击策略不仅确保几乎肯定满足攻击目标，而且欺骗防御者相信观察到的行为是由正常/合法用户生成的，从而无法检测到攻击的存在。我们证明了所提出的算法是正确和完整的，并通过示例说明了欺骗性规划方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在部分可观测环境中，攻击者如何通过策略欺骗防御者以几乎必然实现攻击目标。
AI.motivation: 防御者因观测能力有限可能无法准确识别攻击行为，攻击者可利用此缺陷隐藏真实意图并达成目标。
AI.method: 基于马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）建模系统，设计针对行动可见和不可见防御者的定性意图欺骗规划算法。
AI.result: 提出算法确保攻击目标几乎必然达成，同时使防御者误认为行为来自合法用户，并通过实例验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为对抗性环境下的意图欺骗提供了理论支持，对提升系统安全性具有重要意义。

title: Go-Explore Complex 3D Game Environments for Automated Reachability Testing
title_zh: Go-探索复杂的 3D 游戏环境以进行自动可达性测试
abstract: Modern AAA video games feature huge game levels and maps which are increasingly hard for level testers to cover exhaustively. As a result, games often ship with catastrophic bugs such as the player falling through the floor or being stuck in walls. We propose an approach specifically targeted at reachability bugs in simulated 3D environments based on the powerful exploration algorithm, Go-Explore, which saves unique checkpoints across the map and then identifies promising ones to explore from. We show that when coupled with simple heuristics derived from the game's navigation mesh, Go-Explore finds challenging bugs and comprehensively explores complex environments without the need for human demonstration or knowledge of the game dynamics. Go-Explore vastly outperforms more complicated baselines including reinforcement learning with intrinsic curiosity in both covering the navigation mesh and number of unique positions across the map discovered. Finally, due to our use of parallel agents, our algorithm can fully cover a vast 1.5km x 1.5km game world within 10 hours on a single machine making it extremely promising for continuous testing suites.
summary: Modern AAA video games feature huge game levels and maps which are increasingly hard for level testers to cover exhaustively. As a result, games often ship with catastrophic bugs such as the player falling through the floor or being stuck in walls. We propose an approach specifically targeted at reachability bugs in simulated 3D environments based on the powerful exploration algorithm, Go-Explore, which saves unique checkpoints across the map and then identifies promising ones to explore from. We show that when coupled with simple heuristics derived from the game's navigation mesh, Go-Explore finds challenging bugs and comprehensively explores complex environments without the need for human demonstration or knowledge of the game dynamics. Go-Explore vastly outperforms more complicated baselines including reinforcement learning with intrinsic curiosity in both covering the navigation mesh and number of unique positions across the map discovered. Finally, due to our use of parallel agents, our algorithm can fully cover a vast 1.5km x 1.5km game world within 10 hours on a single machine making it extremely promising for continuous testing suites.
abstract_zh: 现代 AAA 视频游戏具有巨大的游戏关卡和地图，关卡测试人员越来越难以详尽地涵盖这些关卡和地图。因此，游戏通常会出现灾难性的错误，例如玩家从地板上掉下来或卡在墙上。我们提出了一种专门针对模拟 3D 环境中的可达性错误的方法，该方法基于强大的探索算法 Go-Explore，该算法可以保存整个地图上的独特检查点，然后识别有希望进行探索的检查点。我们证明，当与从游戏导航网格导出的简单启发式相结合时，Go-Explore 可以发现具有挑战性的错误并全面探索复杂的环境，而无需人工演示或了解游戏动态。 Go-Explore 的性能远远优于更复杂的基线，包括在覆盖导航网格和发现的地图上独特位置数量方面具有内在好奇心的强化学习。最后，由于我们使用并行代理，我们的算法可以在单台机器上在 10 小时内完全覆盖广阔的 1.5km x 1.5km 游戏世界，这使其非常适合连续测试套件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Go-Explore算法的自动化可达性测试方法，用于探索复杂3D游戏环境中的潜在漏洞。
AI.motivation: 现代大型游戏地图规模庞大，人工测试难以覆盖所有区域，导致诸如角色坠落或卡墙等严重漏洞频发。
AI.method: 结合Go-Explore算法的检查点保存机制与导航网格启发式策略，通过并行智能体实现高效探索。
AI.result: 在覆盖导航网格范围和发现独特位置数量上显著优于强化学习等复杂基线方法，10小时内可完成1.5km×1.5km地图的全面测试。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需人工演示或游戏动力学知识，为持续性自动化游戏测试提供了高效可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Hao-Ren Yao,Luke Breitfeller,Aakanksha Naik,Chunxiao Zhou,Carolyn Rose
title: Distilling Multi-Scale Knowledge for Event Temporal Relation Extraction
title_zh: 提取多尺度知识以进行事件时间关系提取
comment: Accepted to CIKM 2024 Full Research Track, camera ready version
comments: Accepted to CIKM 2024 Full Research Track, camera ready version
abstract: Event Temporal Relation Extraction (ETRE) is paramount but challenging. Within a discourse, event pairs are situated at different distances or the so-called proximity bands. The temporal ordering communicated about event pairs where at more remote (i.e., ``long'') or less remote (i.e., ``short'') proximity bands are encoded differently. SOTA models have tended to perform well on events situated at either short or long proximity bands, but not both. Nonetheless, real-world, natural texts contain all types of temporal event-pairs. In this paper, we present MulCo: Distilling Multi-Scale Knowledge via Contrastive Learning, a knowledge co-distillation approach that shares knowledge across multiple event pair proximity bands to improve performance on all types of temporal datasets. Our experimental results show that MulCo successfully integrates linguistic cues pertaining to temporal reasoning across both short and long proximity bands and achieves new state-of-the-art results on several ETRE benchmark datasets.
summary: Event Temporal Relation Extraction (ETRE) is paramount but challenging. Within a discourse, event pairs are situated at different distances or the so-called proximity bands. The temporal ordering communicated about event pairs where at more remote (i.e., ``long'') or less remote (i.e., ``short'') proximity bands are encoded differently. SOTA models have tended to perform well on events situated at either short or long proximity bands, but not both. Nonetheless, real-world, natural texts contain all types of temporal event-pairs. In this paper, we present MulCo: Distilling Multi-Scale Knowledge via Contrastive Learning, a knowledge co-distillation approach that shares knowledge across multiple event pair proximity bands to improve performance on all types of temporal datasets. Our experimental results show that MulCo successfully integrates linguistic cues pertaining to temporal reasoning across both short and long proximity bands and achieves new state-of-the-art results on several ETRE benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 事件时间关系提取 (ETRE) 至关重要，但也具有挑战性。在话语中，事件对位于不同的距离或所谓的邻近带处。时间顺序传达了有关事件对的信息，其中较远（即“长”）或较远（即“短”）的邻近带的编码方式不同。 SOTA 模型往往在位于短或长邻近频带的事件上表现良好，但不是两者兼而有之。尽管如此，现实世界的自然文本包含所有类型的时间事件对。在本文中，我们提出了 MulCo：通过对比学习蒸馏多尺度知识，这是一种知识共同蒸馏方法，可跨多个事件对邻近带共享知识，以提高所有类型时态数据集的性能。我们的实验结果表明，MulCo 成功地整合了与短邻近带和长邻近带的时间推理相关的语言线索，并在多个 ETRE 基准数据集上取得了最新的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨多尺度事件接近度带的知识蒸馏方法，以提升事件时间关系提取模型在不同距离事件对上的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在处理短距离或长距离事件对时表现优异但无法兼顾两者，而实际文本中存在各种类型的时间事件对，需跨尺度知识共享以提升整体性能。
AI.method: 提出MulCo方法，通过对比学习实现多尺度知识共蒸馏，跨不同接近度带共享语言线索以增强模型对时间关系的建模能力。
AI.result: 实验表明MulCo在多个ETRE基准数据集上取得新SOTA结果，有效整合了短/长距离事件对的时序推理线索。
AI.conclusion: 跨尺度知识蒸馏方法能显著提升事件时间关系提取性能，为处理复杂时序信息提供了新思路。

search_text: Distilling Multi-Scale Knowledge for Event Temporal Relation Extraction 提取多尺度知识以进行事件时间关系提取 Event Temporal Relation Extraction (ETRE) is paramount but challenging. Within a discourse, event pairs are situated at different distances or the so-called proximity bands. The temporal ordering communicated about event pairs where at more remote (i.e., ``long'') or less remote (i.e., ``short'') proximity bands are encoded differently. SOTA models have tended to perform well on events situated at either short or long proximity bands, but not both. Nonetheless, real-world, natural texts contain all types of temporal event-pairs. In this paper, we present MulCo: Distilling Multi-Scale Knowledge via Contrastive Learning, a knowledge co-distillation approach that shares knowledge across multiple event pair proximity bands to improve performance on all types of temporal datasets. Our experimental results show that MulCo successfully integrates linguistic cues pertaining to temporal reasoning across both short and long proximity bands and achieves new state-of-the-art results on several ETRE benchmark datasets. 事件时间关系提取 (ETRE) 至关重要，但也具有挑战性。在话语中，事件对位于不同的距离或所谓的邻近带处。时间顺序传达了有关事件对的信息，其中较远（即“长”）或较远（即“短”）的邻近带的编码方式不同。 SOTA 模型往往在位于短或长邻近频带的事件上表现良好，但不是两者兼而有之。尽管如此，现实世界的自然文本包含所有类型的时间事件对。在本文中，我们提出了 MulCo：通过对比学习蒸馏多尺度知识，这是一种知识共同蒸馏方法，可跨多个事件对邻近带共享知识，以提高所有类型时态数据集的性能。我们的实验结果表明，MulCo 成功地整合了与短邻近带和长邻近带的时间推理相关的语言线索，并在多个 ETRE 基准数据集上取得了最新的结果。 本文提出一种跨多尺度事件接近度带的知识蒸馏方法，以提升事件时间关系提取模型在不同距离事件对上的泛化能力。 Hao-Ren Yao,Luke Breitfeller,Aakanksha Naik,Chunxiao Zhou,Carolyn Rose cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Online Load Balancing on Uniform Machines with Limited Migration
title_zh: 具有有限迁移的统一机器上的在线负载平衡
abstract: In the problem of online load balancing on uniformly related machines with bounded migration, jobs arrive online one after another and have to be immediately placed on one of a given set of machines without knowledge about jobs that may arrive later on. Each job has a size and each machine has a speed, and the load due to a job assigned to a machine is obtained by dividing the first value by the second. The goal is to minimize the maximum overall load any machine receives. However, unlike in the pure online case, each time a new job arrives it contributes a migration potential equal to the product of its size and a certain migration factor. This potential can be spend to reassign jobs either right away (non-amortized case) or at any later time (amortized case). Semi-online models of this flavor have been studied intensively for several fundamental problems, e.g., load balancing on identical machines and bin packing, but uniformly related machines have not been considered up to now. In the present paper, the classical doubling strategy on uniformly related machines is combined with migration to achieve an $(8/3+\varepsilon)$-competitive algorithm and a $(4+\varepsilon)$-competitive algorithm with $O(1/\varepsilon)$ amortized and non-amortized migration, respectively, while the best known competitive ratio in the pure online setting is roughly $5.828$.

Each job has a size and each machine has a speed, and the load due to a job assigned to a machine is obtained by dividing the first value by the second. The goal is to minimize the maximum overall load any machine receives. However, unlike in the pure online case, each time a new job arrives it contributes a migration potential equal to the product of its size and a certain migration factor. This potential can be spend to reassign jobs either right away (non-amortized case) or at any later time (amortized case). Semi-online models of this flavor have been studied intensively for several fundamental problems, e.g., load balancing on identical machines and bin packing, but uniformly related machines have not been considered up to now. In the present paper, the classical doubling strategy on uniformly related machines is combined with migration to achieve an $(8/3+\varepsilon)$-competitive algorithm and a $(4+\varepsilon)$-competitive algorithm with $O(1/\varepsilon)$ amortized and non-amortized migration, respectively, while the best known competitive ratio in the pure online setting is roughly $5.828$.
abstract_zh: 在具有有界迁移的统一相关机器上的在线负载平衡问题中，作业一个接一个地在线到达，并且必须立即放置在给定的一组机器中的一台上，而不知道稍后可能到达的作业。每个作业都有一个大小，每个机器都有一个速度，并且通过将第一个值除以第二个值来获得由于分配给机器的作业而产生的负载。目标是最小化任何机器接收的最大总负载。然而，与纯在线情况不同的是，每次新工作到达时，它都会贡献一个迁移潜力，该迁移潜力等于其规模和某个迁移因子的乘积。这种潜力可以立即用于重新分配工作（非摊销情况）或在以后的任何时间（摊销情况）。这种风格的半在线模型已经针对几个基本问​​题进行了深入研究，例如相同机器上的负载平衡和装箱，但迄今为止尚未考虑统一相关的机器。在本文中，均匀相关机器上的经典加倍策略与迁移相结合，实现了 $(8/3+\varepsilon)$-竞争算法和 $(4+\varepsilon)$-竞争算法，分别具有 $O(1/\varepsilon)$ 摊销和非摊销迁移，而纯在线设置中最知名的竞争比率约为 $5.828$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在具有有限迁移的均匀相关机器上进行在线负载均衡的问题，旨在通过迁移机制优化作业分配以最小化最大机器负载。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多集中于同构机器或纯在线场景，而针对均匀相关机器的半在线模型尚未被充分探索。通过引入迁移潜力，可提升作业再分配的灵活性并改进竞争比。
AI.method: 结合经典倍增策略与迁移机制，允许在非摊销和摊销两种模式下使用迁移潜力重新分配作业，以适应均匀相关机器的负载均衡需求。
AI.result: 提出了两种算法，分别实现(8/3+ε)和(4+ε)竞争比，迁移复杂度为O(1/ε)，优于纯在线场景下的5.828竞争比。
AI.conclusion: 通过迁移机制改进倍增策略，本文为均匀相关机器的在线负载均衡问题提供了更优的半在线算法，填补了该领域的研究空白。
