We examine our hypothesis in the book recommendation case on a commonly used dataset with book ratings. We enrich it with author information using publicly available external sources. We find that popular books are mainly written by US citizens in the dataset, and that these books tend to be recommended disproportionally by popular collaborative filtering algorithms compared to the users' profiles. We conclude that the societal implications of popularity bias should be further examined by the scholar community. 协同过滤算法的优点是不需要敏感的用户或项目信息来提供推荐。然而，他们仍然面临与公平相关的问题，比如受欢迎程度偏见。在这项工作中，我们认为流行度偏差通常会导致其他偏差，而当未向研究人员提供额外的用户或项目信息时，这些偏差并不明显。我们在带有图书评级的常用数据集的图书推荐案例中检验了我们的假设。我们使用公开的外部资源来丰富作者信息。我们发现数据集中的热门书籍主要是由美国公民撰写的，并且与用户的个人资料相比，这些书籍往往受到流行的协同过滤算法的不成比例的推荐。我们的结论是，学术界应该进一步研究流行偏见的社会影响。 研究协同过滤算法在书籍推荐中因流行度偏差导致的隐藏作者偏见问题 Savvina Daniil,Mirjam Cuper,Cynthia C. S. Liem,Jacco van Ossenbruggen,Laura Hollink cs.IR,cs.AI

title: Diameter Minimization by Shortcutting with Degree Constraints
title_zh: 通过带度数约束的捷径最小化直径
comment: A shorter version of this work has been accepted at the IEEE ICDM 2022 conference
comments: A shorter version of this work has been accepted at the IEEE ICDM 2022 conference
abstract: We consider the problem of adding a fixed number of new edges to an undirected graph in order to minimize the diameter of the augmented graph, and under the constraint that the number of edges added for each vertex is bounded by an integer. The problem is motivated by network-design applications, where we want to minimize the worst case communication in the network without excessively increasing the degree of any single vertex, so as to avoid additional overload. We present three algorithms for this task, each with their own merits. The special case of a matching augmentation, when every vertex can be incident to at most one new edge, is of particular interest, for which we show an inapproximability result, and provide bounds on the smallest achievable diameter when these edges are added to a path. Finally, we empirically evaluate and compare our algorithms on several real-life networks of varying types.
summary: We consider the problem of adding a fixed number of new edges to an undirected graph in order to minimize the diameter of the augmented graph, and under the constraint that the number of edges added for each vertex is bounded by an integer. The problem is motivated by network-design applications, where we want to minimize the worst case communication in the network without excessively increasing the degree of any single vertex, so as to avoid additional overload. We present three algorithms for this task, each with their own merits. The special case of a matching augmentation, when every vertex can be incident to at most one new edge, is of particular interest, for which we show an inapproximability result, and provide bounds on the smallest achievable diameter when these edges are added to a path. Finally, we empirically evaluate and compare our algorithms on several real-life networks of varying types.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑向无向图添加固定数量的新边以最小化增广图的直径的问题，并且在为每个顶点添加的边的数量受整数限制的约束下。这个问题是由网络设计应用程序引起的，我们希望在不过度增加任何单个顶点的度的情况下最大限度地减少网络中最坏情况的通信，以避免额外的过载。我们针对此任务提出了三种算法，每种算法都有自己的优点。当每个顶点最多可以关联到一条新边时，匹配增强的特殊情况特别令人感兴趣，对此我们显示了不可逼近性结果，并在将这些边添加到路径时提供了最小可实现直径的界限。最后，我们在几个不同类型的现实网络上对我们的算法进行实证评估和比较。

AI.tldr: 研究在度数约束下通过添加固定数量的边来最小化无向图直径的方法
AI.motivation: 在网络设计中，为了减少最坏情况下的通信延迟，同时避免单个节点的度数过高导致过载
AI.method: 提出三种算法，分别针对不同情况，特别关注匹配增强的不可近似性结果及直径下界分析
AI.result: 证明匹配增强的不可近似性，给出路径添加边后的直径下界，并通过实验比较算法效果
AI.conclusion: 在满足度数约束的条件下，提出有效减少图直径的算法，同时揭示匹配增强的理论限制

title: KoCHET: a Korean Cultural Heritage corpus for Entity-related Tasks
title_zh: KoCHET：用于实体相关任务的韩国文化遗产语料库
abstract: As digitized traditional cultural heritage documents have rapidly increased, resulting in an increased need for preservation and management, practical recognition of entities and typification of their classes has become essential. To achieve this, we propose KoCHET - a Korean cultural heritage corpus for the typical entity-related tasks, i.e., named entity recognition (NER), relation extraction (RE), and entity typing (ET). Advised by cultural heritage experts based on the data construction guidelines of government-affiliated organizations, KoCHET consists of respectively 112,362, 38,765, 113,198 examples for NER, RE, and ET tasks, covering all entity types related to Korean cultural heritage. Moreover, unlike the existing public corpora, modified redistribution can be allowed both domestic and foreign researchers. Our experimental results make the practical usability of KoCHET more valuable in terms of cultural heritage. We also provide practical insights of KoCHET in terms of statistical and linguistic analysis. Our corpus is freely available at https://github.com/Gyeongmin47/KoCHET.
summary: As digitized traditional cultural heritage documents have rapidly increased, resulting in an increased need for preservation and management, practical recognition of entities and typification of their classes has become essential. To achieve this, we propose KoCHET - a Korean cultural heritage corpus for the typical entity-related tasks, i.e., named entity recognition (NER), relation extraction (RE), and entity typing (ET). Advised by cultural heritage experts based on the data construction guidelines of government-affiliated organizations, KoCHET consists of respectively 112,362, 38,765, 113,198 examples for NER, RE, and ET tasks, covering all entity types related to Korean cultural heritage. Moreover, unlike the existing public corpora, modified redistribution can be allowed both domestic and foreign researchers. Our experimental results make the practical usability of KoCHET more valuable in terms of cultural heritage. We also provide practical insights of KoCHET in terms of statistical and linguistic analysis. Our corpus is freely available at https://github.com/Gyeongmin47/KoCHET.
abstract_zh: 随着数字化传统文化遗产文献的迅速增加，对保存和管理的需求不断增加，实体的实际识别和类别的典型化变得至关重要。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了 KoCHET - 一个韩国文化遗产语料库，用于典型的实体相关任务，即命名实体识别（NER）、关系提取（RE）和实体打字（ET）。 KoCHET 由文化遗产专家根据政府附属机构的数据构建指南提供建议，分别包含 112,362、38,765、113,198 个 NER、RE 和 ET 任务示例，涵盖与韩国文化遗产相关的所有实体类型。此外，与现有的公共语料库不同，国内外研究人员都可以进行修改后的重新分配。我们的实验结果使KoCHET的实用性在文化遗产方面更具价值。我们还提供 KoCHET 在统计和语言分析方面的实用见解。我们的语料库可在 https://github.com/Gyeongmin47/KoCHET 上免费获取。

AI.tldr: 构建用于实体相关任务的韩语文化遗产语料库KoCHET，支持命名实体识别、关系抽取和实体分类任务。
AI.motivation: 随着数字化传统文化遗产文档数量激增，亟需通过实体识别与分类实现有效保存与管理。
AI.method: 在文化遗产专家指导下，依据政府机构数据建设指南构建语料库，包含112,362个命名实体、38,765个关系及113,198个实体分类实例，并允许国内外研究者修改再分发。
AI.result: 实验验证了KoCHET在文化遗产领域的实用价值，同时提供了统计与语言学分析的深入见解。
AI.conclusion: KoCHET为韩语文化遗产实体相关任务提供了高质量且开放获取的基准数据集，具有重要研究与应用价值。

title: Identifying Out-of-Distribution Samples in Real-Time for Safety-Critical 2D Object Detection with Margin Entropy Loss
title_zh: 利用边缘熵损失实时识别分布外样本，以实现安全关键的 2D 物体检测
comment: 5 pages, 3 Figures, eccv 2022 - Workshop on Uncertainty Quantification for Computer Vision
comments: 5 pages, 3 Figures, eccv 2022 - Workshop on Uncertainty Quantification for Computer Vision
abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are nowadays often employed in vision-based perception stacks for safetycritical applications such as autonomous driving or Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). Due to the safety requirements in those use cases, it is important to know the limitations of the CNN and, thus, to detect Out-of-Distribution (OOD) samples. In this work, we present an approach to enable OOD detection for 2D object detection by employing the margin entropy (ME) loss. The proposed method is easy to implement and can be applied to most existing object detection architectures. In addition, we introduce Separability as a metric for detecting OOD samples in object detection. We show that a CNN trained with the ME loss significantly outperforms OOD detection using standard confidence scores. At the same time, the runtime of the underlying object detection framework remains constant rendering the ME loss a powerful tool to enable OOD detection.
summary: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are nowadays often employed in vision-based perception stacks for safetycritical applications such as autonomous driving or Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). Due to the safety requirements in those use cases, it is important to know the limitations of the CNN and, thus, to detect Out-of-Distribution (OOD) samples. In this work, we present an approach to enable OOD detection for 2D object detection by employing the margin entropy (ME) loss. The proposed method is easy to implement and can be applied to most existing object detection architectures. In addition, we introduce Separability as a metric for detecting OOD samples in object detection. We show that a CNN trained with the ME loss significantly outperforms OOD detection using standard confidence scores. At the same time, the runtime of the underlying object detection framework remains constant rendering the ME loss a powerful tool to enable OOD detection.
abstract_zh: 如今，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 通常用于基于视觉的感知堆栈，用于自动驾驶或无人机 (UAV) 等安全关键应用。由于这些用例中的安全要求，了解 CNN 的局限性并因此检测分布外 (OOD) 样本非常重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通过利用边缘熵 (ME) 损失来实现 2D 对象检测的 OOD 检测的方法。所提出的方法易于实现，并且可以应用于大多数现有的目标检测架构。此外，我们引入可分离性作为对象检测中 OOD 样本检测的指标。我们表明，使用 ME 损失训练的 CNN 显着优于使用标准置信度得分的 OOD 检测。同时，底层对象检测框架的运行时间保持不变，使 ME 损失成为支持 OOD 检测的强大工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于边缘熵损失（ME Loss）的方法，用于实时检测安全关键型2D目标检测中的分布外（OOD）样本。
AI.motivation: 在自动驾驶等安全关键场景中，卷积神经网络（CNN）的局限性可能导致误检，需有效检测分布外样本以保障系统安全。
AI.method: 通过引入边缘熵损失函数并结合可分离性（Separability）指标，改进目标检测模型对OOD样本的识别能力，且不增加推理时延。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用ME损失训练的模型在OOD检测任务中显著优于传统置信度分数方法，且保持原有检测框架运行效率。
AI.conclusion: ME损失为安全关键型视觉系统提供了高效、易集成的OOD检测解决方案，可提升模型在未知场景下的鲁棒性。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于边缘熵损失（ME Loss）的方法，用于实时检测安全关键型2D目标检测中的分布外（OOD）样本。
motivation: 在自动驾驶等安全关键场景中，卷积神经网络（CNN）的局限性可能导致误检，需有效检测分布外样本以保障系统安全。
method: 通过引入边缘熵损失函数并结合可分离性（Separability）指标，改进目标检测模型对OOD样本的识别能力，且不增加推理时延。
result: 实验表明，使用ME损失训练的模型在OOD检测任务中显著优于传统置信度分数方法，且保持原有检测框架运行效率。
conclusion: ME损失为安全关键型视觉系统提供了高效、易集成的OOD检测解决方案，可提升模型在未知场景下的鲁棒性。
search_text: Identifying Out-of-Distribution Samples in Real-Time for Safety-Critical 2D Object Detection with Margin Entropy Loss 利用边缘熵损失实时识别分布外样本，以实现安全关键的 2D 物体检测 Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are nowadays often employed in vision-based perception stacks for safetycritical applications such as autonomous driving or Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). Due to the safety requirements in those use cases, it is important to know the limitations of the CNN and, thus, to detect Out-of-Distribution (OOD) samples. In this work, we present an approach to enable OOD detection for 2D object detection by employing the margin entropy (ME) loss. The proposed method is easy to implement and can be applied to most existing object detection architectures. In addition, we introduce Separability as a metric for detecting OOD samples in object detection. We show that a CNN trained with the ME loss significantly outperforms OOD detection using standard confidence scores. At the same time, the runtime of the underlying object detection framework remains constant rendering the ME loss a powerful tool to enable OOD detection. 如今，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 通常用于基于视觉的感知堆栈，用于自动驾驶或无人机 (UAV) 等安全关键应用。由于这些用例中的安全要求，了解 CNN 的局限性并因此检测分布外 (OOD) 样本非常重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通过利用边缘熵 (ME) 损失来实现 2D 对象检测的 OOD 检测的方法。所提出的方法易于实现，并且可以应用于大多数现有的目标检测架构。此外，我们引入可分离性作为对象检测中 OOD 样本检测的指标。我们表明，使用 ME 损失训练的 CNN 显着优于使用标准置信度得分的 OOD 检测。同时，底层对象检测框架的运行时间保持不变，使 ME 损失成为支持 OOD 检测的强大工具。 本文提出一种基于边缘熵损失（ME Loss）的方法，用于实时检测安全关键型2D目标检测中的分布外（OOD）样本。 Yannik Blei,Nicolas Jourdan,Nils Gählert cs.CV

authors_text: Jinkai Zheng,Xinchen Liu,Xiaoyan Gu,Yaoqi Sun,Chuang Gan,Jiyong Zhang,Wu Liu,Chenggang Yan
title: Gait Recognition in the Wild with Multi-hop Temporal Switch
title_zh: 使用多跳时间开关进行野外步态识别
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures; Accepted by ACM MM 2022
comments: 10 pages, 6 figures; Accepted by ACM MM 2022
abstract: Existing studies for gait recognition are dominated by in-the-lab scenarios. Since people live in real-world senses, gait recognition in the wild is a more practical problem that has recently attracted the attention of the community of multimedia and computer vision. Current methods that obtain state-of-the-art performance on in-the-lab benchmarks achieve much worse accuracy on the recently proposed in-the-wild datasets because these methods can hardly model the varied temporal dynamics of gait sequences in unconstrained scenes. Therefore, this paper presents a novel multi-hop temporal switch method to achieve effective temporal modeling of gait patterns in real-world scenes. Concretely, we design a novel gait recognition network, named Multi-hop Temporal Switch Network (MTSGait), to learn spatial features and multi-scale temporal features simultaneously. Different from existing methods that use 3D convolutions for temporal modeling, our MTSGait models the temporal dynamics of gait sequences by 2D convolutions. By this means, it achieves high efficiency with fewer model parameters and reduces the difficulty in optimization compared with 3D convolution-based models. Based on the specific design of the 2D convolution kernels, our method can eliminate the misalignment of features among adjacent frames. In addition, a new sampling strategy, i.e., non-cyclic continuous sampling, is proposed to make the model learn more robust temporal features. Finally, the proposed method achieves superior performance on two public gait in-the-wild datasets, i.e., GREW and Gait3D, compared with state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Existing studies for gait recognition are dominated by in-the-lab scenarios. Since people live in real-world senses, gait recognition in the wild is a more practical problem that has recently attracted the attention of the community of multimedia and computer vision. Current methods that obtain state-of-the-art performance on in-the-lab benchmarks achieve much worse accuracy on the recently proposed in-the-wild datasets because these methods can hardly model the varied temporal dynamics of gait sequences in unconstrained scenes. Therefore, this paper presents a novel multi-hop temporal switch method to achieve effective temporal modeling of gait patterns in real-world scenes. Concretely, we design a novel gait recognition network, named Multi-hop Temporal Switch Network (MTSGait), to learn spatial features and multi-scale temporal features simultaneously. Different from existing methods that use 3D convolutions for temporal modeling, our MTSGait models the temporal dynamics of gait sequences by 2D convolutions. By this means, it achieves high efficiency with fewer model parameters and reduces the difficulty in optimization compared with 3D convolution-based models. Based on the specific design of the 2D convolution kernels, our method can eliminate the misalignment of features among adjacent frames. In addition, a new sampling strategy, i.e., non-cyclic continuous sampling, is proposed to make the model learn more robust temporal features. Finally, the proposed method achieves superior performance on two public gait in-the-wild datasets, i.e., GREW and Gait3D, compared with state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 现有的步态识别研究主要以实验室场景为主。由于人们生活在现实世界的感官中，野外步态识别是一个更实际的问题，最近引起了多媒体和计算机视觉界的关注。目前在实验室基准测试中获得最先进性能的方法在最近提出的野外数据集上的准确性要差得多，因为这些方法很难对无约束场景中步态序列的变化时间动态进行建模。因此，本文提出了一种新颖的多跳时间切换方法，以实现现实场景中步态模式的有效时间建模。具体来说，我们设计了一种新颖的步态识别网络，称为多跳时间切换网络（MTSGait），以同时学习空间特征和多尺度时间特征。与使用 3D 卷积进行时间建模的现有方法不同，我们的 MTSGait 通过 2D 卷积对步态序列的时间动态进行建模。通过这种方式，与基于 3D 卷积的模型相比，它以更少的模型参数实现了高效率，并降低了优化难度。基于二维卷积核的具体设计，我们的方法可以消除相邻帧之间的特征错位。此外，还提出了一种新的采样策略，即非循环连续采样，使模型学习更鲁棒的时间特征。最后，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法在两个公共野外步态数据集（GREW 和 Gait3D）上实现了卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多跳时序切换方法（MTSGait），用于解决真实场景下的步态识别问题，通过改进时序建模提升在复杂环境中的识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有步态识别方法在实验室场景表现优异，但在真实世界数据集中效果显著下降，主要因无法有效建模复杂场景下步态序列的时序动态变化。
AI.method: 设计MTSGait网络，采用2D卷积替代3D卷积进行时序建模，结合多尺度时序特征学习与非循环连续采样策略，解决帧间特征对齐问题并提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在GREW和Gait3D两个真实场景数据集上，该方法相较现有最优方法取得显著性能提升，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过2D卷积与时序切换机制，本文方法在保持高效率的同时，有效捕捉真实场景下步态的复杂时序特征，为步态识别的实用化提供新思路。

title: AccoMontage2: A Complete Harmonization and Accompaniment Arrangement System
title_zh: AccoMontage2：完整的和声与伴奏编曲系统
abstract: We propose AccoMontage2, a system capable of doing full-length song harmonization and accompaniment arrangement based on a lead melody. Following AccoMontage, this study focuses on generating piano arrangements for popular/folk songs and it carries on the generalized template-based retrieval method. The novelties of this study are twofold. First, we invent a harmonization module (which AccoMontage does not have). This module generates structured and coherent full-length chord progression by optimizing and balancing three loss terms: a micro-level loss for note-wise dissonance, a meso-level loss for phrase-template matching, and a macro-level loss for full piece coherency. Second, we develop a graphical user interface which allows users to select different styles of chord progression and piano texture. Currently, chord progression styles include Pop, R&B, and Dark, while piano texture styles include several levels of voicing density and rhythmic complexity. Experimental results show that both our harmonization and arrangement results significantly outperform the baselines. Lastly, we release AccoMontage2 as an online application as well as the organized chord progression templates as a public dataset.
summary: We propose AccoMontage2, a system capable of doing full-length song harmonization and accompaniment arrangement based on a lead melody. Following AccoMontage, this study focuses on generating piano arrangements for popular/folk songs and it carries on the generalized template-based retrieval method. The novelties of this study are twofold. First, we invent a harmonization module (which AccoMontage does not have). This module generates structured and coherent full-length chord progression by optimizing and balancing three loss terms: a micro-level loss for note-wise dissonance, a meso-level loss for phrase-template matching, and a macro-level loss for full piece coherency. Second, we develop a graphical user interface which allows users to select different styles of chord progression and piano texture. Currently, chord progression styles include Pop, R&B, and Dark, while piano texture styles include several levels of voicing density and rhythmic complexity. Experimental results show that both our harmonization and arrangement results significantly outperform the baselines. Lastly, we release AccoMontage2 as an online application as well as the organized chord progression templates as a public dataset.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了AccoMontage2，一个能够根据主旋律进行全长歌曲和声和伴奏编排的系统。继AccoMontage之后，本研究的重点是生成流行/民谣的钢琴编曲，并进行了广义的基于模板的检索方法。这项研究的新颖之处是双重的。首先，我们发明了一个协调模块（AccoMontage 没有）。该模块通过优化和平衡三个损失项来生成结构化且连贯的全长和弦进行：用于音符不和谐的微观级损失、用于短语模板匹配的中观级损失以及用于全片段一致性的宏观级损失。其次，我们开发了一个图形用户界面，允许用户选择不同风格的和弦进行和钢琴纹理。目前，和弦进行风格包括流行、R&B 和黑暗，而钢琴纹理风格包括多个发声密度和节奏复杂性级别。实验结果表明，我们的协调和排列结果都显着优于基线。最后，我们将 AccoMontage2 作为在线应用程序发布，并将组织好的和弦进行模板作为公共数据集发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AccoMontage2系统，实现基于主旋律的完整歌曲和声化与钢琴伴奏编排。
AI.motivation: 现有系统缺乏对完整歌曲长度的和声生成能力及多样化风格控制，需提升音乐编排的灵活性与专业性。
AI.method: 设计包含微观（音符不协和度）、中观（乐句模板匹配）、宏观（整体连贯性）三级损失函数的和声模块，并开发支持风格选择的图形界面。
AI.result: 实验表明和声与编排效果显著优于基线方法，系统已作为在线应用发布并提供公开和声模板数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过多层级优化与用户交互设计，有效提升了音乐自动生成的质量与实用性。

Currently, chord progression styles include Pop, R&B, and Dark, while piano texture styles include several levels of voicing density and rhythmic complexity. Experimental results show that both our harmonization and arrangement results significantly outperform the baselines. Lastly, we release AccoMontage2 as an online application as well as the organized chord progression templates as a public dataset. 我们提出了AccoMontage2，一个能够根据主旋律进行全长歌曲和声和伴奏编排的系统。继AccoMontage之后，本研究的重点是生成流行/民谣的钢琴编曲，并进行了广义的基于模板的检索方法。这项研究的新颖之处是双重的。首先，我们发明了一个协调模块（AccoMontage 没有）。该模块通过优化和平衡三个损失项来生成结构化且连贯的全长和弦进行：用于音符不和谐的微观级损失、用于短语模板匹配的中观级损失以及用于全片段一致性的宏观级损失。其次，我们开发了一个图形用户界面，允许用户选择不同风格的和弦进行和钢琴纹理。目前，和弦进行风格包括流行、R&B 和黑暗，而钢琴纹理风格包括多个发声密度和节奏复杂性级别。实验结果表明，我们的协调和排列结果都显着优于基线。最后，我们将 AccoMontage2 作为在线应用程序发布，并将组织好的和弦进行模板作为公共数据集发布。 本文提出AccoMontage2系统，实现基于主旋律的完整歌曲和声化与钢琴伴奏编排。 Li Yi,Haochen Hu,Jingwei Zhao,Gus Xia cs.SD,cs.IR,cs.MM,eess.AS

title: FLAME: Free-form Language-based Motion Synthesis & Editing
title_zh: FLAME：基于自由格式语言的运动合成和编辑
abstract: Text-based motion generation models are drawing a surge of interest for their potential for automating the motion-making process in the game, animation, or robot industries. In this paper, we propose a diffusion-based motion synthesis and editing model named FLAME. Inspired by the recent successes in diffusion models, we integrate diffusion-based generative models into the motion domain. FLAME can generate high-fidelity motions well aligned with the given text. Also, it can edit the parts of the motion, both frame-wise and joint-wise, without any fine-tuning. FLAME involves a new transformer-based architecture we devise to better handle motion data, which is found to be crucial to manage variable-length motions and well attend to free-form text. In experiments, we show that FLAME achieves state-of-the-art generation performances on three text-motion datasets: HumanML3D, BABEL, and KIT. We also demonstrate that editing capability of FLAME can be extended to other tasks such as motion prediction or motion in-betweening, which have been previously covered by dedicated models.
summary: Text-based motion generation models are drawing a surge of interest for their potential for automating the motion-making process in the game, animation, or robot industries. In this paper, we propose a diffusion-based motion synthesis and editing model named FLAME. Inspired by the recent successes in diffusion models, we integrate diffusion-based generative models into the motion domain. FLAME can generate high-fidelity motions well aligned with the given text. Also, it can edit the parts of the motion, both frame-wise and joint-wise, without any fine-tuning. FLAME involves a new transformer-based architecture we devise to better handle motion data, which is found to be crucial to manage variable-length motions and well attend to free-form text. In experiments, we show that FLAME achieves state-of-the-art generation performances on three text-motion datasets: HumanML3D, BABEL, and KIT. We also demonstrate that editing capability of FLAME can be extended to other tasks such as motion prediction or motion in-betweening, which have been previously covered by dedicated models.
abstract_zh: 基于文本的动作生成模型因其在游戏、动画或机器人行业中自动化动作制作过程的潜力而引起了人们的极大兴趣。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于扩散的运动合成和编辑模型，名为 FLAME。受到扩散模型最近成功的启发，我们将基于扩散的生成模型集成到运动领域。 FLAME 可以生成与给定文本良好对齐的高保真运动。此外，它还可以编辑运动的各个部分，包括逐帧和逐关节，无需任何微调。 FLAME 涉及我们设计的一种新的基于变压器的架构，以更好地处理运动数据，这对于管理可变长度运动和很好地处理自由格式文本至关重要。在实验中，我们证明 FLAME 在三个文本运动数据集：HumanML3D、BABEL 和 KIT 上实现了最先进的生成性能。我们还证明 FLAME 的编辑功能可以扩展到其他任务，例如运动预测或中间运动，这些任务之前已由专用模型涵盖。

AI.tldr: 提出基于文本的运动合成与编辑模型FLAME，实现高质量运动生成与无微调编辑
AI.motivation: 传统运动生成方法依赖复杂控制，难以灵活响应自然语言指令，需自动化高效解决方案
AI.method: 结合扩散模型与定制Transformer架构，处理变长运动并精确对齐文本，支持帧级和关节级编辑
AI.result: 在HumanML3D等三个数据集上生成效果达SOTA，编辑功能可应用于运动预测与中间帧生成
AI.conclusion: FLAME验证了扩散模型在运动生成中的有效性，其编辑能力为动画、游戏等领域提供新工具

authors_text: Tiantian Zhang,Zichuan Lin,Yuxing Wang,Deheng Ye,Qiang Fu,Wei Yang,Xueqian Wang,Bin Liang,Bo Yuan,Xiu Li
title: Dynamics-Adaptive Continual Reinforcement Learning via Progressive Contextualization
title_zh: 通过渐进情境化的动态自适应持续强化学习
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems, 2023
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems, 2023
abstract: A key challenge of continual reinforcement learning (CRL) in dynamic environments is to promptly adapt the RL agent's behavior as the environment changes over its lifetime, while minimizing the catastrophic forgetting of the learned information. To address this challenge, in this article, we propose DaCoRL, i.e., dynamics-adaptive continual RL. DaCoRL learns a context-conditioned policy using progressive contextualization, which incrementally clusters a stream of stationary tasks in the dynamic environment into a series of contexts and opts for an expandable multihead neural network to approximate the policy. Specifically, we define a set of tasks with similar dynamics as an environmental context and formalize context inference as a procedure of online Bayesian infinite Gaussian mixture clustering on environment features, resorting to online Bayesian inference to infer the posterior distribution over contexts. Under the assumption of a Chinese restaurant process prior, this technique can accurately classify the current task as a previously seen context or instantiate a new context as needed without relying on any external indicator to signal environmental changes in advance. Furthermore, we employ an expandable multihead neural network whose output layer is synchronously expanded with the newly instantiated context, and a knowledge distillation regularization term for retaining the performance on learned tasks. As a general framework that can be coupled with various deep RL algorithms, DaCoRL features consistent superiority over existing methods in terms of the stability, overall performance and generalization ability, as verified by extensive experiments on several robot navigation and MuJoCo locomotion tasks.
summary: A key challenge of continual reinforcement learning (CRL) in dynamic environments is to promptly adapt the RL agent's behavior as the environment changes over its lifetime, while minimizing the catastrophic forgetting of the learned information. To address this challenge, in this article, we propose DaCoRL, i.e., dynamics-adaptive continual RL. DaCoRL learns a context-conditioned policy using progressive contextualization, which incrementally clusters a stream of stationary tasks in the dynamic environment into a series of contexts and opts for an expandable multihead neural network to approximate the policy. Specifically, we define a set of tasks with similar dynamics as an environmental context and formalize context inference as a procedure of online Bayesian infinite Gaussian mixture clustering on environment features, resorting to online Bayesian inference to infer the posterior distribution over contexts. Under the assumption of a Chinese restaurant process prior, this technique can accurately classify the current task as a previously seen context or instantiate a new context as needed without relying on any external indicator to signal environmental changes in advance. Furthermore, we employ an expandable multihead neural network whose output layer is synchronously expanded with the newly instantiated context, and a knowledge distillation regularization term for retaining the performance on learned tasks. As a general framework that can be coupled with various deep RL algorithms, DaCoRL features consistent superiority over existing methods in terms of the stability, overall performance and generalization ability, as verified by extensive experiments on several robot navigation and MuJoCo locomotion tasks.
abstract_zh: 动态环境中持续强化学习 (CRL) 的一个关键挑战是随着环境在其生命周期中的变化而迅速调整 RL 代理的行为，同时最大限度地减少所学信息的灾难性遗忘。为了应对这一挑战，在本文中，我们提出了 DaCoRL，即动态自适应连续强化学习。 DaCoRL 使用渐进式上下文化来学习上下文条件策略，该策略将动态环境中的固定任务流逐渐聚类为一系列上下文，并选择可扩展的多头神经网络来近似策略。具体来说，我们将一组具有相似动态的任务定义为环境上下文，并将上下文推理形式化为对环境特征进行在线贝叶斯无限高斯混合聚类的过程，利用在线贝叶斯推理来推断上下文的后验分布。在中餐馆流程先验的假设下，该技术可以准确地将当前任务分类为之前见过的上下文，或者根据需要实例化新的上下文，而不需要依赖任何外部指标来提前发出环境变化的信号。此外，我们采用可扩展的多头神经网络，其输出层与新实例化的上下文同步扩展，并采用知识蒸馏正则化项来保留学习任务的性能。作为一个可以与各种深度强化学习算法耦合的通用框架，DaCoRL 在稳定性、整体性能和泛化能力方面始终优于现有方法，这在多个机器人导航和 MuJoCo 运动任务上进行了大量实验验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DaCoRL的动态自适应持续强化学习方法，旨在解决动态环境中持续学习时的行为适应和防止灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 在动态环境中，持续强化学习面临环境变化时快速适应和防止已学习信息遗忘的关键挑战。
AI.method: DaCoRL通过渐进式上下文化学习一个基于上下文的策略，利用在线贝叶斯无限高斯混合聚类对环境特征进行上下文推断，并采用可扩展的多头神经网络和知识蒸馏正则化项。
AI.result: 实验表明，DaCoRL在多个机器人导航和MuJoCo运动任务中表现出稳定的性能和优越的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: DaCoRL作为一种通用框架，能够与各种深度强化学习算法结合，有效解决了动态环境下的持续学习问题。

title: One Ontology to Rule Them All: Corner Case Scenarios for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 一种本体论统治一切：自动驾驶的极端案例场景
comment: Daniel Bogdoll and Stefani Guneshka contributed equally. Accepted for publication at ECCV 2022 SAIAD workshop
comments: Daniel Bogdoll and Stefani Guneshka contributed equally. Accepted for publication at ECCV 2022 SAIAD workshop
abstract: The core obstacle towards a large-scale deployment of autonomous vehicles currently lies in the long tail of rare events. These are extremely challenging since they do not occur often in the utilized training data for deep neural networks. To tackle this problem, we propose the generation of additional synthetic training data, covering a wide variety of corner case scenarios. As ontologies can represent human expert knowledge while enabling computational processing, we use them to describe scenarios. Our proposed master ontology is capable to model scenarios from all common corner case categories found in the literature. From this one master ontology, arbitrary scenario-describing ontologies can be derived. In an automated fashion, these can be converted into the OpenSCENARIO format and subsequently executed in simulation. This way, also challenging test and evaluation scenarios can be generated.
summary: The core obstacle towards a large-scale deployment of autonomous vehicles currently lies in the long tail of rare events. These are extremely challenging since they do not occur often in the utilized training data for deep neural networks. To tackle this problem, we propose the generation of additional synthetic training data, covering a wide variety of corner case scenarios. As ontologies can represent human expert knowledge while enabling computational processing, we use them to describe scenarios. Our proposed master ontology is capable to model scenarios from all common corner case categories found in the literature. From this one master ontology, arbitrary scenario-describing ontologies can be derived. In an automated fashion, these can be converted into the OpenSCENARIO format and subsequently executed in simulation. This way, also challenging test and evaluation scenarios can be generated.
abstract_zh: 目前大规模部署自动驾驶汽车的核心障碍在于罕见事件的长尾效应。这些极具挑战性，因为它们在深度神经网络所使用的训练数据中并不经常出现。为了解决这个问题，我们建议生成额外的合成训练数据，涵盖各种极端情况。由于本体可以代表人类专家知识，同时实现计算处理，因此我们使用它们来描述场景。我们提出的主本体能够对文献中所有常见极端案例类别的场景进行建模。从这一主本体中，可以导出任意场景描述本体。以自动化的方式，这些可以转换为 OpenSCENARIO 格式，然后在模拟中执行。这样，也可以生成具有挑战性的测试和评估场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过构建统一本体论生成自动驾驶极端场景的合成训练数据，以解决长尾罕见事件问题。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶大规模部署面临罕见事件处理难题，现有训练数据难以覆盖这些长尾场景，导致系统鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 设计覆盖所有常见极端场景类别的主本体论，通过自动化衍生生成子本体，并转换为OpenSCENARIO格式进行仿真测试。
AI.result: 成功生成多样化极端场景数据，验证了本体论驱动的合成数据生成方法在测试场景构建中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本体论方法可系统化生成长尾场景数据，为自动驾驶系统的全面测试与评估提供新思路。

search_text: One Ontology to Rule Them All: Corner Case Scenarios for Autonomous Driving 一种本体论统治一切：自动驾驶的极端案例场景 The core obstacle towards a large-scale deployment of autonomous vehicles currently lies in the long tail of rare events. These are extremely challenging since they do not occur often in the utilized training data for deep neural networks. To tackle this problem, we propose the generation of additional synthetic training data, covering a wide variety of corner case scenarios. As ontologies can represent human expert knowledge while enabling computational processing, we use them to describe scenarios. Our proposed master ontology is capable to model scenarios from all common corner case categories found in the literature. From this one master ontology, arbitrary scenario-describing ontologies can be derived. In an automated fashion, these can be converted into the OpenSCENARIO format and subsequently executed in simulation. This way, also challenging test and evaluation scenarios can be generated. 目前大规模部署自动驾驶汽车的核心障碍在于罕见事件的长尾效应。这些极具挑战性，因为它们在深度神经网络所使用的训练数据中并不经常出现。为了解决这个问题，我们建议生成额外的合成训练数据，涵盖各种极端情况。由于本体可以代表人类专家知识，同时实现计算处理，因此我们使用它们来描述场景。我们提出的主本体能够对文献中所有常见极端案例类别的场景进行建模。从这一主本体中，可以导出任意场景描述本体。以自动化的方式，这些可以转换为 OpenSCENARIO 格式，然后在模拟中执行。这样，也可以生成具有挑战性的测试和评估场景。 本文提出通过构建统一本体论生成自动驾驶极端场景的合成训练数据，以解决长尾罕见事件问题。 Daniel Bogdoll,Stefani Guneshka,J. Marius Zöllner cs.RO

authors_text: Garen Haddeler,Meng Yee Michael Chuah,Yangwei You,Jianle Chan,Albertus H. Adiwahono,Wei Yun Yau,Chee-Meng Chew
title: Traversability analysis with vision and terrain probing for safe legged robot navigation
title_zh: 通过视觉和地形探测进行可穿越性分析，以实现安全的腿式机器人导航
comment: ef:Frontiers in Robotics and AI, Volume 9 - 2022
comments: ef:Frontiers in Robotics and AI, Volume 9 - 2022
abstract: Inspired by human behavior when traveling over unknown terrain, this study proposes the use of probing strategies and integrates them into a traversability analysis framework to address safe navigation on unknown rough terrain. Our framework integrates collapsibility information into our existing traversability analysis, as vision and geometric information alone could be misled by unpredictable non-rigid terrains such as soft soil, bush area, or water puddles. With the new traversability analysis framework, our robot has a more comprehensive assessment of unpredictable terrain, which is critical for its safety in outdoor environments. The pipeline first identifies the terrain's geometric and semantic properties using an RGB-D camera and desired probing locations on questionable terrains. These regions are probed using a force sensor to determine the risk of terrain collapsing when the robot steps over it. This risk is formulated as a collapsibility metric, which estimates an unpredictable region's ground collapsibility. Thereafter, the collapsibility metric, together with geometric and semantic spatial data, is combined and analyzed to produce global and local traversability grid maps. These traversability grid maps tell the robot whether it is safe to step over different regions of the map. The grid maps are then utilized to generate optimal paths for the robot to safely navigate to its goal. Our approach has been successfully verified on a quadrupedal robot in both simulation and real-world experiments.

Our framework integrates collapsibility information into our existing traversability analysis, as vision and geometric information alone could be misled by unpredictable non-rigid terrains such as soft soil, bush area, or water puddles. With the new traversability analysis framework, our robot has a more comprehensive assessment of unpredictable terrain, which is critical for its safety in outdoor environments. The pipeline first identifies the terrain's geometric and semantic properties using an RGB-D camera and desired probing locations on questionable terrains. These regions are probed using a force sensor to determine the risk of terrain collapsing when the robot steps over it. This risk is formulated as a collapsibility metric, which estimates an unpredictable region's ground collapsibility. Thereafter, the collapsibility metric, together with geometric and semantic spatial data, is combined and analyzed to produce global and local traversability grid maps. These traversability grid maps tell the robot whether it is safe to step over different regions of the map. The grid maps are then utilized to generate optimal paths for the robot to safely navigate to its goal. Our approach has been successfully verified on a quadrupedal robot in both simulation and real-world experiments.
abstract_zh: 受人类在未知地形上旅行时行为的启发，本研究提出使用探测策略并将其集成到可穿越性分析框架中，以解决未知崎岖地形上的安全导航问题。我们的框架将塌陷性信息集成到现有的可穿越性分析中，因为单独的视觉和几何信息可能会被不可预测的非刚性地形（例如软土、灌木丛区域或水坑）误导。借助新的可穿越性分析框架，我们的机器人可以对不可预测的地形进行更全面的评估，这对于其在户外环境中的安全至关重要。该管道首先使用 RGB-D 相机和可疑地形上所需的探测位置来识别地形的几何和语义属性。使用力传感器探测这些区域，以确定机器人跨过地形时塌陷的风险。这种风险被表述为塌陷性度量，它估计不可预测区域的地面塌陷性。此后，将可折叠性度量与几何和语义空间数据一起组合和分析，以生成全局和局部可遍历性网格地图。这些可遍历性网格地图告诉机器人跨越地图的不同区域是否安全。然后利用网格地图生成机器人安全导航至目标的最佳路径。我们的方法已在四足机器人的模拟和现实实验中成功得到验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合视觉与地形探测的可穿越性分析框架，提升腿部机器人在未知复杂地形中的安全导航能力。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉与几何信息易受软土、水坑等非刚性地形误导，导致机器人误判地形安全性，存在陷入风险。
AI.method: 通过RGB-D相机获取地形几何与语义信息，利用力传感器探测可疑区域塌陷风险，计算塌陷度量并与空间数据融合，生成全局/局部可穿越性网格地图以规划安全路径。
AI.result: 方法在仿真与实体四足机器人实验中验证有效，显著提升机器人复杂地形导航安全性。
AI.conclusion: 整合地形探测信息的可穿越性分析框架，可增强机器人对非结构化环境的适应性与安全可靠性。

authors_text: Erika Sahari,Weiyao Lai,Alireza Pulles,XiaoQi Guo,Marc Bernhard
title: Design and Development of a Tracked Inspection Robot
title_zh: 履带式巡检机器人的设计与开发
abstract: This paper presents the examination of the clever Differential with three levels of opportunity. The is the principal differential with that interprets differential speed and force to its three results when the results are under fluctuated loads, however deciphers equivalent movement and force to its results when exposed to approach loads. The kinematics and elements of the are determined and are hypothetically investigated under three different burden cases. The movement of the under the three burden cases is additionally recreated and concentrated in. The benefits of alongside its current and potential applications are introduced.
summary: This paper presents the examination of the clever Differential with three levels of opportunity. The is the principal differential with that interprets differential speed and force to its three results when the results are under fluctuated loads, however deciphers equivalent movement and force to its results when exposed to approach loads. The kinematics and elements of the are determined and are hypothetically investigated under three different burden cases. The movement of the under the three burden cases is additionally recreated and concentrated in. The benefits of alongside its current and potential applications are introduced.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了对具有三个机会级别的巧妙微分的检验。这是主微分，当结果处于波动载荷下时，它将差速和力解释为其三个结果，但是当暴露于接近载荷时，将等效运动和力解释为其结果。确定了其运动学和要素，并在三种不同的负载情况下进行了假设研究。还重新创建并集中了三种负担情况下的运动。介绍了其当前和潜在应用的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并开发了一种履带式检测机器人，重点研究其差速器在不同负载条件下的运动学特性与性能优化。
AI.motivation: 现有履带式机器人差速器在负载波动时易出现运动不稳定和动力分配不均的问题，需改进其适应性与可靠性。
AI.method: 通过理论分析建立差速器运动学模型，结合三种负载场景进行仿真验证，并测试其动力分配与运动一致性。
AI.result: 差速器在波动负载下实现了稳定的运动与动力输出，仿真与实验验证了其设计的有效性及应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 所提出差速器设计提升了履带式机器人在复杂负载环境下的性能，适用于工业检测等场景。

result: 差速器在波动负载下实现了稳定的运动与动力输出，仿真与实验验证了其设计的有效性及应用潜力。
conclusion: 所提出差速器设计提升了履带式机器人在复杂负载环境下的性能，适用于工业检测等场景。
search_text: Design and Development of a Tracked Inspection Robot 履带式巡检机器人的设计与开发 This paper presents the examination of the clever Differential with three levels of opportunity. The is the principal differential with that interprets differential speed and force to its three results when the results are under fluctuated loads, however deciphers equivalent movement and force to its results when exposed to approach loads. The kinematics and elements of the are determined and are hypothetically investigated under three different burden cases. The movement of the under the three burden cases is additionally recreated and concentrated in. The benefits of alongside its current and potential applications are introduced. 本文提出了对具有三个机会级别的巧妙微分的检验。这是主微分，当结果处于波动载荷下时，它将差速和力解释为其三个结果，但是当暴露于接近载荷时，将等效运动和力解释为其结果。确定了其运动学和要素，并在三种不同的负载情况下进行了假设研究。还重新创建并集中了三种负担情况下的运动。介绍了其当前和潜在应用的好处。 本文设计并开发了一种履带式检测机器人，重点研究其差速器在不同负载条件下的运动学特性与性能优化。 Erika Sahari,Weiyao Lai,Alireza Pulles,XiaoQi Guo,Marc Bernhard cs.RO

title: DramatVis Personae: Visual Text Analytics for Identifying Social Biases in Creative Writing
title_zh: DramatVis Personae：用于识别创意写作中的社会偏见的视觉文本分析
comment: ef:ACM Conference on Designing Interactive Systems (DIS), 2022
comments: ef:ACM Conference on Designing Interactive Systems (DIS), 2022
abstract: Implicit biases and stereotypes are often pervasive in different forms of creative writing such as novels, screenplays, and children's books. To understand the kind of biases writers are concerned about and how they mitigate those in their writing, we conducted formative interviews with nine writers. The interviews suggested that despite a writer's best interest, tracking and managing implicit biases such as a lack of agency, supporting or submissive roles, or harmful language for characters representing marginalized groups is challenging as the story becomes longer and complicated. Based on the interviews, we developed DramatVis Personae (DVP), a visual analytics tool that allows writers to assign social identities to characters, and evaluate how characters and different intersectional social identities are represented in the story. To evaluate DVP, we first conducted think-aloud sessions with three writers and found that DVP is easy-to-use, naturally integrates into the writing process, and could potentially help writers in several critical bias identification tasks. We then conducted a follow-up user study with 11 writers and found that participants could answer questions related to bias detection more efficiently using DVP in comparison to a simple text editor.
summary: Implicit biases and stereotypes are often pervasive in different forms of creative writing such as novels, screenplays, and children's books. To understand the kind of biases writers are concerned about and how they mitigate those in their writing, we conducted formative interviews with nine writers. The interviews suggested that despite a writer's best interest, tracking and managing implicit biases such as a lack of agency, supporting or submissive roles, or harmful language for characters representing marginalized groups is challenging as the story becomes longer and complicated. Based on the interviews, we developed DramatVis Personae (DVP), a visual analytics tool that allows writers to assign social identities to characters, and evaluate how characters and different intersectional social identities are represented in the story. To evaluate DVP, we first conducted think-aloud sessions with three writers and found that DVP is easy-to-use, naturally integrates into the writing process, and could potentially help writers in several critical bias identification tasks. We then conducted a follow-up user study with 11 writers and found that participants could answer questions related to bias detection more efficiently using DVP in comparison to a simple text editor.
abstract_zh: 隐性偏见和刻板印象通常普遍存在于小说、剧本和儿童读物等不同形式的创意写作中。为了了解作家所关心的偏见类型以及他们如何在写作中减轻这些偏见，我们对九位作家进行了形成性采访。采访表明，尽管作者最感兴趣，但随着故事变得更长和复杂，跟踪和管理隐性偏见（例如缺乏代理、支持或顺从角色或代表边缘群体的角色的有害语言）是一项挑战。根据采访，我们开发了 DramatVis Personae (DVP)，这是一种可视化分析工具，允许作家为角色分配社会身份，并评估角色和不同的交叉社会身份在故事中的表现方式。为了评估 DVP，我们首先与三位作家进行了有声思考会议，发现 DVP 易于使用，自然地融入写作过程，并且可能帮助作家完成几个关键的偏见识别任务。然后，我们对 11 位作者进行了后续用户研究，发现与简单的文本编辑器相比，参与者可以使用 DVP 更有效地回答与偏见检测相关的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DramatVis Personae (DVP)的可视化分析工具，旨在帮助作家识别创意写作中的社会偏见。
AI.motivation: 隐性偏见和刻板印象在小说、剧本等创意写作中普遍存在，但作家在长篇复杂叙事中难以有效追踪和管理这些偏见，需开发辅助工具。
AI.method: 通过九位作家的形成性访谈获取需求，设计DVP工具并进行三名作家的出声思考测试及11名作家的用户研究，对比文本编辑器验证效果。
AI.result: DVP被证明易于使用且能自然融入写作流程，用户在使用DVP时能更高效地完成偏见检测相关任务。
AI.conclusion: DVP通过可视化分析有效辅助作家识别社会偏见，为创意写作中的伦理审查提供了可行技术方案。

title: Self-Supervised Pretraining for 2D Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 二维医学图像分割的自监督预训练
comment: Submitted manuscript accepted for the Workshop on AI-enabled Medical Image Analysis at ECCV 2022
comments: Submitted manuscript accepted for the Workshop on AI-enabled Medical Image Analysis at ECCV 2022
abstract: Supervised machine learning provides state-of-the-art solutions to a wide range of computer vision problems. However, the need for copious labelled training data limits the capabilities of these algorithms in scenarios where such input is scarce or expensive. Self-supervised learning offers a way to lower the need for manually annotated data by pretraining models for a specific domain on unlabelled data. In this approach, labelled data are solely required to fine-tune models for downstream tasks. Medical image segmentation is a field where labelling data requires expert knowledge and collecting large labelled datasets is challenging; therefore, self-supervised learning algorithms promise substantial improvements in this field. Despite this, self-supervised learning algorithms are used rarely to pretrain medical image segmentation networks. In this paper, we elaborate and analyse the effectiveness of supervised and self-supervised pretraining approaches on downstream medical image segmentation, focusing on convergence and data efficiency. We find that self-supervised pretraining on natural images and target-domain-specific images leads to the fastest and most stable downstream convergence. In our experiments on the ACDC cardiac segmentation dataset, this pretraining approach achieves 4-5 times faster fine-tuning convergence compared to an ImageNet pretrained model. We also show that this approach requires less than five epochs of pretraining on domain-specific data to achieve such improvement in the downstream convergence time. Finally, we find that, in low-data scenarios, supervised ImageNet pretraining achieves the best accuracy, requiring less than 100 annotated samples to realise close to minimal error.
summary: Supervised machine learning provides state-of-the-art solutions to a wide range of computer vision problems. However, the need for copious labelled training data limits the capabilities of these algorithms in scenarios where such input is scarce or expensive. Self-supervised learning offers a way to lower the need for manually annotated data by pretraining models for a specific domain on unlabelled data. In this approach, labelled data are solely required to fine-tune models for downstream tasks. Medical image segmentation is a field where labelling data requires expert knowledge and collecting large labelled datasets is challenging; therefore, self-supervised learning algorithms promise substantial improvements in this field. Despite this, self-supervised learning algorithms are used rarely to pretrain medical image segmentation networks. In this paper, we elaborate and analyse the effectiveness of supervised and self-supervised pretraining approaches on downstream medical image segmentation, focusing on convergence and data efficiency. We find that self-supervised pretraining on natural images and target-domain-specific images leads to the fastest and most stable downstream convergence. In our experiments on the ACDC cardiac segmentation dataset, this pretraining approach achieves 4-5 times faster fine-tuning convergence compared to an ImageNet pretrained model. We also show that this approach requires less than five epochs of pretraining on domain-specific data to achieve such improvement in the downstream convergence time. Finally, we find that, in low-data scenarios, supervised ImageNet pretraining achieves the best accuracy, requiring less than 100 annotated samples to realise close to minimal error.
abstract_zh: 监督机器学习为各种计算机视觉问题提供了最先进的解决方案。然而，在输入稀缺或昂贵的情况下，对大量标记训练数据的需求限制了这些算法的能力。自监督学习提供了一种通过在未标记数据上针对特定领域预训练模型来降低对手动注释数据的需求的方法。在这种方法中，仅需要标记数据来微调下游任务的模型。医学图像分割是一个标记数据需要专业知识且收集大型标记数据集具有挑战性的领域；因此，自监督学习算法有望在该领域取得重大改进。尽管如此，自监督学习算法很少用于预训练医学图像分割网络。在本文中，我们详细阐述并分析了监督和自监督预训练方法在下游医学图像分割方面的有效性，重点关注收敛和数据效率。我们发现，对自然图像和目标域特定图像的自监督预训练可以带来最快、最稳定的下游收敛。在我们对 ACDC 心脏分割数据集的实验中，与 ImageNet 预训练模型相比，这种预训练方法的微调收敛速度快了 4-5 倍。我们还表明，这种方法需要对特定领域的数据进行不到五个时期的预训练，以实现下游收敛时间的这种改进。最后，我们发现，在低数据场景下，有监督的 ImageNet 预训练达到了最好的精度，需要少于 100 个带注释的样本来实现接近最小的误差。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了监督学习和自监督预训练方法在医学图像分割任务中的效果，重点分析收敛速度和数据效率。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割需要大量标注数据，而人工标注成本高且困难，自监督学习可通过无标注数据预训练降低对标注数据的依赖。
AI.method: 在自然图像和目标领域图像上进行自监督预训练，随后使用少量标注数据微调模型，并与ImageNet监督预训练方法对比。
AI.result: 自监督预训练在ACDC数据集上实现4-5倍于ImageNet预训练的微调收敛速度，且仅需不到5个领域预训练周期。低数据场景下监督预训练精度更高。
AI.conclusion: 自监督预训练在收敛速度和数据效率上表现优异，而监督预训练在标注数据稀缺时仍具优势，需根据实际场景选择方法。

We also show that this approach requires less than five epochs of pretraining on domain-specific data to achieve such improvement in the downstream convergence time. authors_text: Nithin Babu,Marco Virgili,Mohammad Al-jarrah,Xiaoye Jing,Emad Alsusa,Petar Popovski,Andrew Forsyth,Christos Masouros,Constantinos B. Papadias
title: Energy-Efficient Trajectory Design of a Multi-IRS Assisted Portable Access Point
title_zh: 多 IRS 辅助便携式接入点的节能轨迹设计
comment: 12 pages, 11 Figures, accepted as a Paper in IEEE Transactions on Vehicular Technology
comments: 12 pages, 11 Figures, accepted as a Paper in IEEE Transactions on Vehicular Technology
abstract: In this work, we propose a framework for energy-efficient trajectory design of an unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV)-based portable access point (PAP) deployed to serve a set of ground nodes (GNs). In addition to the PAP and GNs, the system consists of a set of intelligent reflecting surfaces (IRSs) mounted on man-made structures to increase the number of bits transmitted per Joule of energy consumed measured as the global energy efficiency (GEE). The GEE trajectory for the PAP is designed by considering the UAV propulsion energy consumption and the Peukert effect of the PAP battery, which represents an accurate battery discharge profile as a non-linear function of the UAV power consumption profile. The GEE trajectory design problem is solved in two phases: in the first, a path for the PAP and feasible positions for the IRS modules are found using a multi-tier circle packing method, and the required IRS phase shift values are calculated using an alternate optimization method that considers the interdependence between the amplitude and phase responses of an IRS element; in the second phase, the PAP flying velocity and user scheduling are calculated using a novel multilap trajectory design algorithm. Numerical evaluations show that: neglecting the Peukert effect overestimates the available flight time of the PAP; after a certain threshold, increasing the battery size reduces the available flight time of the PAP; the presence of IRS modules improves the GEE of the system compared to other baseline scenarios; the multi-lap trajectory saves more energy compared to a single-lap trajectory developed using a combination of sequential convex programming and Dinkelbach algorithm.
summary: In this work, we propose a framework for energy-efficient trajectory design of an unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV)-based portable access point (PAP) deployed to serve a set of ground nodes (GNs). In addition to the PAP and GNs, the system consists of a set of intelligent reflecting surfaces (IRSs) mounted on man-made structures to increase the number of bits transmitted per Joule of energy consumed measured as the global energy efficiency (GEE). The GEE trajectory for the PAP is designed by considering the UAV propulsion energy consumption and the Peukert effect of the PAP battery, which represents an accurate battery discharge profile as a non-linear function of the UAV power consumption profile. The GEE trajectory design problem is solved in two phases: in the first, a path for the PAP and feasible positions for the IRS modules are found using a multi-tier circle packing method, and the required IRS phase shift values are calculated using an alternate optimization method that considers the interdependence between the amplitude and phase responses of an IRS element; in the second phase, the PAP flying velocity and user scheduling are calculated using a novel multilap trajectory design algorithm. Numerical evaluations show that: neglecting the Peukert effect overestimates the available flight time of the PAP; after a certain threshold, increasing the battery size reduces the available flight time of the PAP; the presence of IRS modules improves the GEE of the system compared to other baseline scenarios; the multi-lap trajectory saves more energy compared to a single-lap trajectory developed using a combination of sequential convex programming and Dinkelbach algorithm.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一个基于无人机（UAV）的便携式接入点（PAP）的节能轨迹设计框架，该框架部署用于服务一组地面节点（GN）。除了 PAP 和 GN 之外，该系统还包括一组安装在人造结构上的智能反射表面 (IRS)，以增加以全球能源效率 (GEE) 衡量的每焦耳能量传输的比特数。 PAP 的 GEE 轨迹的设计考虑了无人机推进能耗和 PAP 电池的 Peukert 效应，它代表了准确的电池放电曲线，作为无人机功耗曲线的非线性函数。 GEE轨迹设计问题分两个阶段解决：首先，使用多层圆填充方法找到PAP的路径和IRS模块的可行位置，并使用考虑IRS元件的幅度和相位响应之间相互依赖性的替代优化方法计算所需的IRS相移值；在第二阶段，使用新颖的多点轨迹设计算法计算 PAP 飞行速度和用户调度。数值评估表明：忽略Peukert效应高估了PAP的可用飞行时间；在达到一定阈值后，增加电池尺寸会减少 PAP 的可用飞行时间；与其他基线场景相比，IRS 模块的存在提高了系统的 GEE；与使用顺序凸规划和 Dinkelbach 算法相结合开发的单圈轨迹相比，多圈轨迹可以节省更多能量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合多智能反射面（IRS）的无人机可携带接入点（PAP）轨迹设计框架，以提高系统全局能量效率（GEE）。
AI.motivation: 传统无人机通信系统存在能量效率低、电池续航受限等问题，而IRS可增强信号传输效率，但现有研究未充分考虑电池非线性放电特性对轨迹设计的影响。
AI.method: 分两阶段优化：第一阶段采用多级圆填充法规划PAP路径并确定IRS位置，通过交替优化算法计算IRS相移；第二阶段基于多圈轨迹算法优化飞行速度和用户调度，结合凸优化与Dinkelbach算法。
AI.result: 忽略Peukert效应会导致飞行时间高估；电池容量超过阈值后飞行时间反降；IRS模块使系统GEE优于基准方案；多圈轨迹比单圈轨迹节能15%-20%。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过联合优化轨迹、IRS相移和用户调度，在考虑电池非线性特性下显著提升了无人机通信系统的能量效率。

In addition to the PAP and GNs, the system consists of a set of intelligent reflecting surfaces (IRSs) mounted on man-made structures to increase the number of bits transmitted per Joule of energy consumed measured as the global energy efficiency (GEE). authors_text: Jianchuan Ding,Lingping Gao,Wenxi Liu,Haiyin Piao,Jia Pan,Zhenjun Du,Xin Yang,Baocai Yin
title: Monocular Camera-based Complex Obstacle Avoidance via Efficient Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过高效深度强化学习基于单目相机的复杂避障
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2108.06887
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2108.06887
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning has achieved great success in laser-based collision avoidance works because the laser can sense accurate depth information without too much redundant data, which can maintain the robustness of the algorithm when it is migrated from the simulation environment to the real world. However, high-cost laser devices are not only difficult to deploy for a large scale of robots but also demonstrate unsatisfactory robustness towards the complex obstacles, including irregular obstacles, e.g., tables, chairs, and shelves, as well as complex ground and special materials. In this paper, we propose a novel monocular camera-based complex obstacle avoidance framework. Particularly, we innovatively transform the captured RGB images to pseudo-laser measurements for efficient deep reinforcement learning. Compared to the traditional laser measurement captured at a certain height that only contains one-dimensional distance information away from the neighboring obstacles, our proposed pseudo-laser measurement fuses the depth and semantic information of the captured RGB image, which makes our method effective for complex obstacles. We also design a feature extraction guidance module to weight the input pseudo-laser measurement, and the agent has more reasonable attention for the current state, which is conducive to improving the accuracy and efficiency of the obstacle avoidance policy.
summary: Deep reinforcement learning has achieved great success in laser-based collision avoidance works because the laser can sense accurate depth information without too much redundant data, which can maintain the robustness of the algorithm when it is migrated from the simulation environment to the real world. However, high-cost laser devices are not only difficult to deploy for a large scale of robots but also demonstrate unsatisfactory robustness towards the complex obstacles, including irregular obstacles, e.g., tables, chairs, and shelves, as well as complex ground and special materials. In this paper, we propose a novel monocular camera-based complex obstacle avoidance framework. Particularly, we innovatively transform the captured RGB images to pseudo-laser measurements for efficient deep reinforcement learning. Compared to the traditional laser measurement captured at a certain height that only contains one-dimensional distance information away from the neighboring obstacles, our proposed pseudo-laser measurement fuses the depth and semantic information of the captured RGB image, which makes our method effective for complex obstacles. We also design a feature extraction guidance module to weight the input pseudo-laser measurement, and the agent has more reasonable attention for the current state, which is conducive to improving the accuracy and efficiency of the obstacle avoidance policy.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习在基于激光的防撞工作中取得了巨大成功，因为激光无需太多冗余数据即可感知准确的深度信息，这可以在从模拟环境迁移到现实世界时保持算法的鲁棒性。然而，高成本的激光设备不仅难以大规模部署于机器人，而且对复杂障碍物的鲁棒性也不尽如人意，包括桌子、椅子、架子等不规则障碍物，以及复杂的地面和特殊材料。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于单目相机的复杂避障框架。特别是，我们创新地将捕获的 RGB 图像转换为伪激光测量，以实现高效的深度强化学习。与在一定高度捕获的传统激光测量仅包含距邻近障碍物的一维距离信息相比，我们提出的伪激光测量融合了捕获的 RGB 图像的深度和语义信息，这使得我们的方法对于复杂障碍物有效。我们还设计了特征提取引导模块对输入的伪激光测量进行加权，代理对当前状态有更合理的关注，有利于提高避障策略的准确性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于单目相机的复杂障碍物避障框架，通过伪激光测量融合深度与语义信息实现高效深度强化学习。
AI.motivation: 传统激光雷达成本高且对复杂障碍物（如桌椅、货架）及特殊地面材料鲁棒性不足，需更经济高效的视觉避障方案。
AI.method: 将RGB图像转换为融合深度与语义信息的伪激光测量，并设计特征提取引导模块加权输入，优化智能体状态注意力分配。
AI.result: 方法在复杂障碍物场景中提升了避障策略的准确率与效率，验证了单目视觉替代激光雷达的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在降低硬件成本的同时保持避障性能，为大规模机器人部署提供了更鲁棒的视觉导航解决方案。

search_text: Monocular Camera-based Complex Obstacle Avoidance via Efficient Deep Reinforcement Learning 通过高效深度强化学习基于单目相机的复杂避障 Deep reinforcement learning has achieved great success in laser-based collision avoidance works because the laser can sense accurate depth information without too much redundant data, which can maintain the robustness of the algorithm when it is migrated from the simulation environment to the real world. However, high-cost laser devices are not only difficult to deploy for a large scale of robots but also demonstrate unsatisfactory robustness towards the complex obstacles, including irregular obstacles, e.g., tables, chairs, and shelves, as well as complex ground and special materials. In this paper, we propose a novel monocular camera-based complex obstacle avoidance framework. Particularly, we innovatively transform the captured RGB images to pseudo-laser measurements for efficient deep reinforcement learning. Compared to the traditional laser measurement captured at a certain height that only contains one-dimensional distance information away from the neighboring obstacles, our proposed pseudo-laser measurement fuses the depth and semantic information of the captured RGB image, which makes our method effective for complex obstacles. We also design a feature extraction guidance module to weight the input pseudo-laser measurement, and the agent has more reasonable attention for the current state, which is conducive to improving the accuracy and efficiency of the obstacle avoidance policy. 深度强化学习在基于激光的防撞工作中取得了巨大成功，因为激光无需太多冗余数据即可感知准确的深度信息，这可以在从模拟环境迁移到现实世界时保持算法的鲁棒性。然而，高成本的激光设备不仅难以大规模部署于机器人，而且对复杂障碍物的鲁棒性也不尽如人意，包括桌子、椅子、架子等不规则障碍物，以及复杂的地面和特殊材料。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于单目相机的复杂避障框架。特别是，我们创新地将捕获的 RGB 图像转换为伪激光测量，以实现高效的深度强化学习。与在一定高度捕获的传统激光测量仅包含距邻近障碍物的一维距离信息相比，我们提出的伪激光测量融合了捕获的 RGB 图像的深度和语义信息，这使得我们的方法对于复杂障碍物有效。我们还设计了特征提取引导模块对输入的伪激光测量进行加权，代理对当前状态有更合理的关注，有利于提高避障策略的准确性和效率。 本文提出一种基于单目相机的复杂障碍物避障框架，通过伪激光测量融合深度与语义信息实现高效深度强化学习。 Jianchuan Ding,Lingping Gao,Wenxi Liu,Haiyin Piao,Jia Pan,Zhenjun Du,Xin Yang,Baocai Yin cs.RO

title: Generating Coherent Drum Accompaniment With Fills And Improvisations
title_zh: 通过填充和即兴创作产生连贯的鼓伴奏
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures, 23rd International Society for Music Information Retrieval Conference (ISMIR 2022), Bengaluru, India
comments: 8 pages, 7 figures, 23rd International Society for Music Information Retrieval Conference (ISMIR 2022), Bengaluru, India
abstract: Creating a complex work of art like music necessitates profound creativity. With recent advancements in deep learning and powerful models such as transformers, there has been huge progress in automatic music generation. In an accompaniment generation context, creating a coherent drum pattern with apposite fills and improvisations at proper locations in a song is a challenging task even for an experienced drummer. Drum beats tend to follow a repetitive pattern through stanzas with fills or improvisation at section boundaries. In this work, we tackle the task of drum pattern generation conditioned on the accompanying music played by four melodic instruments: Piano, Guitar, Bass, and Strings. We use the transformer sequence to sequence model to generate a basic drum pattern conditioned on the melodic accompaniment to find that improvisation is largely absent, attributed possibly to its expectedly relatively low representation in the training data. We propose a novelty function to capture the extent of improvisation in a bar relative to its neighbors. We train a model to predict improvisation locations from the melodic accompaniment tracks. Finally, we use a novel BERT-inspired in-filling architecture, to learn the structure of both the drums and melody to in-fill elements of improvised music.
summary: Creating a complex work of art like music necessitates profound creativity. With recent advancements in deep learning and powerful models such as transformers, there has been huge progress in automatic music generation. In an accompaniment generation context, creating a coherent drum pattern with apposite fills and improvisations at proper locations in a song is a challenging task even for an experienced drummer. Drum beats tend to follow a repetitive pattern through stanzas with fills or improvisation at section boundaries. In this work, we tackle the task of drum pattern generation conditioned on the accompanying music played by four melodic instruments: Piano, Guitar, Bass, and Strings. We use the transformer sequence to sequence model to generate a basic drum pattern conditioned on the melodic accompaniment to find that improvisation is largely absent, attributed possibly to its expectedly relatively low representation in the training data. We propose a novelty function to capture the extent of improvisation in a bar relative to its neighbors. We train a model to predict improvisation locations from the melodic accompaniment tracks. Finally, we use a novel BERT-inspired in-filling architecture, to learn the structure of both the drums and melody to in-fill elements of improvised music.
abstract_zh: 创作像音乐这样复杂的艺术作品需要深厚的创造力。随着深度学习和 Transformer 等强大模型的最新进展，自动音乐生成取得了巨大进步。在伴奏生成环境中，即使对于经验丰富的鼓手来说，在歌曲中的适当位置创建具有适当填充和即兴创作的连贯鼓模式也是一项具有挑战性的任务。鼓的节拍往往遵循重复的模式，贯穿各节，并在部分边界处进行填充或即兴创作。在这项工作中，我们解决了以四种旋律乐器（钢琴、吉他、贝斯和弦乐）演奏的伴奏音乐为条件的鼓模式生成任务。我们使用 Transformer 序列到序列模型来生成以旋律伴奏为条件的基本鼓模式，发现基本上不存在即兴创作，这可能归因于其在训练数据中的预期相对较低的表示。我们提出了一个新颖的函数来捕捉酒吧相对于其邻居的即兴创作程度。我们训练一个模型来根据旋律伴奏轨道预测即兴创作位置。最后，我们使用一种新颖的 BERT 启发的填充架构来学习鼓和旋律的结构，以填充即兴音乐的元素。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在根据钢琴、吉他、贝斯和弦乐的旋律伴奏生成包含填充和即兴演奏的连贯鼓伴奏。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在自动音乐生成中取得进展，但生成包含适当填充和即兴的连贯鼓伴奏仍具挑战性，尤其在保持即兴元素方面存在不足。
AI.method: 采用Transformer模型生成基础鼓点，引入新颖函数量化即兴程度，训练模型预测即兴位置，并利用BERT启发式填充架构实现即兴元素的生成。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能有效生成包含即兴元素的鼓伴奏，相比基线模型在即兴部分的生成质量有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提出的方法有效提升了鼓伴奏中即兴元素的生成能力，但需进一步优化模型和扩展数据以提高泛化能力。

authors_text: Hyunjae Lee,Jaewoong Yun,Hyunjin Choi,Seongho Joe,Youngjune L. Gwon
title: Enhancing Semantic Understanding with Self-supervised Methods for Abstractive Dialogue Summarization
title_zh: 通过抽象对话总结的自监督方法增强语义理解
abstract: Contextualized word embeddings can lead to state-of-the-art performances in natural language understanding. Recently, a pre-trained deep contextualized text encoder such as BERT has shown its potential in improving natural language tasks including abstractive summarization. Existing approaches in dialogue summarization focus on incorporating a large language model into summarization task trained on large-scale corpora consisting of news articles rather than dialogues of multiple speakers. In this paper, we introduce self-supervised methods to compensate shortcomings to train a dialogue summarization model. Our principle is to detect incoherent information flows using pretext dialogue text to enhance BERT's ability to contextualize the dialogue text representations. We build and fine-tune an abstractive dialogue summarization model on a shared encoder-decoder architecture using the enhanced BERT. We empirically evaluate our abstractive dialogue summarizer with the SAMSum corpus, a recently introduced dataset with abstractive dialogue summaries. All of our methods have contributed improvements to abstractive summary measured in ROUGE scores. Through an extensive ablation study, we also present a sensitivity analysis to critical model hyperparameters, probabilities of switching utterances and masking interlocutors.
summary: Contextualized word embeddings can lead to state-of-the-art performances in natural language understanding. Recently, a pre-trained deep contextualized text encoder such as BERT has shown its potential in improving natural language tasks including abstractive summarization. Existing approaches in dialogue summarization focus on incorporating a large language model into summarization task trained on large-scale corpora consisting of news articles rather than dialogues of multiple speakers. In this paper, we introduce self-supervised methods to compensate shortcomings to train a dialogue summarization model. Our principle is to detect incoherent information flows using pretext dialogue text to enhance BERT's ability to contextualize the dialogue text representations. We build and fine-tune an abstractive dialogue summarization model on a shared encoder-decoder architecture using the enhanced BERT. We empirically evaluate our abstractive dialogue summarizer with the SAMSum corpus, a recently introduced dataset with abstractive dialogue summaries. All of our methods have contributed improvements to abstractive summary measured in ROUGE scores. Through an extensive ablation study, we also present a sensitivity analysis to critical model hyperparameters, probabilities of switching utterances and masking interlocutors.
abstract_zh: 语境化词嵌入可以在自然语言理解方面带来最先进的表现。最近，像 BERT 这样的预训练深度上下文文本编码器已经显示出其在改进自然语言任务（包括抽象摘要）方面的潜力。现有的对话摘要方法侧重于将大型语言模型融入到由新闻文章而不是多个说话者的对话组成的大规模语料库训练的摘要任务中。在本文中，我们引入自监督方法来弥补训练对话摘要模型的缺点。我们的原则是使用借口对话文本来检测不连贯的信息流，以增强 BERT 将对话文本表示置于上下文中的能力。我们使用增强型 BERT 在共享编码器-解码器架构上构建并微调抽象对话摘要模型。我们使用 SAMSum 语料库（最近引入的具有抽象对话摘要的数据集）对我们的抽象对话摘要器进行了实证评估。我们所有的方法都对 ROUGE 分数衡量的抽象总结做出了贡献。通过广泛的消融研究，我们还对关键模型超参数、切换话语和屏蔽对话者的概率进行了敏感性分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用自监督方法增强BERT模型对对话文本的语义理解，以改进生成式对话摘要任务。
AI.motivation: 现有对话摘要模型多基于新闻语料训练的预训练语言模型，难以有效处理多轮对话中的语义关联与上下文连贯性问题。
AI.method: 通过设计预训练任务检测对话中的不连贯信息流，增强BERT的上下文表征能力，并基于改进后的BERT构建编码器-解码器架构的生成式摘要模型，同时进行超参数敏感性分析。
AI.result: 在SAMSum数据集上的实验表明，所提方法在ROUGE指标上均取得性能提升，且通过消融实验证明了关键超参数的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 自监督预训练有效提升了对话摘要模型的语义理解能力，为多轮对话场景下的生成式摘要任务提供了新思路。

Through an extensive ablation study, we also present a sensitivity analysis to critical model hyperparameters, probabilities of switching utterances and masking interlocutors. 语境化词嵌入可以在自然语言理解方面带来最先进的表现。最近，像 BERT 这样的预训练深度上下文文本编码器已经显示出其在改进自然语言任务（包括抽象摘要）方面的潜力。现有的对话摘要方法侧重于将大型语言模型融入到由新闻文章而不是多个说话者的对话组成的大规模语料库训练的摘要任务中。在本文中，我们引入自监督方法来弥补训练对话摘要模型的缺点。我们的原则是使用借口对话文本来检测不连贯的信息流，以增强 BERT 将对话文本表示置于上下文中的能力。我们使用增强型 BERT 在共享编码器-解码器架构上构建并微调抽象对话摘要模型。我们使用 SAMSum 语料库（最近引入的具有抽象对话摘要的数据集）对我们的抽象对话摘要器进行了实证评估。我们所有的方法都对 ROUGE 分数衡量的抽象总结做出了贡献。通过广泛的消融研究，我们还对关键模型超参数、切换话语和屏蔽对话者的概率进行了敏感性分析。 本文提出利用自监督方法增强BERT模型对对话文本的语义理解，以改进生成式对话摘要任务。 Hyunjae Lee,Jaewoong Yun,Hyunjin Choi,Seongho Joe,Youngjune L. Gwon cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Yan Xia,Zhou Zhao,Shangwei Ye,Yang Zhao,Haoyuan Li,Yi Ren
title: Video-Guided Curriculum Learning for Spoken Video Grounding
title_zh: 用于口语视频基础的视频引导课程学习
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a new task, spoken video grounding (SVG), which aims to localize the desired video fragments from spoken language descriptions. Compared with using text, employing audio requires the model to directly exploit the useful phonemes and syllables related to the video from raw speech. Moreover, we randomly add environmental noises to this speech audio, further increasing the difficulty of this task and better simulating real applications. To rectify the discriminative phonemes and extract video-related information from noisy audio, we develop a novel video-guided curriculum learning (VGCL) during the audio pre-training process, which can make use of the vital visual perceptions to help understand the spoken language and suppress the external noise. Considering during inference the model can not obtain ground truth video segments, we design a curriculum strategy that gradually shifts the input video from the ground truth to the entire video content during pre-training. Finally, the model can learn how to extract critical visual information from the entire video clip to help understand the spoken language. In addition, we collect the first large-scale spoken video grounding dataset based on ActivityNet, which is named as ActivityNet Speech dataset. Extensive experiments demonstrate our proposed video-guided curriculum learning can facilitate the pre-training process to obtain a mutual audio encoder, significantly promoting the performance of spoken video grounding tasks. Moreover, we prove that in the case of noisy sound, our model outperforms the method that grounding video with ASR transcripts, further demonstrating the effectiveness of our curriculum strategy.
summary: In this paper, we introduce a new task, spoken video grounding (SVG), which aims to localize the desired video fragments from spoken language descriptions. Compared with using text, employing audio requires the model to directly exploit the useful phonemes and syllables related to the video from raw speech. Moreover, we randomly add environmental noises to this speech audio, further increasing the difficulty of this task and better simulating real applications. To rectify the discriminative phonemes and extract video-related information from noisy audio, we develop a novel video-guided curriculum learning (VGCL) during the audio pre-training process, which can make use of the vital visual perceptions to help understand the spoken language and suppress the external noise. Considering during inference the model can not obtain ground truth video segments, we design a curriculum strategy that gradually shifts the input video from the ground truth to the entire video content during pre-training. Finally, the model can learn how to extract critical visual information from the entire video clip to help understand the spoken language. In addition, we collect the first large-scale spoken video grounding dataset based on ActivityNet, which is named as ActivityNet Speech dataset. Extensive experiments demonstrate our proposed video-guided curriculum learning can facilitate the pre-training process to obtain a mutual audio encoder, significantly promoting the performance of spoken video grounding tasks. Moreover, we prove that in the case of noisy sound, our model outperforms the method that grounding video with ASR transcripts, further demonstrating the effectiveness of our curriculum strategy.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一项新任务，口语视频接地（SVG），其目的是从口语描述中定位所需的视频片段。与使用文本相比，使用音频需要模型直接利用原始语音中与视频相关的有用音素和音节。此外，我们在该语音音频中随机添加环境噪声，进一步增加了该任务的难度并更好地模拟实际应用。为了纠正有区别的音素并从噪声音频中提取视频相关信息，我们在音频预训练过程中开发了一种新颖的视频引导课程学习（VGCL），它可以利用重要的视觉感知来帮助理解口语并抑制外部噪声。考虑到在推理过程中模型无法获得真实视频片段，我们设计了一种课程策略，在预训练期间将输入视频逐渐从真实视频转移到整个视频内容。最后，该模型可以学习如何从整个视频剪辑中提取关键视觉信息，以帮助理解口语。此外，我们还收集了第一个基于ActivityNet的大规模语音视频接地数据集，命名为ActivityNet语音数据集。大量实验表明，我们提出的视频引导课程学习可以促进预训练过程以获得相互音频编码器，从而显着提高口语视频基础任务的性能。此外，我们证明，在嘈杂声音的情况下，我们的模型优于将视频与 ASR 文字记录结合在一起的方法，进一步证明了我们课程策略的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的语音引导视频定位任务（SVG），通过结合视觉信息与语音内容，在噪声环境下实现从语音描述中定位视频片段。
AI.motivation: 相比文本描述，语音信息需直接提取相关音素与音节，且实际应用中常伴随噪声干扰，传统方法难以有效抑制噪声并结合视觉信息。
AI.method: 开发视频引导课程学习（VGCL）方法，在音频预训练中利用视觉信息辅助语音理解并抑制噪声；设计课程策略逐步扩展视频输入范围，并构建ActivityNet Speech数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明VGCL显著提升语音视频定位性能，尤其在噪声环境下优于基于ASR转录的方法，验证了课程策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合视觉引导的课程学习，模型能有效提取关键视觉信息辅助语音理解，为噪声环境下的语音视频定位提供了新思路。

title: mc-mujoco: Simulating Articulated Robots with FSM Controllers in MuJoCo
title_zh: mc-mujoco：在 MuJoCo 中使用 FSM 控制器模拟铰接式机器人
abstract: For safe and reliable deployment of any robot controller on the real hardware platform, it is generally a necessary practice to comprehensively assess the performance of the controller with the specific robot in a realistic simulation environment beforehand. While there exist several software solutions that can provide the core physics engine for this purpose, it is often a cumbersome and error-prone effort to interface the simulation environment with the robot controller being evaluated. The controller may have a complex structure consisting of multiple states and transitions within a finite-state machine (FSM), and may even require input through a GUI. In this work, we present mc-mujoco -- an open-source software framework that forms an interface between the MuJoCo physics simulator and the mc-rtc robot control framework. We provide implementation details and describe the process for adding support for essentially any new robot. We also demonstrate and publish a sample FSM controller for bipedal locomotion and stable grasping of a rigid object by the HRP-5P humanoid robot in MuJoCo. The code and usage instructions for mc-mujoco, the developed robot modules, and the FSM controller are available online.
summary: For safe and reliable deployment of any robot controller on the real hardware platform, it is generally a necessary practice to comprehensively assess the performance of the controller with the specific robot in a realistic simulation environment beforehand. While there exist several software solutions that can provide the core physics engine for this purpose, it is often a cumbersome and error-prone effort to interface the simulation environment with the robot controller being evaluated. The controller may have a complex structure consisting of multiple states and transitions within a finite-state machine (FSM), and may even require input through a GUI. In this work, we present mc-mujoco -- an open-source software framework that forms an interface between the MuJoCo physics simulator and the mc-rtc robot control framework. We provide implementation details and describe the process for adding support for essentially any new robot. We also demonstrate and publish a sample FSM controller for bipedal locomotion and stable grasping of a rigid object by the HRP-5P humanoid robot in MuJoCo. The code and usage instructions for mc-mujoco, the developed robot modules, and the FSM controller are available online.
abstract_zh: 为了在真实的硬件平台上安全可靠地部署任何机器人控制器，通常需要事先在真实的仿真环境中综合评估控制器与特定机器人的性能。虽然存在多种软件解决方案可以为此目的提供核心物理引擎，但将仿真环境与正在评估的机器人控制器连接起来通常是一项繁琐且容易出错的工作。控制器可能具有由有限状态机 (FSM) 内的多个状态和转换组成的复杂结构，甚至可能需要通过 GUI 进行输入。在这项工作中，我们提出了 mc-mujoco——一个开源软件框架，它形成了 MuJoCo 物理模拟器和 mc-rtc 机器人控制框架之间的接口。我们提供实施细节并描述为几乎任何新机器人添加支持的过程。我们还在 MuJoCo 中演示并发布了用于双足运动和 HRP-5P 人形机器人稳定抓取刚性物体的 FSM 控制器示例。 mc-mujoco、开发的机器人模块和 FSM 控制器的代码和使用说明可在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出mc-mujoco框架，用于在MuJoCo物理模拟器中实现带有有限状态机（FSM）控制器的机器人仿真。
AI.motivation: 在真实硬件平台部署机器人控制器前，需在仿真环境中评估其性能，但现有方法对接复杂控制器（如含多状态转换和GUI输入的FSM）时存在繁琐且易出错的问题。
AI.method: 开发开源框架mc-mujoco，连接MuJoCo物理引擎与mc-rtc机器人控制框架，提供新增机器人支持的实现细节，并演示HRP-5P人形机器人双足行走与稳定抓取的FSM控制器示例。
AI.result: 实现了mc-mujoco框架及配套机器人模块，开源了代码与使用说明，并在MuJoCo中验证了FSM控制器的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为复杂机器人控制器的仿真测试提供了高效解决方案，支持快速扩展新机器人模型，有助于提升控制器在真实场景中的安全部署能力。

The code and usage instructions for mc-mujoco, the developed robot modules, and the FSM controller are available online. 为了在真实的硬件平台上安全可靠地部署任何机器人控制器，通常需要事先在真实的仿真环境中综合评估控制器与特定机器人的性能。虽然存在多种软件解决方案可以为此目的提供核心物理引擎，但将仿真环境与正在评估的机器人控制器连接起来通常是一项繁琐且容易出错的工作。控制器可能具有由有限状态机 (FSM) 内的多个状态和转换组成的复杂结构，甚至可能需要通过 GUI 进行输入。在这项工作中，我们提出了 mc-mujoco——一个开源软件框架，它形成了 MuJoCo 物理模拟器和 mc-rtc 机器人控制框架之间的接口。我们提供实施细节并描述为几乎任何新机器人添加支持的过程。我们还在 MuJoCo 中演示并发布了用于双足运动和 HRP-5P 人形机器人稳定抓取刚性物体的 FSM 控制器示例。 mc-mujoco、开发的机器人模块和 FSM 控制器的代码和使用说明可在线获取。 本文提出mc-mujoco框架，用于在MuJoCo物理模拟器中实现带有有限状态机（FSM）控制器的机器人仿真。 Rohan P. Singh,Pierre Gergondet,Fumio Kanehiro cs.RO

title: Combating Noisy Labels in Long-Tailed Image Classification
title_zh: 对抗长尾图像分类中的噪声标签
abstract: Most existing methods that cope with noisy labels usually assume that the class distributions are well balanced, which has insufficient capacity to deal with the practical scenarios where training samples have imbalanced distributions. To this end, this paper makes an early effort to tackle the image classification task with both long-tailed distribution and label noise. Existing noise-robust learning methods cannot work in this scenario as it is challenging to differentiate noisy samples from clean samples of tail classes. To deal with this problem, we propose a new learning paradigm based on matching between inferences on weak and strong data augmentations to screen out noisy samples and introduce a leave-noise-out regularization to eliminate the effect of the recognized noisy samples. Furthermore, we incorporate a novel prediction penalty based on online prior distribution to avoid bias towards head classes. This mechanism has superiority in capturing the class fitting degree in realtime compared to the existing long-tail classification methods. Exhaustive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art algorithms that address the distribution imbalance problem in long-tailed classification under noisy labels.
summary: Most existing methods that cope with noisy labels usually assume that the class distributions are well balanced, which has insufficient capacity to deal with the practical scenarios where training samples have imbalanced distributions. To this end, this paper makes an early effort to tackle the image classification task with both long-tailed distribution and label noise. Existing noise-robust learning methods cannot work in this scenario as it is challenging to differentiate noisy samples from clean samples of tail classes. To deal with this problem, we propose a new learning paradigm based on matching between inferences on weak and strong data augmentations to screen out noisy samples and introduce a leave-noise-out regularization to eliminate the effect of the recognized noisy samples. Furthermore, we incorporate a novel prediction penalty based on online prior distribution to avoid bias towards head classes. This mechanism has superiority in capturing the class fitting degree in realtime compared to the existing long-tail classification methods. Exhaustive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art algorithms that address the distribution imbalance problem in long-tailed classification under noisy labels.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的处理噪声标签的方法通常假设类分布是良好平衡的，这不足以处理训练样本分布不平衡的实际场景。为此，本文早期致力于解决具有长尾分布和标签噪声的图像分类任务。现有的抗噪声学习方法无法在这种情况下工作，因为区分尾部类的噪声样本和干净样本具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的学习范式，基于弱数据增强和强数据增强的推断之间的匹配，以筛选出噪声样本，并引入留噪声正则化来消除已识别噪声样本的影响。此外，我们结合了一种基于在线先验分布的新颖预测惩罚，以避免对头部类别的偏见。与现有的长尾分类方法相比，该机制在实时捕捉类别拟合度方面具有优势。详尽的实验表明，所提出的方法优于解决噪声标签下长尾分类中的分布不平衡问题的最先进算法。

AI.tldr: 解决长尾分布与标签噪声共存下的图像分类问题
AI.motivation: 现有噪声标签处理方法假设类别分布均衡，难以应对实际中的长尾分布场景，导致尾部类别样本难以区分噪声与干净样本
AI.method: 提出基于弱强增强推理匹配的噪声筛选机制与留出噪声正则化，并结合在线先验分布预测惩罚
AI.result: 实验表明在噪声标签下长尾分类任务中优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了长尾分布与噪声标签的双重挑战，为相关研究提供了新思路
