authors_text: Golnaz Badkobeh,Alessandro De Luca,Gabriele Fici,Simon Puglisi
title: Maximal Closed Substrings
title_zh: 最大闭子串
abstract: A string is closed if it has length 1 or has a nonempty border without internal occurrences. In this paper we introduce the definition of a \emph{maximal closed substring} (MCS), which is an occurrence of a closed substring that cannot be extended to the left nor to the right into a longer closed substring. MCSs with exponent at least $2$ are commonly called \emph{runs}; those with exponent smaller than $2$, instead, are particular cases of \emph{maximal gapped repeats}. We provide an algorithm that, given a string of length $n$ locates all MCSs the string contains in $\mathcal O(n\log n)$ time.
summary: A string is closed if it has length 1 or has a nonempty border without internal occurrences. In this paper we introduce the definition of a \emph{maximal closed substring} (MCS), which is an occurrence of a closed substring that cannot be extended to the left nor to the right into a longer closed substring. MCSs with exponent at least $2$ are commonly called \emph{runs}; those with exponent smaller than $2$, instead, are particular cases of \emph{maximal gapped repeats}. We provide an algorithm that, given a string of length $n$ locates all MCSs the string contains in $\mathcal O(n\log n)$ time.
abstract_zh: 如果字符串的长度为 1 或具有非空边框且没有内部出现，则该字符串是闭合的。在本文中，我们介绍了\emph{最大闭合子串}（MCS）的定义，它是不能向左或向右扩展为更长闭合子串的闭合子串的出现。指数至少为 $2$ 的 MCS 通常称为 \emph{runs}；相反，指数小于 $2$ 的那些是 \emph{最大间隙重复} 的特殊情况。我们提供了一种算法，给定长度为 $n$ 的字符串，可以在 $\mathcal O(n\log n)$ 时间内找到该字符串包含的所有 MCS。

AI.tldr: 本文引入了最大闭合子串（MCS）的概念，并设计了一个在O(n log n)时间内定位所有MCS的算法。
AI.motivation: 闭合子串在字符串学中具有重要性质，但其最大扩展形式的研究尚需高效算法支持。
AI.method: 通过分析闭合子串的边界特性，结合字符串匹配技术设计分治算法。
AI.result: 成功开发出可在O(n log n)时间内准确识别所有MCS的算法。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为研究闭合子串的结构特性提供了高效工具，推进了相关理论的发展。

title: Attention Enhanced Citrinet for Speech Recognition
title_zh: 用于语音识别的注意力增强型 Citrinet
abstract: Citrinet is an end-to-end convolutional Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) based automatic speech recognition (ASR) model. To capture local and global contextual information, 1D time-channel separable convolutions combined with sub-word encoding and squeeze-and-excitation (SE) are used in Citrinet, making the whole architecture to be as deep as including 23 blocks with 235 convolution layers and 46 linear layers. This pure convolutional and deep architecture makes Critrinet relatively slow at convergence. In this paper, we propose to introduce multi-head attentions together with feed-forward networks in the convolution module in Citrinet blocks while keeping the SE module and residual module unchanged. For speeding up, we remove 8 convolution layers in each attention-enhanced Citrinet block and reduce 23 blocks to 13. Experiments on the Japanese CSJ-500h and Magic-1600h dataset show that the attention-enhanced Citrinet with less layers and blocks and converges faster with lower character error rates than (1) Citrinet with 80\% training time and (2) Conformer with 40\% training time and 29.8\% model size.
summary: Citrinet is an end-to-end convolutional Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) based automatic speech recognition (ASR) model. To capture local and global contextual information, 1D time-channel separable convolutions combined with sub-word encoding and squeeze-and-excitation (SE) are used in Citrinet, making the whole architecture to be as deep as including 23 blocks with 235 convolution layers and 46 linear layers. This pure convolutional and deep architecture makes Critrinet relatively slow at convergence. In this paper, we propose to introduce multi-head attentions together with feed-forward networks in the convolution module in Citrinet blocks while keeping the SE module and residual module unchanged. For speeding up, we remove 8 convolution layers in each attention-enhanced Citrinet block and reduce 23 blocks to 13. Experiments on the Japanese CSJ-500h and Magic-1600h dataset show that the attention-enhanced Citrinet with less layers and blocks and converges faster with lower character error rates than (1) Citrinet with 80\% training time and (2) Conformer with 40\% training time and 29.8\% model size.
abstract_zh: Citrinet 是一种基于端到端卷积联结时间分类 (CTC) 的自动语音识别 (ASR) 模型。为了捕获局部和全局上下文信息，Citrinet 中使用了 1D 时间通道可分离卷积与子字编码和挤压激励 (SE) 相结合，使得整个架构的深度包括 23 个块、235 个卷积层和 46 个线性层。这种纯卷积和深度架构使得 Critrinet 的收敛速度相对较慢。在本文中，我们建议在 Citrinet 块的卷积模块中引入多头注意力和前馈网络，同时保持 SE 模块和残差模块不变。为了加快速度，我们删除了每个注意力增强型 Citrinet 块中的 8 个卷积层，并将 23 个块减少到 13 个。在日本 CSJ-500h 和 Magic-1600h 数据集上的实验表明，与（1）训练时间为 80% 的 Citrinet 和（2）训练时间为 40% 的 Conformer 相比，注意力增强型 Citrinet 具有更少的层数和块，并且收敛速度更快，字符错误率更低。 29.8% 模型大小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的Citrinet模型，通过引入多头注意力机制和前馈网络以提升语音识别效率。
AI.motivation: 原始Citrinet模型因深度过大导致收敛速度慢，且计算成本高，需在保持性能的同时优化模型效率。
AI.method: 在Citrinet卷积模块中加入多头注意力和前馈网络，保留SE模块和残差结构，同时减少卷积层数和模块数量（23块→13块）。
AI.result: 在日语数据集上，改进模型在训练时间减少80%时仍优于原Citrinet，在训练时间减少40%且模型体积缩小29.8%时优于Conformer模型。
AI.conclusion: 注意力增强的Citrinet在保持低词错误率的同时显著提升了收敛速度，证明了注意力机制与卷积架构结合的有效性。

search_text: Attention Enhanced Citrinet for Speech Recognition 用于语音识别的注意力增强型 Citrinet Citrinet is an end-to-end convolutional Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) based automatic speech recognition (ASR) model. To capture local and global contextual information, 1D time-channel separable convolutions combined with sub-word encoding and squeeze-and-excitation (SE) are used in Citrinet, making the whole architecture to be as deep as including 23 blocks with 235 convolution layers and 46 linear layers. This pure convolutional and deep architecture makes Critrinet relatively slow at convergence. In this paper, we propose to introduce multi-head attentions together with feed-forward networks in the convolution module in Citrinet blocks while keeping the SE module and residual module unchanged. For speeding up, we remove 8 convolution layers in each attention-enhanced Citrinet block and reduce 23 blocks to 13. Experiments on the Japanese CSJ-500h and Magic-1600h dataset show that the attention-enhanced Citrinet with less layers and blocks and converges faster with lower character error rates than (1) Citrinet with 80\% training time and (2) Conformer with 40\% training time and 29.8\% model size. Citrinet 是一种基于端到端卷积联结时间分类 (CTC) 的自动语音识别 (ASR) 模型。为了捕获局部和全局上下文信息，Citrinet 中使用了 1D 时间通道可分离卷积与子字编码和挤压激励 (SE) 相结合，使得整个架构的深度包括 23 个块、235 个卷积层和 46 个线性层。这种纯卷积和深度架构使得 Critrinet 的收敛速度相对较慢。在本文中，我们建议在 Citrinet 块的卷积模块中引入多头注意力和前馈网络，同时保持 SE 模块和残差模块不变。为了加快速度，我们删除了每个注意力增强型 Citrinet 块中的 8 个卷积层，并将 23 个块减少到 13 个。在日本 CSJ-500h 和 Magic-1600h 数据集上的实验表明，与（1）训练时间为 80% 的 Citrinet 和（2）训练时间为 40% 的 Conformer 相比，注意力增强型 Citrinet 具有更少的层数和块，并且收敛速度更快，字符错误率更低。 29.8% 模型大小。 本文提出了一种改进的Citrinet模型，通过引入多头注意力机制和前馈网络以提升语音识别效率。 Xianchao Wu cs.CL,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

title: Deep Sparse Conformer for Speech Recognition
title_zh: 用于语音识别的深度稀疏一致性
abstract: Conformer has achieved impressive results in Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) by leveraging transformer's capturing of content-based global interactions and convolutional neural network's exploiting of local features. In Conformer, two macaron-like feed-forward layers with half-step residual connections sandwich the multi-head self-attention and convolution modules followed by a post layer normalization. We improve Conformer's long-sequence representation ability in two directions, \emph{sparser} and \emph{deeper}. We adapt a sparse self-attention mechanism with $\mathcal{O}(L\text{log}L)$ in time complexity and memory usage. A deep normalization strategy is utilized when performing residual connections to ensure our training of hundred-level Conformer blocks. On the Japanese CSJ-500h dataset, this deep sparse Conformer achieves respectively CERs of 5.52\%, 4.03\% and 4.50\% on the three evaluation sets and 4.16\%, 2.84\% and 3.20\% when ensembling five deep sparse Conformer variants from 12 to 16, 17, 50, and finally 100 encoder layers.
summary: Conformer has achieved impressive results in Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) by leveraging transformer's capturing of content-based global interactions and convolutional neural network's exploiting of local features. In Conformer, two macaron-like feed-forward layers with half-step residual connections sandwich the multi-head self-attention and convolution modules followed by a post layer normalization. We improve Conformer's long-sequence representation ability in two directions, \emph{sparser} and \emph{deeper}. We adapt a sparse self-attention mechanism with $\mathcal{O}(L\text{log}L)$ in time complexity and memory usage. A deep normalization strategy is utilized when performing residual connections to ensure our training of hundred-level Conformer blocks. On the Japanese CSJ-500h dataset, this deep sparse Conformer achieves respectively CERs of 5.52\%, 4.03\% and 4.50\% on the three evaluation sets and 4.16\%, 2.84\% and 3.20\% when ensembling five deep sparse Conformer variants from 12 to 16, 17, 50, and finally 100 encoder layers.
abstract_zh: Conformer 通过利用 Transformer 捕获基于内容的全局交互和卷积神经网络利用局部特征，在自动语音识别 (ASR) 方面取得了令人印象深刻的成果。在 Conformer 中，两个具有半步残差连接的类似马卡龙的前馈层将多头自注意力和卷积模块夹在中间，然后进行后层归一化。我们在 \emph{sparser} 和 \emph{deeper} 两个方向上提高了 Conformer 的长序列表示能力。我们在时间复杂度和内存使用方面采用了 $\mathcal{O}(L\text{log}L)$ 的稀疏自注意力机制。在执行残差连接时采用深度归一化策略，以确保我们训练百级 Conformer 块。在日本 CSJ-500h 数据集上，该深度稀疏 Conformer 在三个评估集上分别实现了 5.52\%、4.03\% 和 4.50\% 的 CER，当从 12 到 16、17、50、最后 100 个编码器层集成五个深度稀疏 Conformer 变体时，分别实现了 4.16\%、2.84\% 和 3.20\%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的深度稀疏Conformer模型，旨在提升语音识别中的长序列表示能力。
AI.motivation: 传统Conformer在处理长序列时存在计算复杂度高和训练困难的问题，需通过稀疏化和深度化改进模型效率与性能。
AI.method: 采用时间复杂度为O(L log L)的稀疏自注意力机制，并引入深度归一化策略以支持数百层Conformer块的训练。
AI.result: 在日语CSJ-500h数据集上，模型在三个评估集上的字符错误率（CER）分别为5.52%、4.03%、4.50%，集成五种变体后进一步降至4.16%、2.84%、3.20%。
AI.conclusion: 深度稀疏Conformer通过稀疏注意力与深度归一化策略有效提升了语音识别的长序列建模能力与训练稳定性。

authors_text: Zicheng Zhang,Wei Sun,Xiongkuo Min,Quan Zhou,Jun He,Qiyuan Wang,Guangtao Zhai
title: MM-PCQA: Multi-Modal Learning for No-reference Point Cloud Quality Assessment
title_zh: MM-PCQA：无参考点云质量评估的多模态学习
abstract: The visual quality of point clouds has been greatly emphasized since the ever-increasing 3D vision applications are expected to provide cost-effective and high-quality experiences for users. Looking back on the development of point cloud quality assessment (PCQA) methods, the visual quality is usually evaluated by utilizing single-modal information, i.e., either extracted from the 2D projections or 3D point cloud. The 2D projections contain rich texture and semantic information but are highly dependent on viewpoints, while the 3D point clouds are more sensitive to geometry distortions and invariant to viewpoints. Therefore, to leverage the advantages of both point cloud and projected image modalities, we propose a novel no-reference point cloud quality assessment (NR-PCQA) metric in a multi-modal fashion. In specific, we split the point clouds into sub-models to represent local geometry distortions such as point shift and down-sampling. Then we render the point clouds into 2D image projections for texture feature extraction. To achieve the goals, the sub-models and projected images are encoded with point-based and image-based neural networks. Finally, symmetric cross-modal attention is employed to fuse multi-modal quality-aware information. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms all compared state-of-the-art methods and is far ahead of previous NR-PCQA methods, which highlights the effectiveness of the proposed method. The code is available at https://github.com/zzc-1998/MM-PCQA.
summary: The visual quality of point clouds has been greatly emphasized since the ever-increasing 3D vision applications are expected to provide cost-effective and high-quality experiences for users. Looking back on the development of point cloud quality assessment (PCQA) methods, the visual quality is usually evaluated by utilizing single-modal information, i.e., either extracted from the 2D projections or 3D point cloud. The 2D projections contain rich texture and semantic information but are highly dependent on viewpoints, while the 3D point clouds are more sensitive to geometry distortions and invariant to viewpoints. Therefore, to leverage the advantages of both point cloud and projected image modalities, we propose a novel no-reference point cloud quality assessment (NR-PCQA) metric in a multi-modal fashion. In specific, we split the point clouds into sub-models to represent local geometry distortions such as point shift and down-sampling. Then we render the point clouds into 2D image projections for texture feature extraction. To achieve the goals, the sub-models and projected images are encoded with point-based and image-based neural networks. Finally, symmetric cross-modal attention is employed to fuse multi-modal quality-aware information. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms all compared state-of-the-art methods and is far ahead of previous NR-PCQA methods, which highlights the effectiveness of the proposed method. The code is available at https://github.com/zzc-1998/MM-PCQA.
abstract_zh: 随着不断增长的3D视觉应用有望为用户提供经济高效、高质量的体验，点云的视觉质量受到了极大的重视。回顾点云质量评估（PCQA）方法的发展，视觉质量通常是利用单模态信息进行评估，即从 2D 投影或 3D 点云中提取。 2D 投影包含丰富的纹理和语义信息，但高度依赖于视点，而 3D 点云对几何变形更敏感，并且对视点具有不变性。因此，为了利用点云和投影图像模态的优势，我们以多模态方式提出了一种新颖的无参考点云质量评估（NR-PCQA）指标。具体来说，我们将点云分割成子模型来表示局部几何变形，例如点移位和下采样。然后我们将点云渲染为二维图像投影以进行纹理特征提取。为了实现这些目标，子模型和投影图像使用基于点和基于图像的神经网络进行编码。最后，采用对称跨模态注意力来融合多模态质量感知信息。实验结果表明，我们的方法优于所有最先进的方法，并且远远领先于之前的 NR-PCQA 方法，这凸显了该方法的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/zzc-1998/MM-PCQA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态无参考点云质量评估方法MM-PCQA，通过融合点云几何信息与2D投影纹理特征提升评估效果。
AI.motivation: 现有单模态点云质量评估方法存在局限：2D投影依赖视角且缺乏几何敏感性，3D点云虽几何敏感但丢失纹理信息，需融合多模态优势以提升评估准确性。
AI.method: 将点云分割为子模型捕捉局部几何失真，渲染生成2D图像提取纹理特征，分别通过点云神经网络和图像神经网络编码，利用对称交叉模态注意力机制融合多模态质量信息。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有无参考点云质量评估方法，验证了多模态融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合点云几何特征与2D纹理信息的多模态学习框架，MM-PCQA有效提升了无参考点云质量评估性能，代码已开源。

authors_text: Guang Yang,Wu Liu,Xinchen Liu,Xiaoyan Gu,Juan Cao,Jintao Li
title: Delving into the Frequency: Temporally Consistent Human Motion Transfer in the Fourier Space
title_zh: 深入研究频率：傅立叶空间中时间一致的人体运动传递
abstract: Human motion transfer refers to synthesizing photo-realistic and temporally coherent videos that enable one person to imitate the motion of others. However, current synthetic videos suffer from the temporal inconsistency in sequential frames that significantly degrades the video quality, yet is far from solved by existing methods in the pixel domain. Recently, some works on DeepFake detection try to distinguish the natural and synthetic images in the frequency domain because of the frequency insufficiency of image synthesizing methods. Nonetheless, there is no work to study the temporal inconsistency of synthetic videos from the aspects of the frequency-domain gap between natural and synthetic videos. In this paper, we propose to delve into the frequency space for temporally consistent human motion transfer. First of all, we make the first comprehensive analysis of natural and synthetic videos in the frequency domain to reveal the frequency gap in both the spatial dimension of individual frames and the temporal dimension of the video. To close the frequency gap between the natural and synthetic videos, we propose a novel Frequency-based human MOtion TRansfer framework, named FreMOTR, which can effectively mitigate the spatial artifacts and the temporal inconsistency of the synthesized videos. FreMOTR explores two novel frequency-based regularization modules: 1) the Frequency-domain Appearance Regularization (FAR) to improve the appearance of the person in individual frames and 2) Temporal Frequency Regularization (TFR) to guarantee the temporal consistency between adjacent frames. Finally, comprehensive experiments demonstrate that the FreMOTR not only yields superior performance in temporal consistency metrics but also improves the frame-level visual quality of synthetic videos. In particular, the temporal consistency metrics are improved by nearly 30% than the state-of-the-art model.
summary: Human motion transfer refers to synthesizing photo-realistic and temporally coherent videos that enable one person to imitate the motion of others. However, current synthetic videos suffer from the temporal inconsistency in sequential frames that significantly degrades the video quality, yet is far from solved by existing methods in the pixel domain. Recently, some works on DeepFake detection try to distinguish the natural and synthetic images in the frequency domain because of the frequency insufficiency of image synthesizing methods. Nonetheless, there is no work to study the temporal inconsistency of synthetic videos from the aspects of the frequency-domain gap between natural and synthetic videos. In this paper, we propose to delve into the frequency space for temporally consistent human motion transfer. First of all, we make the first comprehensive analysis of natural and synthetic videos in the frequency domain to reveal the frequency gap in both the spatial dimension of individual frames and the temporal dimension of the video. To close the frequency gap between the natural and synthetic videos, we propose a novel Frequency-based human MOtion TRansfer framework, named FreMOTR, which can effectively mitigate the spatial artifacts and the temporal inconsistency of the synthesized videos. FreMOTR explores two novel frequency-based regularization modules: 1) the Frequency-domain Appearance Regularization (FAR) to improve the appearance of the person in individual frames and 2) Temporal Frequency Regularization (TFR) to guarantee the temporal consistency between adjacent frames. Finally, comprehensive experiments demonstrate that the FreMOTR not only yields superior performance in temporal consistency metrics but also improves the frame-level visual quality of synthetic videos. In particular, the temporal consistency metrics are improved by nearly 30% than the state-of-the-art model.
abstract_zh: 人体动作转移是指合成逼真且时间连贯的视频，使一个人能够模仿他人的动作。然而，当前的合成视频存在连续帧中的时间不一致问题，这显着降低了视频质量，但像素域中的现有方法还远远没有解决这一问题。最近，由于图像合成方法的频率不足，一些关于 DeepFake 检测的工作尝试在频域中区分自然图像和合成图像。尽管如此，还没有从自然视频和合成视频之间的频域差距方面研究合成视频的时间不一致性的工作。在本文中，我们建议深入研究频率空间以实现时间一致的人体运动传输。首先，我们对频域中的自然视频和合成视频进行首次综合分析，以揭示各个帧的空间维度和视频的时间维度上的频率差距。为了缩小自然视频和合成视频之间的频率差距，我们提出了一种新颖的基于频率的人体运动传输框架，名为 FreMOTR，它可以有效减轻合成视频的空间伪影和时间不一致。 FreMOTR 探索了两种新颖的基于频率的正则化模块：1）频域外观正则化（FAR），以改善单个帧中人物的外观；2）时间频率正则化（TFR），以保证相邻帧之间的时间一致性。最后，综合实验表明，FreMOTR 不仅在时间一致性指标方面具有优异的性能，而且还提高了合成视频的帧级视觉质量。特别是，时间一致性指标比最先进的模型提高了近 30%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于频率域的框架FreMOTR，通过分析自然与合成视频在频率域的差异，解决人体运动迁移中的时间不一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有合成视频在时间维度上存在帧间不一致问题，且未有研究从频率域角度分析自然与合成视频的差异以改进时间一致性。
AI.method: 提出FreMOTR框架，包含频率域外观正则化（FAR）和时序频率正则化（TFR）模块，分别优化单帧视觉质量与时序连贯性。
AI.result: 在时间一致性指标上较最先进模型提升近30%，同时显著改善合成视频的帧级视觉质量。
AI.conclusion: 通过频率域分析与正则化设计，FreMOTR有效弥合了自然与合成视频的频率差异，实现了更高质量的时间一致运动迁移。

Nonetheless, there is no work to study the temporal inconsistency of synthetic videos from the aspects of the frequency-domain gap between natural and synthetic videos. First of all, we make the first comprehensive analysis of natural and synthetic videos in the frequency domain to reveal the frequency gap in both the spatial dimension of individual frames and the temporal dimension of the video. To close the frequency gap between the natural and synthetic videos, we propose a novel Frequency-based human MOtion TRansfer framework, named FreMOTR, which can effectively mitigate the spatial artifacts and the temporal inconsistency of the synthesized videos. FreMOTR explores two novel frequency-based regularization modules: 1) the Frequency-domain Appearance Regularization (FAR) to improve the appearance of the person in individual frames and 2) Temporal Frequency Regularization (TFR) to guarantee the temporal consistency between adjacent frames. Finally, comprehensive experiments demonstrate that the FreMOTR not only yields superior performance in temporal consistency metrics but also improves the frame-level visual quality of synthetic videos. authors_text: Pourya Shamsolmoali,Masoumeh Zareapoor,Swagatam Das,Eric Granger,Salvador Garcia
title: Hybrid Gromov-Wasserstein Embedding for Capsule Learning
title_zh: 用于胶囊学习的混合 Gromov-Wasserstein 嵌入
abstract: Capsule networks (CapsNets) aim to parse images into a hierarchy of objects, parts, and their relations using a two-step process involving part-whole transformation and hierarchical component routing. However, this hierarchical relationship modeling is computationally expensive, which has limited the wider use of CapsNet despite its potential advantages. The current state of CapsNet models primarily focuses on comparing their performance with capsule baselines, falling short of achieving the same level of proficiency as deep CNN variants in intricate tasks. To address this limitation, we present an efficient approach for learning capsules that surpasses canonical baseline models and even demonstrates superior performance compared to high-performing convolution models. Our contribution can be outlined in two aspects: firstly, we introduce a group of subcapsules onto which an input vector is projected. Subsequently, we present the Hybrid Gromov-Wasserstein framework, which initially quantifies the dissimilarity between the input and the components modeled by the subcapsules, followed by determining their alignment degree through optimal transport. This innovative mechanism capitalizes on new insights into defining alignment between the input and subcapsules, based on the similarity of their respective component distributions. This approach enhances CapsNets' capacity to learn from intricate, high-dimensional data while retaining their interpretability and hierarchical structure. Our proposed model offers two distinct advantages: (i) its lightweight nature facilitates the application of capsules to more intricate vision tasks, including object detection; (ii) it outperforms baseline approaches in these demanding tasks.
summary: Capsule networks (CapsNets) aim to parse images into a hierarchy of objects, parts, and their relations using a two-step process involving part-whole transformation and hierarchical component routing. However, this hierarchical relationship modeling is computationally expensive, which has limited the wider use of CapsNet despite its potential advantages. The current state of CapsNet models primarily focuses on comparing their performance with capsule baselines, falling short of achieving the same level of proficiency as deep CNN variants in intricate tasks. To address this limitation, we present an efficient approach for learning capsules that surpasses canonical baseline models and even demonstrates superior performance compared to high-performing convolution models. Our contribution can be outlined in two aspects: firstly, we introduce a group of subcapsules onto which an input vector is projected. Subsequently, we present the Hybrid Gromov-Wasserstein framework, which initially quantifies the dissimilarity between the input and the components modeled by the subcapsules, followed by determining their alignment degree through optimal transport. This innovative mechanism capitalizes on new insights into defining alignment between the input and subcapsules, based on the similarity of their respective component distributions. This approach enhances CapsNets' capacity to learn from intricate, high-dimensional data while retaining their interpretability and hierarchical structure. Our proposed model offers two distinct advantages: (i) its lightweight nature facilitates the application of capsules to more intricate vision tasks, including object detection; (ii) it outperforms baseline approaches in these demanding tasks.
abstract_zh: 胶囊网络（CapsNets）旨在使用涉及部分整体转换和分层组件路由的两步过程将图像解析为对象、部分及其关系的层次结构。然而，这种层次关系建模的计算成本很高，尽管具有潜在的优势，但限制了 CapsNet 的更广泛使用。 CapsNet 模型的当前状态主要侧重于将其性能与胶囊基线进行比较，在复杂任务中未能达到与深度 CNN 变体相同的熟练程度。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种有效的学习胶囊的方法，它超越了规范的基线模型，甚至与高性能卷积模型相比表现出了卓越的性能。我们的贡献可以概括为两个方面：首先，我们引入了一组输入向量被投影到的子胶囊。随后，我们提出了 Hybrid Gromov-Wasserstein 框架，该框架首先量化输入与子胶囊建模的组件之间的差异，然后通过最佳传输确定它们的对齐程度。这种创新机制利用了根据输入和子胶囊各自成分分布的相似性来定义输入和子胶囊之间对齐的新见解。这种方法增强了 CapsNet 从复杂的高维数据中学习的能力，同时保留了其可解释性和层次结构。我们提出的模型具有两个明显的优势：（i）其轻量级特性有助于将胶囊应用于更复杂的视觉任务，包括物体检测； (ii) 在这些要求较高的任务中，它的表现优于基线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于混合格罗莫夫-瓦舍斯特ein嵌入的胶囊网络学习方法，旨在提升胶囊网络在复杂任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统胶囊网络（CapsNet）因分层关系建模计算成本高且性能不足，难以在复杂任务中超越深度CNN模型。
AI.method: 引入子胶囊组对输入向量进行投影，并设计混合格罗莫夫-瓦舍斯特ein框架，通过最优传输量化输入与子胶囊组件的分布相似性及对齐程度。
AI.result: 该方法在复杂视觉任务（如目标检测）中超越基线模型及高性能卷积模型，兼具轻量化与可解释性优势。
AI.conclusion: 混合框架有效提升了胶囊网络对高维数据的学习能力，为复杂任务应用提供了更高效可扩展的解决方案。

authors_text: Zhangzi Zhu,Chuhui Xue,Yu Hao,Wenqing Zhang,Song Bai
title: 1st Place Solution to ECCV 2022 Challenge on Out of Vocabulary Scene Text Understanding: End-to-End Recognition of Out of Vocabulary Words
title_zh: ECCV 2022 词汇外场景文本理解挑战赛第一名解决方案：词汇外单词的端到端识别
comment: Report to ECCV TiE OOV competition
comments: Report to ECCV TiE OOV competition
abstract: Scene text recognition has attracted increasing interest in recent years due to its wide range of applications in multilingual translation, autonomous driving, etc. In this report, we describe our solution to the Out of Vocabulary Scene Text Understanding (OOV-ST) Challenge, which aims to extract out-of-vocabulary (OOV) words from natural scene images. Our oCLIP-based model achieves 28.59\% in h-mean which ranks 1st in end-to-end OOV word recognition track of OOV Challenge in ECCV2022 TiE Workshop.
summary: Scene text recognition has attracted increasing interest in recent years due to its wide range of applications in multilingual translation, autonomous driving, etc. In this report, we describe our solution to the Out of Vocabulary Scene Text Understanding (OOV-ST) Challenge, which aims to extract out-of-vocabulary (OOV) words from natural scene images. Our oCLIP-based model achieves 28.59\% in h-mean which ranks 1st in end-to-end OOV word recognition track of OOV Challenge in ECCV2022 TiE Workshop.
abstract_zh: 近年来，场景文本识别因其在多语言翻译、自动驾驶等领域的广泛应用而引起了越来越多的关注。在本报告中，我们描述了我们针对词汇外场景文本理解（OOV-ST）挑战的解决方案，该解决方案旨在从自然场景图像中提取词汇外（OOV）单词。我们基于 oCLIP 的模型在 h-mean 上达到了 28.59%，在 ECCV2022 TiE Workshop 的 OOV Challenge 端到端 OOV 单词识别赛道中排名第一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的模型，用于识别自然场景图像中的词汇表外（OOV）文本，并在ECCV2022挑战赛中取得第一名。
AI.motivation: 场景文本识别在多语言翻译和自动驾驶等领域有广泛应用，但如何有效识别词汇表外的文本仍是一个挑战。
AI.method: 基于oCLIP框架设计模型，结合视觉与文本特征进行端到端的OOV词识别。
AI.result: 在ECCV2022 TiE Workshop的端到端OOV词识别赛道中，模型h-mean指标达到28.59%，排名第一。
AI.conclusion: 提出的oCLIP模型在OOV场景文本识别任务中表现出色，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Mingzhi Yuan,Zhihao Li,Qiuye Jin,Xinrong Chen,Manning Wang
title: PointCLM: A Contrastive Learning-based Framework for Multi-instance Point Cloud Registration
title_zh: PointCLM：基于对比学习的多实例点云配准框架
abstract: Multi-instance point cloud registration is the problem of estimating multiple poses of source point cloud instances within a target point cloud. Solving this problem is challenging since inlier correspondences of one instance constitute outliers of all the other instances. Existing methods often rely on time-consuming hypothesis sampling or features leveraging spatial consistency, resulting in limited performance. In this paper, we propose PointCLM, a contrastive learning-based framework for mutli-instance point cloud registration. We first utilize contrastive learning to learn well-distributed deep representations for the input putative correspondences. Then based on these representations, we propose a outlier pruning strategy and a clustering strategy to efficiently remove outliers and assign the remaining correspondences to correct instances. Our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on both synthetic and real datasets by a large margin.
summary: Multi-instance point cloud registration is the problem of estimating multiple poses of source point cloud instances within a target point cloud. Solving this problem is challenging since inlier correspondences of one instance constitute outliers of all the other instances. Existing methods often rely on time-consuming hypothesis sampling or features leveraging spatial consistency, resulting in limited performance. In this paper, we propose PointCLM, a contrastive learning-based framework for mutli-instance point cloud registration. We first utilize contrastive learning to learn well-distributed deep representations for the input putative correspondences. Then based on these representations, we propose a outlier pruning strategy and a clustering strategy to efficiently remove outliers and assign the remaining correspondences to correct instances. Our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on both synthetic and real datasets by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 多实例点云配准是估计目标点云内源点云实例的多个姿态的问题。解决这一问题具有挑战性，因为一个实例的内点对应构成了所有其他实例的离群值。现有方法通常依赖于耗时的假设采样或利用空间一致性的特征，导致性能有限。在本文中，我们提出了 PointCLM，一种基于对比学习的多实例点云配准框架。我们首先利用对比学习来学习输入假定对应关系的均匀分布的深度表示。然后，基于这些表示，我们提出了异常值修剪策略和聚类策略，以有效地删除异常值并将剩余的对应关系分配给正确的实例。我们的方法在合成数据集和真实数据集上都远远优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PointCLM框架，解决多实例点云配准问题，通过对比学习优化对应关系并提升配准精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖耗时的假设采样或空间一致性特征，难以有效处理多实例间内点与外点的干扰，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 基于对比学习学习输入对应关系的分布表示，结合异常值剔除策略和聚类策略，高效去除噪声并分配正确实例。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法，验证了框架的有效性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: PointCLM通过对比学习与策略优化，为多实例点云配准提供了高效且精确的解决方案。

title: Using HCI in Cross-Disciplinary Teams: A Case Study of Academic Collaboration in HCI-Health Teams in the US Using a Team Science Perspective
title_zh: 在跨学科团队中使用 HCI：使用团队科学视角的美国 HCI 健康团队学术合作案例研究
comment: To appear in Proceedings of the ACM: Human-Computer Interaction, Volume 6, Issue CSCW 2022
comments: To appear in Proceedings of the ACM: Human-Computer Interaction, Volume 6, Issue CSCW 2022
abstract: Human-centered computing research has been increasingly applied to address important challenges in the health domain. Conducting research in cross-disciplinary teams can come with a lot of challenges in integrating knowledge across fields. Yet, we do not know what challenges HCI researchers encounter in building collaborations with health researchers, and how these researchers negotiate challenges while balancing their professional goals. We interviewed 17 early- and mid-career HCI faculty working in the United States who conducted research in collaboration with health researchers. Drawing from a Team Science framework, we share participants' lived experiences and identify major challenges that HCI researchers encounter when finding, collaborating with, and negotiating with health collaborators when building technologies. We propose ways to better support research collaboration aimed at designing technologies using human-centered computing approaches. This includes strategies to support HCI researchers at individual, institutional, research community, and funding agencies levels through tools to translate disciplinary approaches. We suggest institutional policies to support HCI researchers through training, networking, and promotion.
summary: Human-centered computing research has been increasingly applied to address important challenges in the health domain. Conducting research in cross-disciplinary teams can come with a lot of challenges in integrating knowledge across fields. Yet, we do not know what challenges HCI researchers encounter in building collaborations with health researchers, and how these researchers negotiate challenges while balancing their professional goals. We interviewed 17 early- and mid-career HCI faculty working in the United States who conducted research in collaboration with health researchers. Drawing from a Team Science framework, we share participants' lived experiences and identify major challenges that HCI researchers encounter when finding, collaborating with, and negotiating with health collaborators when building technologies. We propose ways to better support research collaboration aimed at designing technologies using human-centered computing approaches. This includes strategies to support HCI researchers at individual, institutional, research community, and funding agencies levels through tools to translate disciplinary approaches. We suggest institutional policies to support HCI researchers through training, networking, and promotion.
abstract_zh: 以人为中心的计算研究已越来越多地应用于解决健康领域的重要挑战。在跨学科团队中进行研究在整合跨领域知识方面可能会面临很多挑战。然而，我们不知道人机交互研究人员在与健康研究人员建立合作时遇到了哪些挑战，以及这些研究人员如何在平衡其专业目标的同时应对挑战。我们采访了 17 名在美国工作的早期和中期 HCI 教师，他们与健康研究人员合作进行研究。借鉴团队科学框架，我们分享参与者的生活经验，并确定人机交互研究人员在构建技术时寻找健康合作者、与健康合作者合作和谈判时遇到的主要挑战。我们提出了更好地支持旨在使用以人为中心的计算方法设计技术的研究合作的方法。这包括通过转化学科方法的工具，在个人、机构、研究社区和资助机构层面支持人机交互研究人员的策略。我们建议制定制度政策，通过培训、网络和推广来支持人机交互研究人员。

AI.tldr: 本文通过案例研究探讨HCI研究人员在美国与健康领域学者组建跨学科团队时面临的挑战及应对策略。
AI.motivation: 跨学科合作在HCI-健康领域研究中至关重要，但HCI研究人员在与健康学者协作时的具体挑战及应对方法尚不明确。
AI.method: 对17位美国HCI学者进行半结构化访谈，结合团队科学理论框架分析协作过程中的关键问题。
AI.result: 识别出HCI学者在跨学科协作中面临的知识整合、目标平衡等挑战，并提出个人、机构、社区及资助方四层面的支持策略。
AI.conclusion: 需通过培训、网络建设及政策调整等多维度措施，系统性支持HCI-健康跨学科研究协作。

method: 对17位美国HCI学者进行半结构化访谈，结合团队科学理论框架分析协作过程中的关键问题。
result: 识别出HCI学者在跨学科协作中面临的知识整合、目标平衡等挑战，并提出个人、机构、社区及资助方四层面的支持策略。
conclusion: 需通过培训、网络建设及政策调整等多维度措施，系统性支持HCI-健康跨学科研究协作。
search_text: Using HCI in Cross-Disciplinary Teams: A Case Study of Academic Collaboration in HCI-Health Teams in the US Using a Team Science Perspective 在跨学科团队中使用 HCI：使用团队科学视角的美国 HCI 健康团队学术合作案例研究 Human-centered computing research has been increasingly applied to address important challenges in the health domain. Conducting research in cross-disciplinary teams can come with a lot of challenges in integrating knowledge across fields. Yet, we do not know what challenges HCI researchers encounter in building collaborations with health researchers, and how these researchers negotiate challenges while balancing their professional goals. We interviewed 17 early- and mid-career HCI faculty working in the United States who conducted research in collaboration with health researchers. Drawing from a Team Science framework, we share participants' lived experiences and identify major challenges that HCI researchers encounter when finding, collaborating with, and negotiating with health collaborators when building technologies. We propose ways to better support research collaboration aimed at designing technologies using human-centered computing approaches. This includes strategies to support HCI researchers at individual, institutional, research community, and funding agencies levels through tools to translate disciplinary approaches. We suggest institutional policies to support HCI researchers through training, networking, and promotion. 以人为中心的计算研究已越来越多地应用于解决健康领域的重要挑战。在跨学科团队中进行研究在整合跨领域知识方面可能会面临很多挑战。然而，我们不知道人机交互研究人员在与健康研究人员建立合作时遇到了哪些挑战，以及这些研究人员如何在平衡其专业目标的同时应对挑战。我们采访了 17 名在美国工作的早期和中期 HCI 教师，他们与健康研究人员合作进行研究。借鉴团队科学框架，我们分享参与者的生活经验，并确定人机交互研究人员在构建技术时寻找健康合作者、与健康合作者合作和谈判时遇到的主要挑战。我们提出了更好地支持旨在使用以人为中心的计算方法设计技术的研究合作的方法。这包括通过转化学科方法的工具，在个人、机构、研究社区和资助机构层面支持人机交互研究人员的策略。我们建议制定制度政策，通过培训、网络和推广来支持人机交互研究人员。 本文通过案例研究探讨HCI研究人员在美国与健康领域学者组建跨学科团队时面临的挑战及应对策略。 Elena Agapie,Shefali Haldar,Sharmaine Galvez Poblete cs.HC

authors_text: Abhishek K. Umrawal,Sean P. Lane,Erin P. Hennes
title: A Genetic Algorithm-based Framework for Learning Statistical Power Manifold
title_zh: 基于遗传算法的统计幂流形学习框架
comment: 15 pages and 7 figures; Accepted for an oral presentation at the International Meeting of Psychometric Society (IMPS), Bologna, Italy
comments: 15 pages and 7 figures; Accepted for an oral presentation at the International Meeting of Psychometric Society (IMPS), Bologna, Italy
abstract: Statistical power is a measure of the replicability of a categorical hypothesis test. Formally, it is the probability of detecting an effect, if there is a true effect present in the population. Hence, optimizing statistical power as a function of some parameters of a hypothesis test is desirable. However, for most hypothesis tests, the explicit functional form of statistical power for individual model parameters is unknown; but calculating power for a given set of values of those parameters is possible using simulated experiments. These simulated experiments are usually computationally expensive. Hence, developing the entire statistical power manifold using simulations can be very time-consuming. We propose a novel genetic algorithm-based framework for learning statistical power manifolds. For a multiple linear regression $F$-test, we show that the proposed algorithm/framework learns the statistical power manifold much faster as compared to a brute-force approach as the number of queries to the power oracle is significantly reduced. We also show that the quality of learning the manifold improves as the number of iterations increases for the genetic algorithm. Such tools are useful for evaluating statistical power trade-offs when researchers have little information regarding a priori best guesses of primary effect sizes of interest or how sampling variability in non-primary effects impacts power for primary ones.
summary: Statistical power is a measure of the replicability of a categorical hypothesis test. Formally, it is the probability of detecting an effect, if there is a true effect present in the population. Hence, optimizing statistical power as a function of some parameters of a hypothesis test is desirable. However, for most hypothesis tests, the explicit functional form of statistical power for individual model parameters is unknown; but calculating power for a given set of values of those parameters is possible using simulated experiments. These simulated experiments are usually computationally expensive. Hence, developing the entire statistical power manifold using simulations can be very time-consuming. We propose a novel genetic algorithm-based framework for learning statistical power manifolds. For a multiple linear regression $F$-test, we show that the proposed algorithm/framework learns the statistical power manifold much faster as compared to a brute-force approach as the number of queries to the power oracle is significantly reduced. We also show that the quality of learning the manifold improves as the number of iterations increases for the genetic algorithm. Such tools are useful for evaluating statistical power trade-offs when researchers have little information regarding a priori best guesses of primary effect sizes of interest or how sampling variability in non-primary effects impacts power for primary ones.
abstract_zh: 统计功效是衡量分类假设检验的可重复性的指标。从形式上来说，它是在群体中存在真实效应的情况下检测到效应的概率。因此，需要根据假设检验的一些参数来优化统计功效。然而，对于大多数假设检验，单个模型参数的统计功效的显式函数形式是未知的；但是可以使用模拟实验来计算这些参数的给定值集的功效。这些模拟实验的计算成本通常很高。因此，使用模拟开发整个统计功效流形可能非常耗时。我们提出了一种新颖的基于遗传算法的框架来学习统计幂流形。对于多元线性回归 $F$ 测试，我们表明，与暴力方法相比，所提出的算法/框架学习统计功效流形的速度要快得多，因为对功效预言机的查询数量显着减少。我们还表明，随着遗传算法迭代次数的增加，学习流形的质量会提高。当研究人员对感兴趣的主要效应大小的先验最佳猜测或非主要效应的抽样变异性如何影响主要效应的功效缺乏信息时，此类工具可用于评估统计功效权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于遗传算法的框架，用于快速学习统计功效流形，以优化假设检验的统计功效。
AI.motivation: 统计功效的计算通常依赖耗时的模拟实验，传统方法在参数空间复杂时效率低下，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计遗传算法框架，通过迭代优化减少对功效预言机的查询次数，并在多重线性回归F检验中验证其有效性。
AI.result: 相比暴力搜索方法，该框架显著减少查询次数且学习质量随迭代次数增加而提升，适用于缺乏先验效应量信息的场景。
AI.conclusion: 遗传算法框架为统计功效分析提供了高效工具，尤其在处理非主要效应干扰时具有实际应用价值。

title: Public Parking Spot Detection And Geo-localization Using Transfer Learning
title_zh: 使用迁移学习进行公共停车位检测和地理定位
comment: Accepted for presentation at SACAIR 2022. 11 pages,5 figures
comments: Accepted for presentation at SACAIR 2022. 11 pages,5 figures
abstract: In cities around the world, locating public parking lots with vacant parking spots is a major problem, costing commuters time and adding to traffic congestion. This work illustrates how a dataset of Geo-tagged images from a mobile phone camera, can be used in navigating to the most convenient public parking lot in Johannesburg with an available parking space, detected by a neural network powered-public camera. The images are used to fine-tune a Detectron2 model pre-trained on the ImageNet dataset to demonstrate detection and segmentation of vacant parking spots, we then add the parking lot's corresponding longitude and latitude coordinates to recommend the most convenient parking lot to the driver based on the Haversine distance and number of available parking spots. Using the VGG Image Annotation (VIA) we use images from an expanding dataset of images, and annotate these with polygon outlines of the four different types of objects of interest: cars, open parking spots, people, and car number plates. We use the segmentation model to ensure number plates can be occluded in production for car registration anonymity purposes. We get an 89% and 82% intersection over union cover score on cars and parking spaces respectively. This work has the potential to help reduce the amount of time commuters spend searching for free public parking, hence easing traffic congestion in and around shopping complexes and other public places, and maximize people's utility with respect to driving on public roads.

This work illustrates how a dataset of Geo-tagged images from a mobile phone camera, can be used in navigating to the most convenient public parking lot in Johannesburg with an available parking space, detected by a neural network powered-public camera. The images are used to fine-tune a Detectron2 model pre-trained on the ImageNet dataset to demonstrate detection and segmentation of vacant parking spots, we then add the parking lot's corresponding longitude and latitude coordinates to recommend the most convenient parking lot to the driver based on the Haversine distance and number of available parking spots. Using the VGG Image Annotation (VIA) we use images from an expanding dataset of images, and annotate these with polygon outlines of the four different types of objects of interest: cars, open parking spots, people, and car number plates. We use the segmentation model to ensure number plates can be occluded in production for car registration anonymity purposes. We get an 89% and 82% intersection over union cover score on cars and parking spaces respectively. This work has the potential to help reduce the amount of time commuters spend searching for free public parking, hence easing traffic congestion in and around shopping complexes and other public places, and maximize people's utility with respect to driving on public roads.
abstract_zh: 在世界各地的城市中，寻找空置停车位的公共停车场是一个主要问题，不仅浪费了通勤者的时间，还加剧了交通拥堵。这项工作说明了如何使用来自手机摄像头的地理标记图像数据集来导航到约翰内斯堡最方便的公共停车场，该停车场具有可用停车位，由神经网络驱动的公共摄像头检测到。这些图像用于微调在 ImageNet 数据集上预训练的 Detectron2 模型，以演示空停车位的检测和分割，然后添加停车场相应的经度和纬度坐标，根据半正矢距离和可用停车位数量向驾驶员推荐最方便的停车场。使用 VGG 图像注释 (VIA)，我们使用来自扩展图像数据集的图像，并使用四种不同类型的感兴趣对象的多边形轮廓对这些图像进行注释：汽车、开放停车位、人和车牌照。我们使用分割模型来确保在生产过程中可以遮挡车牌，以实现汽车登记匿名目的。我们在汽车和停车位上分别获得了 89% 和 82% 的交叉口覆盖得分。这项工作有可能帮助减少通勤者寻找免费公共停车位的时间，从而缓解购物中心和其他公共场所及其周围的交通拥堵，并最大限度地提高人们在公共道路上驾驶的效用。

AI.tldr: 本文利用迁移学习和Geo-tagged图像，通过神经网络检测约翰内斯堡公共停车场的空闲车位，并结合地理坐标推荐最佳停车地点。
AI.motivation: 全球城市中寻找空闲公共停车位耗时且加剧交通拥堵，亟需高效解决方案以减少通勤时间并优化道路资源利用。
AI.method: 基于Detectron2模型（预训练于ImageNet）进行迁移学习，使用VIA工具标注四类目标（车辆、空位、行人、车牌），通过分割模型实现车牌遮挡以保护隐私，并结合Haversine距离算法推荐最近且车位充足的停车场。
AI.result: 在车辆和停车位分割任务中分别达到89%和82%的交并比（IoU），系统可有效推荐符合距离与车位数量条件的停车场。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有望缓解通勤者找车位的时间消耗，降低交通拥堵，同时提升公共道路使用效率，未来可扩展至更大规模数据集或实时应用。

This work illustrates how a dataset of Geo-tagged images from a mobile phone camera, can be used in navigating to the most convenient public parking lot in Johannesburg with an available parking space, detected by a neural network powered-public camera. The images are used to fine-tune a Detectron2 model pre-trained on the ImageNet dataset to demonstrate detection and segmentation of vacant parking spots, we then add the parking lot's corresponding longitude and latitude coordinates to recommend the most convenient parking lot to the driver based on the Haversine distance and number of available parking spots. Using the VGG Image Annotation (VIA) we use images from an expanding dataset of images, and annotate these with polygon outlines of the four different types of objects of interest: cars, open parking spots, people, and car number plates. We use the segmentation model to ensure number plates can be occluded in production for car registration anonymity purposes. We get an 89% and 82% intersection over union cover score on cars and parking spaces respectively. This work has the potential to help reduce the amount of time commuters spend searching for free public parking, hence easing traffic congestion in and around shopping complexes and other public places, and maximize people's utility with respect to driving on public roads. 在世界各地的城市中，寻找空置停车位的公共停车场是一个主要问题，不仅浪费了通勤者的时间，还加剧了交通拥堵。这项工作说明了如何使用来自手机摄像头的地理标记图像数据集来导航到约翰内斯堡最方便的公共停车场，该停车场具有可用停车位，由神经网络驱动的公共摄像头检测到。这些图像用于微调在 ImageNet 数据集上预训练的 Detectron2 模型，以演示空停车位的检测和分割，然后添加停车场相应的经度和纬度坐标，根据半正矢距离和可用停车位数量向驾驶员推荐最方便的停车场。使用 VGG 图像注释 (VIA)，我们使用来自扩展图像数据集的图像，并使用四种不同类型的感兴趣对象的多边形轮廓对这些图像进行注释：汽车、开放停车位、人和车牌照。我们使用分割模型来确保在生产过程中可以遮挡车牌，以实现汽车登记匿名目的。我们在汽车和停车位上分别获得了 89% 和 82% 的交叉口覆盖得分。这项工作有可能帮助减少通勤者寻找免费公共停车位的时间，从而缓解购物中心和其他公共场所及其周围的交通拥堵，并最大限度地提高人们在公共道路上驾驶的效用。 本文利用迁移学习和Geo-tagged图像，通过神经网络检测约翰内斯堡公共停车场的空闲车位，并结合地理坐标推荐最佳停车地点。 Moseli Mots'oehli,Yao Chao Yang cs.CV

title: Probabilistic Deduction: an Approach to Probabilistic Structured Argumentation
title_zh: 概率演绎：概率结构化论证的一种方法
abstract: This paper introduces Probabilistic Deduction (PD) as an approach to probabilistic structured argumentation. A PD framework is composed of probabilistic rules (p-rules). As rules in classical structured argumentation frameworks, p-rules form deduction systems. In addition, p-rules also represent conditional probabilities that define joint probability distributions. With PD frameworks, one performs probabilistic reasoning by solving Rule-Probabilistic Satisfiability. At the same time, one can obtain an argumentative reading to the probabilistic reasoning with arguments and attacks. In this work, we introduce a probabilistic version of the Closed-World Assumption (P-CWA) and prove that our probabilistic approach coincides with the complete extension in classical argumentation under P-CWA and with maximum entropy reasoning. We present several approaches to compute the joint probability distribution from p-rules for achieving a practical proof theory for PD. PD provides a framework to unify probabilistic reasoning with argumentative reasoning. This is the first work in probabilistic structured argumentation where the joint distribution is not assumed form external sources.
summary: This paper introduces Probabilistic Deduction (PD) as an approach to probabilistic structured argumentation. A PD framework is composed of probabilistic rules (p-rules). As rules in classical structured argumentation frameworks, p-rules form deduction systems. In addition, p-rules also represent conditional probabilities that define joint probability distributions. With PD frameworks, one performs probabilistic reasoning by solving Rule-Probabilistic Satisfiability. At the same time, one can obtain an argumentative reading to the probabilistic reasoning with arguments and attacks. In this work, we introduce a probabilistic version of the Closed-World Assumption (P-CWA) and prove that our probabilistic approach coincides with the complete extension in classical argumentation under P-CWA and with maximum entropy reasoning. We present several approaches to compute the joint probability distribution from p-rules for achieving a practical proof theory for PD. PD provides a framework to unify probabilistic reasoning with argumentative reasoning. This is the first work in probabilistic structured argumentation where the joint distribution is not assumed form external sources.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了概率演绎（PD）作为概率结构化论证的一种方法。 PD 框架由概率规则（p 规则）组成。作为经典结构化论证框架中的规则，p-规则形成演绎系统。此外，p 规则还表示定义联合概率分布的条件概率。使用 PD 框架，可以通过解决规则概率可满足性来执行概率推理。同时，人们可以通过论证和攻击获得对概率推理的论证性解读。在这项工作中，我们引入了封闭世界假设（P-CWA）的概率版本，并证明我们的概率方法与 P-CWA 下经典论证的完全扩展以及最大熵推理一致。我们提出了几种根据 p 规则计算联合概率分布的方法，以实现 PD 的实用证明理论。 PD 提供了一个统一概率推理与论证推理的框架。这是概率结构化论证中的第一个工作，其中联合分布不是从外部来源假设的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出概率演绎（PD）框架，通过概率规则（p-rules）统一概率推理与论证推理，无需依赖外部联合分布假设。
AI.motivation: 现有概率结构化论证方法依赖外部来源的联合分布假设，缺乏对概率与论证推理的统一整合，需建立自洽的理论框架。
AI.method: 引入概率规则（p-rules）构建演绎系统，结合概率封闭世界假设（P-CWA）与最大熵推理，提出多种从p-rules计算联合分布的实用方法。
AI.result: PD框架在P-CWA下与经典论证的完全扩展及最大熵推理一致，实现了概率推理与论证推理的统一，并提供了无需外部输入的联合分布计算方法。
AI.conclusion: PD框架首次在概率结构化论证中摆脱外部联合分布依赖，为概率与论证推理的整合提供了理论基础与实用计算方法。

authors_text: Tica Lin,Zhutian Chen,Yalong Yang,Daniele Chiappalupi,Johanna Beyer,Hanspeter Pfister
title: The Quest for Omnioculars: Embedded Visualization for Augmenting Basketball Game Viewing Experiences
title_zh: 探索全景望远镜：增强篮球比赛观看体验的嵌入式可视化
comment: To appear in IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics (IEEE VIS), 2022
comments: To appear in IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics (IEEE VIS), 2022
abstract: Sports game data is becoming increasingly complex, often consisting of multivariate data such as player performance stats, historical team records, and athletes' positional tracking information. While numerous visual analytics systems have been developed for sports analysts to derive insights, few tools target fans to improve their understanding and engagement of sports data during live games. By presenting extra data in the actual game views, embedded visualization has the potential to enhance fans' game-viewing experience. However, little is known about how to design such kinds of visualizations embedded into live games. In this work, we present a user-centered design study of developing interactive embedded visualizations for basketball fans to improve their live game-watching experiences. We first conducted a formative study to characterize basketball fans' in-game analysis behaviors and tasks. Based on our findings, we propose a design framework to inform the design of embedded visualizations based on specific data-seeking contexts. Following the design framework, we present five novel embedded visualization designs targeting five representative contexts identified by the fans, including shooting, offense, defense, player evaluation, and team comparison. We then developed Omnioculars, an interactive basketball game-viewing prototype that features the proposed embedded visualizations for fans' in-game data analysis. We evaluated Omnioculars in a simulated basketball game with basketball fans. The study results suggest that our design supports personalized in-game data analysis and enhances game understanding and engagement.

We first conducted a formative study to characterize basketball fans' in-game analysis behaviors and tasks. Based on our findings, we propose a design framework to inform the design of embedded visualizations based on specific data-seeking contexts. Following the design framework, we present five novel embedded visualization designs targeting five representative contexts identified by the fans, including shooting, offense, defense, player evaluation, and team comparison. We then developed Omnioculars, an interactive basketball game-viewing prototype that features the proposed embedded visualizations for fans' in-game data analysis. We evaluated Omnioculars in a simulated basketball game with basketball fans. The study results suggest that our design supports personalized in-game data analysis and enhances game understanding and engagement.
abstract_zh: 体育比赛数据变得越来越复杂，通常由多变量数据组成，例如球员表现统计数据、历史球队记录和运动员的位置跟踪信息。尽管已经开发了许多可视化分析系统供体育分析师获得见解，但很少有工具能够针对球迷来提高他们在现场比赛期间对体育数据的理解和参与。通过在实际比赛视图中呈现额外的数据，嵌入式可视化有可能增强球迷的比赛观看体验。然而，人们对如何设计嵌入到现场游戏中的此类可视化知之甚少。在这项工作中，我们提出了一项以用户为中心的设计研究，为篮球迷开发交互式嵌入式可视化，以改善他们的现场比赛观看体验。我们首先进行了一项形成性研究来描述篮球迷的比赛中分析行为和任务。根据我们的发现，我们提出了一个设计框架，为基于特定数据搜索上下文的嵌入式可视化设计提供信息。根据设计框架，我们针对球迷确定的五个代表性情境，提出了五种新颖的嵌入式可视化设计，包括投篮、进攻、防守、球员评估和球队比较。然后，我们开发了 Omnioptics，这是一种交互式篮球比赛观看原型，具有拟议的嵌入式可视化功能，用于球迷的比赛中数据分析。我们在与篮球迷的模拟篮球比赛中评估了全景眼镜。研究结果表明，我们的设计支持个性化的游戏内数据分析并增强游戏理解和参与度。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在设计并开发嵌入式可视化工具Omnioculars，以增强篮球球迷在观看比赛时的数据分析体验。
AI.motivation: 现有体育数据分析工具多面向专业分析师，缺乏针对普通球迷在实时比赛中理解复杂数据的可视化方案，导致球迷难以深入参与比赛分析。
AI.method: 通过用户中心设计研究，首先分析球迷的比赛分析行为与需求，构建基于数据需求场景的嵌入式可视化设计框架，并开发五种针对不同场景（投篮、进攻、防守等）的可视化方案，最终实现交互式原型Omnioculars并进行模拟测试。
AI.result: 测试表明，Omnioculars支持个性化实时数据分析，显著提升了球迷对比赛的理解深度与观看参与度。
AI.conclusion: 基于场景的嵌入式可视化设计框架能有效增强体育赛事观看体验，为实时数据可视化提供可行的设计范式。

The study results suggest that our design supports personalized in-game data analysis and enhances game understanding and engagement. 体育比赛数据变得越来越复杂，通常由多变量数据组成，例如球员表现统计数据、历史球队记录和运动员的位置跟踪信息。尽管已经开发了许多可视化分析系统供体育分析师获得见解，但很少有工具能够针对球迷来提高他们在现场比赛期间对体育数据的理解和参与。通过在实际比赛视图中呈现额外的数据，嵌入式可视化有可能增强球迷的比赛观看体验。然而，人们对如何设计嵌入到现场游戏中的此类可视化知之甚少。在这项工作中，我们提出了一项以用户为中心的设计研究，为篮球迷开发交互式嵌入式可视化，以改善他们的现场比赛观看体验。我们首先进行了一项形成性研究来描述篮球迷的比赛中分析行为和任务。根据我们的发现，我们提出了一个设计框架，为基于特定数据搜索上下文的嵌入式可视化设计提供信息。根据设计框架，我们针对球迷确定的五个代表性情境，提出了五种新颖的嵌入式可视化设计，包括投篮、进攻、防守、球员评估和球队比较。然后，我们开发了 Omnioptics，这是一种交互式篮球比赛观看原型，具有拟议的嵌入式可视化功能，用于球迷的比赛中数据分析。我们在与篮球迷的模拟篮球比赛中评估了全景眼镜。研究结果表明，我们的设计支持个性化的游戏内数据分析并增强游戏理解和参与度。 本文旨在设计并开发嵌入式可视化工具Omnioculars，以增强篮球球迷在观看比赛时的数据分析体验。 Tica Lin,Zhutian Chen,Yalong Yang,Daniele Chiappalupi,Johanna Beyer,Hanspeter Pfister cs.HC

authors_text: Xinyu Jiang,Qi Zhang,Chongyang Shi,Kaiying Jiang,Liang Hu,Shoujin Wang
title: An Ion Exchange Mechanism Inspired Story Ending Generator for Different Characters
title_zh: 离子交换机制启发不同角色的故事结局生成器
abstract: Story ending generation aims at generating reasonable endings for a given story context. Most existing studies in this area focus on generating coherent or diversified story endings, while they ignore that different characters may lead to different endings for a given story. In this paper, we propose a Character-oriented Story Ending Generator (CoSEG) to customize an ending for each character in a story. Specifically, we first propose a character modeling module to learn the personalities of characters from their descriptive experiences extracted from the story context. Then, inspired by the ion exchange mechanism in chemical reactions, we design a novel vector breaking/forming module to learn the intrinsic interactions between each character and the corresponding context through an analogical information exchange procedure. Finally, we leverage the attention mechanism to learn effective character-specific interactions and feed each interaction into a decoder to generate character-orient endings. Extensive experimental results and case studies demonstrate that CoSEG achieves significant improvements in the quality of generated endings compared with state-of-the-art methods, and it effectively customizes the endings for different characters.
summary: Story ending generation aims at generating reasonable endings for a given story context. Most existing studies in this area focus on generating coherent or diversified story endings, while they ignore that different characters may lead to different endings for a given story. In this paper, we propose a Character-oriented Story Ending Generator (CoSEG) to customize an ending for each character in a story. Specifically, we first propose a character modeling module to learn the personalities of characters from their descriptive experiences extracted from the story context. Then, inspired by the ion exchange mechanism in chemical reactions, we design a novel vector breaking/forming module to learn the intrinsic interactions between each character and the corresponding context through an analogical information exchange procedure. Finally, we leverage the attention mechanism to learn effective character-specific interactions and feed each interaction into a decoder to generate character-orient endings. Extensive experimental results and case studies demonstrate that CoSEG achieves significant improvements in the quality of generated endings compared with state-of-the-art methods, and it effectively customizes the endings for different characters.
abstract_zh: 故事结局生成旨在为给定的故事背景生成合理的结局。该领域现有的大多数研究都集中于生成连贯或多样化的故事结局，而忽略了不同的角色可能会导致给定故事的不同结局。在本文中，我们提出了一种面向角色的故事结局生成器（CoSEG），为故事中的每个角色定制结局。具体来说，我们首先提出一个角色建模模块，从故事背景中提取的描述性经历中学习角色的个性。然后，受化学反应中离子交换机制的启发，我们设计了一种新颖的矢量破坏/形成模块，通过类比信息交换过程来学习每个角色与相应上下文之间的内在相互作用。最后，我们利用注意力机制来学习有效的特定于角色的交互，并将每个交互输入解码器以生成面向角色的结局。大量的实验结果和案例研究表明，与最先进的方法相比，CoSEG 在生成结局的质量方面取得了显着提高，并且可以有效地为不同角色定制结局。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于离子交换机制的角色导向故事结局生成方法CoSEG，旨在为故事中不同角色生成符合其性格特征的定制化结局。
AI.motivation: 现有故事结局生成方法忽视了不同角色会导致不同结局的特性，生成的结局难以体现角色个性化特征。
AI.method: 1) 构建角色建模模块学习角色性格；2) 受离子交换机制启发设计向量分解/形成模块学习角色与上下文的交互；3) 基于注意力机制生成角色专属结局。
AI.result: 实验和案例研究表明CoSEG在生成质量上显著优于现有方法，能有效生成符合不同角色特征的个性化结局。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的CoSEG方法通过模拟离子交换机制实现角色与上下文的交互学习，成功解决了故事结局生成中角色个性化定制的问题。

title: A Transferable Multi-stage Model with Cycling Discrepancy Learning for Lithium-ion Battery State of Health Estimation
title_zh: 用于锂离子电池健康状态估计的具有循环差异学习的可转移多阶段模型
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Industrial Informatics
comments: This paper has been accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Industrial Informatics
abstract: As a significant ingredient regarding health status, data-driven state-of-health (SOH) estimation has become dominant for lithium-ion batteries (LiBs). To handle data discrepancy across batteries, current SOH estimation models engage in transfer learning (TL), which reserves apriori knowledge gained through reusing partial structures of the offline trained model. However, multiple degradation patterns of a complete life cycle of a battery make it challenging to pursue TL. The concept of the stage is introduced to describe the collection of continuous cycles that present a similar degradation pattern. A transferable multi-stage SOH estimation model is proposed to perform TL across batteries in the same stage, consisting of four steps. First, with identified stage information, raw cycling data from the source battery are reconstructed into the phase space with high dimensions, exploring hidden dynamics with limited sensors. Next, domain invariant representation across cycles in each stage is proposed through cycling discrepancy subspace with reconstructed data. Third, considering the unbalanced discharge cycles among different stages, a switching estimation strategy composed of a lightweight model with the long short-term memory network and a powerful model with the proposed temporal capsule network is proposed to boost estimation accuracy. Lastly, an updating scheme compensates for estimation errors when the cycling consistency of target batteries drifts. The proposed method outperforms its competitive algorithms in various transfer tasks for a run-to-failure benchmark with three batteries.
summary: As a significant ingredient regarding health status, data-driven state-of-health (SOH) estimation has become dominant for lithium-ion batteries (LiBs). To handle data discrepancy across batteries, current SOH estimation models engage in transfer learning (TL), which reserves apriori knowledge gained through reusing partial structures of the offline trained model. However, multiple degradation patterns of a complete life cycle of a battery make it challenging to pursue TL. The concept of the stage is introduced to describe the collection of continuous cycles that present a similar degradation pattern. A transferable multi-stage SOH estimation model is proposed to perform TL across batteries in the same stage, consisting of four steps. First, with identified stage information, raw cycling data from the source battery are reconstructed into the phase space with high dimensions, exploring hidden dynamics with limited sensors. Next, domain invariant representation across cycles in each stage is proposed through cycling discrepancy subspace with reconstructed data. Third, considering the unbalanced discharge cycles among different stages, a switching estimation strategy composed of a lightweight model with the long short-term memory network and a powerful model with the proposed temporal capsule network is proposed to boost estimation accuracy. Lastly, an updating scheme compensates for estimation errors when the cycling consistency of target batteries drifts. The proposed method outperforms its competitive algorithms in various transfer tasks for a run-to-failure benchmark with three batteries.
abstract_zh: 作为健康状况的重要组成部分，数据驱动的健康状况 (SOH) 估计已成为锂离子电池 (LiB) 的主导方法。为了处理电池之间的数据差异，当前的 SOH 估计模型采用迁移学习 (TL)，它保留通过重用离线训练模型的部分结构获得的先验知识。然而，电池整个生命周期的多种退化模式使得追求 TL 具有挑战性。引入阶段的概念来描述呈现相似退化模式的连续循环的集合。提出了一种可转移的多阶段 SOH 估计模型，用于在同一阶段跨电池执行 TL，由四个步骤组成。首先，通过识别的阶段信息，将来自源电池的原始循环数据重建到高维度的相空间中，利用有限的传感器探索隐藏的动态。接下来，通过使用重构数据循环差异子空间，提出了每个阶段跨循环的域不变表示。第三，考虑到不同阶段之间的不平衡放电周期，提出了一种由具有长短期记忆网络的轻量级模型和具有所提出的时间胶囊网络的强大模型组成的切换估计策略，以提高估计精度。最后，当目标电池的循环一致性发生漂移时，更新方案可以补偿估计误差。对于使用三个电池的运行至故障基准，所提出的方法在各种传输任务中优于其竞争算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可转移的多阶段模型，通过循环差异学习来估计锂离子电池的健康状态（SOH）。
AI.motivation: 由于锂离子电池在不同使用阶段表现出不同的退化模式，传统的迁移学习方法难以有效处理电池之间的数据差异，因此需要一种能够适应多阶段退化模式的SOH估计方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种多阶段模型，包括四个步骤：利用阶段信息重构源电池的循环数据以探索隐藏动态；通过循环差异子空间生成跨周期的领域不变表示；采用轻量级LSTM网络和强大的时间胶囊网络组成切换估计策略；最后通过更新方案补偿目标电池循环一致性漂移带来的估计误差。
AI.result: 该方法在三个电池的运行至失效基准测试中优于多种竞争算法，展示了其在不同迁移任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多阶段模型能够有效处理锂离子电池在不同阶段的退化模式，显著提升了SOH估计的准确性。

Third, considering the unbalanced discharge cycles among different stages, a switching estimation strategy composed of a lightweight model with the long short-term memory network and a powerful model with the proposed temporal capsule network is proposed to boost estimation accuracy. Lastly, an updating scheme compensates for estimation errors when the cycling consistency of target batteries drifts. The proposed method outperforms its competitive algorithms in various transfer tasks for a run-to-failure benchmark with three batteries. 作为健康状况的重要组成部分，数据驱动的健康状况 (SOH) 估计已成为锂离子电池 (LiB) 的主导方法。为了处理电池之间的数据差异，当前的 SOH 估计模型采用迁移学习 (TL)，它保留通过重用离线训练模型的部分结构获得的先验知识。然而，电池整个生命周期的多种退化模式使得追求 TL 具有挑战性。引入阶段的概念来描述呈现相似退化模式的连续循环的集合。提出了一种可转移的多阶段 SOH 估计模型，用于在同一阶段跨电池执行 TL，由四个步骤组成。首先，通过识别的阶段信息，将来自源电池的原始循环数据重建到高维度的相空间中，利用有限的传感器探索隐藏的动态。接下来，通过使用重构数据循环差异子空间，提出了每个阶段跨循环的域不变表示。第三，考虑到不同阶段之间的不平衡放电周期，提出了一种由具有长短期记忆网络的轻量级模型和具有所提出的时间胶囊网络的强大模型组成的切换估计策略，以提高估计精度。最后，当目标电池的循环一致性发生漂移时，更新方案可以补偿估计误差。对于使用三个电池的运行至故障基准，所提出的方法在各种传输任务中优于其竞争算法。 本文提出了一种可转移的多阶段模型，通过循环差异学习来估计锂离子电池的健康状态（SOH）。 Yan Qin,Chau Yuen,Xunyuan Yin,Biao Huang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Jie Zhang,Zhiqi Li,Bo Li,Jianghe Xu,Shuang Wu,Shouhong Ding,Chao Wu
title: Federated Learning with Label Distribution Skew via Logits Calibration
title_zh: 通过 Logits 校准实现标签分布偏差的联邦学习
abstract: Traditional federated optimization methods perform poorly with heterogeneous data (ie, accuracy reduction), especially for highly skewed data. In this paper, we investigate the label distribution skew in FL, where the distribution of labels varies across clients. First, we investigate the label distribution skew from a statistical view. We demonstrate both theoretically and empirically that previous methods based on softmax cross-entropy are not suitable, which can result in local models heavily overfitting to minority classes and missing classes. Additionally, we theoretically introduce a deviation bound to measure the deviation of the gradient after local update. At last, we propose FedLC (\textbf {Fed} erated learning via\textbf {L} ogits\textbf {C} alibration), which calibrates the logits before softmax cross-entropy according to the probability of occurrence of each class. FedLC applies a fine-grained calibrated cross-entropy loss to local update by adding a pairwise label margin. Extensive experiments on federated datasets and real-world datasets demonstrate that FedLC leads to a more accurate global model and much improved performance. Furthermore, integrating other FL methods into our approach can further enhance the performance of the global model.
summary: Traditional federated optimization methods perform poorly with heterogeneous data (ie, accuracy reduction), especially for highly skewed data. In this paper, we investigate the label distribution skew in FL, where the distribution of labels varies across clients. First, we investigate the label distribution skew from a statistical view. We demonstrate both theoretically and empirically that previous methods based on softmax cross-entropy are not suitable, which can result in local models heavily overfitting to minority classes and missing classes. Additionally, we theoretically introduce a deviation bound to measure the deviation of the gradient after local update. At last, we propose FedLC (\textbf {Fed} erated learning via\textbf {L} ogits\textbf {C} alibration), which calibrates the logits before softmax cross-entropy according to the probability of occurrence of each class. FedLC applies a fine-grained calibrated cross-entropy loss to local update by adding a pairwise label margin. Extensive experiments on federated datasets and real-world datasets demonstrate that FedLC leads to a more accurate global model and much improved performance. Furthermore, integrating other FL methods into our approach can further enhance the performance of the global model.
abstract_zh: 传统的联合优化方法对于异构数据表现不佳（即精度降低），特别是对于高度倾斜的数据。在本文中，我们研究了 FL 中的标签分布偏差，其中标签的分布因客户而异。首先，我们从统计角度研究标签分布偏差。我们从理论和经验上证明，以前基于 softmax 交叉熵的方法并不适用，这可能导致局部模型严重过度拟合少数类和缺失类。此外，我们理论上引入了偏差界来衡量局部更新后梯度的偏差。最后，我们提出了FedLC（\textbf {Fed} erated Learning via\textbf {L} ogits\textbf {C} alibration），它根据每个类出现的概率来校准softmax交叉熵之前的logits。 FedLC 通过添加成对标签边距，将细粒度校准交叉熵损失应用于本地更新。对联合数据集和真实世界数据集的大量实验表明，FedLC 可以带来更准确的全局模型并显着提高性能。此外，将其他 FL 方法集成到我们的方法中可以进一步提高全局模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FedLC的联邦学习方法，通过校准logits来解决标签分布偏斜问题，从而提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习方法在处理标签分布偏斜数据时表现不佳，容易导致局部模型过度拟合少数类或遗漏类别，亟需改进方法应对这一挑战。
AI.method: 通过引入logits校准机制，在softmax交叉熵前根据各类别出现概率调整logits，并添加成对标签间隔实现细粒度校准交叉熵损失。
AI.result: 在联邦数据集和真实数据集上的实验表明，FedLC显著提升了全局模型准确性，且与其他联邦方法结合可进一步增强性能。
AI.conclusion: FedLC通过logits校准有效缓解了标签分布偏斜问题，为联邦学习提供了更优的解决方案。

authors_text: Zhixiong Yang,Junwen Pan,Yanzhan Yang,Xiaozhou Shi,Hong-Yu Zhou,Zhicheng Zhang,Cheng Bian
title: ProCo: Prototype-aware Contrastive Learning for Long-tailed Medical Image Classification
title_zh: ProCo：用于长尾医学图像分类的原型感知对比学习
comment: Accept to MICCAI 2022. Zhixiong Yang and Junwen Pan contributed equally to this work
comments: Accept to MICCAI 2022. Zhixiong Yang and Junwen Pan contributed equally to this work
abstract: Medical image classification has been widely adopted in medical image analysis. However, due to the difficulty of collecting and labeling data in the medical area, medical image datasets are usually highly-imbalanced. To address this problem, previous works utilized class samples as prior for re-weighting or re-sampling but the feature representation is usually still not discriminative enough. In this paper, we adopt the contrastive learning to tackle the long-tailed medical imbalance problem. Specifically, we first propose the category prototype and adversarial proto-instance to generate representative contrastive pairs. Then, the prototype recalibration strategy is proposed to address the highly imbalanced data distribution. Finally, a unified proto-loss is designed to train our framework. The overall framework, namely as Prototype-aware Contrastive learning (ProCo), is unified as a single-stage pipeline in an end-to-end manner to alleviate the imbalanced problem in medical image classification, which is also a distinct progress than existing works as they follow the traditional two-stage pipeline. Extensive experiments on two highly-imbalanced medical image classification datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms the existing state-of-the-art methods by a large margin.
summary: Medical image classification has been widely adopted in medical image analysis. However, due to the difficulty of collecting and labeling data in the medical area, medical image datasets are usually highly-imbalanced. To address this problem, previous works utilized class samples as prior for re-weighting or re-sampling but the feature representation is usually still not discriminative enough. In this paper, we adopt the contrastive learning to tackle the long-tailed medical imbalance problem. Specifically, we first propose the category prototype and adversarial proto-instance to generate representative contrastive pairs. Then, the prototype recalibration strategy is proposed to address the highly imbalanced data distribution. Finally, a unified proto-loss is designed to train our framework. The overall framework, namely as Prototype-aware Contrastive learning (ProCo), is unified as a single-stage pipeline in an end-to-end manner to alleviate the imbalanced problem in medical image classification, which is also a distinct progress than existing works as they follow the traditional two-stage pipeline. Extensive experiments on two highly-imbalanced medical image classification datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms the existing state-of-the-art methods by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 医学图像分类已广泛应用于医学图像分析中。然而，由于医学领域数据采集和标注的难度，医学图像数据集通常高度不平衡。为了解决这个问题，以前的工作利用类样本作为先验来进行重新加权或重新采样，但特征表示通常仍然不够具有区分性。在本文中，我们采用对比学习来解决长尾医疗不平衡问题。具体来说，我们首先提出类别原型和对抗性原型来生成代表性对比对。然后，提出原型重新校准策略来解决高度不平衡的数据分布。最后，设计了一个统一的原型损失来训练我们的框架。整体框架，即原型感知对比学习（ProCo），以端到端的方式统一为单阶段管道，以缓解医学图像分类中的不平衡问题，这也是比现有工作的明显进步，因为它们遵循传统的两阶段管道。对两个高度不平衡的医学图像分类数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法大大优于现有的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProCo框架，通过原型感知的对比学习解决医学图像分类中的长尾数据不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 医学图像数据集存在高度不平衡问题，传统重加权/重采样方法难以提升特征表示的判别性。
AI.method: 构建类别原型与对抗原型实例生成对比对，设计原型校准策略并提出统一原型损失函数，实现端到端单阶段训练。
AI.result: 在两个高度不平衡医学数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: ProCo通过单阶段原型感知对比学习有效缓解长尾问题，优于传统两阶段方法。

However, due to the difficulty of collecting and labeling data in the medical area, medical image datasets are usually highly-imbalanced. To address this problem, previous works utilized class samples as prior for re-weighting or re-sampling but the feature representation is usually still not discriminative enough. In this paper, we adopt the contrastive learning to tackle the long-tailed medical imbalance problem. Specifically, we first propose the category prototype and adversarial proto-instance to generate representative contrastive pairs. Then, the prototype recalibration strategy is proposed to address the highly imbalanced data distribution. Finally, a unified proto-loss is designed to train our framework. title: What is missing in deep music generation? A study of repetition and structure in popular music
title_zh: 深度音乐一代缺少什么？流行音乐中的重复和结构研究
comment: In Proceedings of the 23rd Int. Society for Music Information Retrieval (ISMIR) 2022
comments: In Proceedings of the 23rd Int. Society for Music Information Retrieval (ISMIR) 2022
abstract: Structure is one of the most essential aspects of music, and music structure is commonly indicated through repetition. However, the nature of repetition and structure in music is still not well understood, especially in the context of music generation, and much remains to be explored with Music Information Retrieval (MIR) techniques. Analyses of two popular music datasets (Chinese and American) illustrate important music construction principles: (1) structure exists at multiple hierarchical levels, (2) songs use repetition and limited vocabulary so that individual songs do not follow general statistics of song collections, (3) structure interacts with rhythm, melody, harmony, and predictability, and (4) over the course of a song, repetition is not random, but follows a general trend as revealed by cross-entropy. These and other findings offer challenges as well as opportunities for deep-learning music generation and suggest new formal music criteria and evaluation methods. Music from recent music generation systems is analyzed and compared to human-composed music in our datasets, often revealing striking differences from a structural perspective.
summary: Structure is one of the most essential aspects of music, and music structure is commonly indicated through repetition. However, the nature of repetition and structure in music is still not well understood, especially in the context of music generation, and much remains to be explored with Music Information Retrieval (MIR) techniques. Analyses of two popular music datasets (Chinese and American) illustrate important music construction principles: (1) structure exists at multiple hierarchical levels, (2) songs use repetition and limited vocabulary so that individual songs do not follow general statistics of song collections, (3) structure interacts with rhythm, melody, harmony, and predictability, and (4) over the course of a song, repetition is not random, but follows a general trend as revealed by cross-entropy. These and other findings offer challenges as well as opportunities for deep-learning music generation and suggest new formal music criteria and evaluation methods. Music from recent music generation systems is analyzed and compared to human-composed music in our datasets, often revealing striking differences from a structural perspective.
abstract_zh: 结构是音乐最本质的方面之一，音乐结构通常通过重复来表示。然而，音乐中重复和结构的本质仍然没有得到很好的理解，特别是在音乐生成的背景下，音乐信息检索（MIR）技术还有很多东西有待探索。对两个流行音乐数据集（中国和美国）的分析说明了重要的音乐构建原则：（1）结构存在于多个层次结构中，（2）歌曲使用重复和有限的词汇，因此个别歌曲不遵循歌曲集合的一般统计数据，（3）结构与节奏、旋律、和声和可预测性相互作用，以及（4）在歌曲的过程中，重复不是随机的，而是遵循交叉熵揭示的总体趋势。这些和其他发现为深度学习音乐生成提供了挑战和机遇，并提出了新的正式音乐标准和评估方法。我们对数据集中的最新音乐生成系统中的音乐进行分析并与人类创作的音乐进行比较，通常从结构角度揭示出显着的差异。

AI.tldr: 本文分析流行音乐中的重复与结构特性，探讨深度音乐生成模型的不足。
AI.motivation: 音乐结构是核心要素，但现有研究对重复机制及结构规律理解不足，尤其在音乐生成领域存在明显缺陷。
AI.method: 通过分析中美国数据集，结合MIR技术与交叉熵等统计方法，研究音乐结构的层级性、重复模式及与其他元素的交互关系。
AI.result: 发现音乐结构具有多层级特性，依赖有限元素重复；结构与节奏/旋律等要素紧密关联，且重复遵循非随机趋势。生成模型音乐与人类创作存在显著结构性差异。
AI.conclusion: 研究为深度学习音乐生成提供了新评价标准与改进方向，揭示了现有模型在结构规律模拟上的不足。

search_text: What is missing in deep music generation? A study of repetition and structure in popular music 深度音乐一代缺少什么？流行音乐中的重复和结构研究 Structure is one of the most essential aspects of music, and music structure is commonly indicated through repetition. However, the nature of repetition and structure in music is still not well understood, especially in the context of music generation, and much remains to be explored with Music Information Retrieval (MIR) techniques. Analyses of two popular music datasets (Chinese and American) illustrate important music construction principles: (1) structure exists at multiple hierarchical levels, (2) songs use repetition and limited vocabulary so that individual songs do not follow general statistics of song collections, (3) structure interacts with rhythm, melody, harmony, and predictability, and (4) over the course of a song, repetition is not random, but follows a general trend as revealed by cross-entropy. These and other findings offer challenges as well as opportunities for deep-learning music generation and suggest new formal music criteria and evaluation methods. Music from recent music generation systems is analyzed and compared to human-composed music in our datasets, often revealing striking differences from a structural perspective. 结构是音乐最本质的方面之一，音乐结构通常通过重复来表示。然而，音乐中重复和结构的本质仍然没有得到很好的理解，特别是在音乐生成的背景下，音乐信息检索（MIR）技术还有很多东西有待探索。对两个流行音乐数据集（中国和美国）的分析说明了重要的音乐构建原则：（1）结构存在于多个层次结构中，（2）歌曲使用重复和有限的词汇，因此个别歌曲不遵循歌曲集合的一般统计数据，（3）结构与节奏、旋律、和声和可预测性相互作用，以及（4）在歌曲的过程中，重复不是随机的，而是遵循交叉熵揭示的总体趋势。这些和其他发现为深度学习音乐生成提供了挑战和机遇，并提出了新的正式音乐标准和评估方法。我们对数据集中的最新音乐生成系统中的音乐进行分析并与人类创作的音乐进行比较，通常从结构角度揭示出显着的差异。 本文分析流行音乐中的重复与结构特性，探讨深度音乐生成模型的不足。 Shuqi Dai,Huiran Yu,Roger B. Dannenberg cs.SD,cs.IR,eess.AS

title: Space-efficient Data Structure for Next/Previous Larger/Smaller Value Queries
title_zh: 用于下一个/上一个较大/较小值查询的空间高效数据结构
comment: Fix minor issues in the tables of the journal version
comments: Fix minor issues in the tables of the journal version
abstract: Given an array of size $n$ from a total order, we consider the problem of constructing a data structure that supports various queries (range minimum/maximum queries with their variants and next/previous larger/smaller queries) efficiently. In the encoding model (i.e., the queries can be answered without the input array), we propose a $(3.701n + o(n))$-bit data structure, which supports all these queries in $O(\log^{(\ell)}n)$ time, for any positive constant integer $\ell$ (here, $\log^{(1)} n = \log n$, and for $\ell > 1$, $\log^{(\ell)} n = \log ({\log^{(\ell-1)}} n)$). The space of our data structure matches the current best upper bound of Tsur (Inf. Process. Lett., 2019), which does not support the queries efficiently. Also, we show that at least $3.16n-Θ(\log n)$ bits are necessary for answering all the queries. Our result is obtained by generalizing Gawrychowski and Nicholson's $(3n - Θ(\log n))$-bit lower bound (ICALP, 15) for answering range minimum and maximum queries on a permutation of size $n$.
summary: Given an array of size $n$ from a total order, we consider the problem of constructing a data structure that supports various queries (range minimum/maximum queries with their variants and next/previous larger/smaller queries) efficiently. In the encoding model (i.e., the queries can be answered without the input array), we propose a $(3.701n + o(n))$-bit data structure, which supports all these queries in $O(\log^{(\ell)}n)$ time, for any positive constant integer $\ell$ (here, $\log^{(1)} n = \log n$, and for $\ell > 1$, $\log^{(\ell)} n = \log ({\log^{(\ell-1)}} n)$). The space of our data structure matches the current best upper bound of Tsur (Inf. Process. Lett., 2019), which does not support the queries efficiently. Also, we show that at least $3.16n-Θ(\log n)$ bits are necessary for answering all the queries. Our result is obtained by generalizing Gawrychowski and Nicholson's $(3n - Θ(\log n))$-bit lower bound (ICALP, 15) for answering range minimum and maximum queries on a permutation of size $n$.
abstract_zh: 给定全序中大小为 $n$ 的数组，我们考虑有效构建支持各种查询（范围最小/最大查询及其变体以及下一个/上一个较大/较小查询）的数据结构的问题。在编码模型中（即，无需输入数组即可回答查询），我们提出了一个 $(3.701n + o(n))$ 位数据结构，对于任何正常数整数 $\ell$（此处，$\log^{(1)} n = \log n$，对于 $\ell > 1$，$\log^{(\ell)} n = 在 $O(\log^{(\ell)}n)$ 时间内支持所有这些查询\log ({\log^{(\ell-1)}} n)$)。我们的数据结构的空间与 Tsur 当前的最佳上限匹配（Inf. Process. Lett., 2019），这不能有效地支持查询。此外，我们还表明至少需要 $3.16n-θ(\log n)$ 位来回答所有查询。我们的结果是通过概括 Gawrychowski 和 Nicholson 的 $(3n - θ(\log n))$ 位下限 (ICALP, 15) 来回答大小为 $n$ 的排列的范围最小和最大查询。

AI.tldr: 设计一种空间高效的静态数据结构，支持对数组进行多种范围查询和前后更大/更小值查询。
AI.motivation: 现有数据结构在空间效率与查询效率之间存在权衡，需在不存储原始数组的前提下实现高效查询。
AI.method: 通过推广Gawrychowski和Nicholson的下界证明，结合Tsur的最优空间上界，构建支持多类型查询的编码模型数据结构。
AI.result: 提出3.701n + o(n)位数据结构，支持O(log^{(ℓ)}n)时间查询，同时证明至少需要3.16n-Θ(log n)位空间。
AI.conclusion: 在空间效率与查询效率间取得平衡，改进了现有结果并确立了更紧的理论下界。
