title: Evaluating generative audio systems and their metrics
title_zh: 评估生成音频系统及其指标
abstract: Recent years have seen considerable advances in audio synthesis with deep generative models. However, the state-of-the-art is very difficult to quantify; different studies often use different evaluation methodologies and different metrics when reporting results, making a direct comparison to other systems difficult if not impossible. Furthermore, the perceptual relevance and meaning of the reported metrics in most cases unknown, prohibiting any conclusive insights with respect to practical usability and audio quality. This paper presents a study that investigates state-of-the-art approaches side-by-side with (i) a set of previously proposed objective metrics for audio reconstruction, and with (ii) a listening study. The results indicate that currently used objective metrics are insufficient to describe the perceptual quality of current systems.
summary: Recent years have seen considerable advances in audio synthesis with deep generative models. However, the state-of-the-art is very difficult to quantify; different studies often use different evaluation methodologies and different metrics when reporting results, making a direct comparison to other systems difficult if not impossible. Furthermore, the perceptual relevance and meaning of the reported metrics in most cases unknown, prohibiting any conclusive insights with respect to practical usability and audio quality. This paper presents a study that investigates state-of-the-art approaches side-by-side with (i) a set of previously proposed objective metrics for audio reconstruction, and with (ii) a listening study. The results indicate that currently used objective metrics are insufficient to describe the perceptual quality of current systems.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度生成模型的音频合成取得了长足的进步。然而，最先进的技术很难量化；不同的研究在报告结果时通常使用不同的评估方法和不同的指标，这使得与其他系统的直接比较变得困难甚至不可能。此外，在大多数情况下，所报告的指标的感知相关性和意义是未知的，这阻碍了对实际可用性和音频质量的任何结论性见解。本文提出了一项研究，该研究将最先进的方法与（i）一组先前提出的音频重建客观指标和（ii）听力研究并列进行研究。结果表明，当前使用的客观指标不足以描述当前系统的感知质量。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过对比客观指标与听觉实验，评估生成音频系统及其评价指标的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有生成音频系统的评估方法缺乏统一标准，不同研究使用的指标和方法差异大，导致难以直接比较系统性能，且指标的感知相关性不明。
AI.method: 将最先进的生成音频方法与现有客观重建指标进行对比，并结合听觉实验验证感知质量。
AI.result: 当前常用的客观指标无法准确反映生成音频的感知质量。
AI.conclusion: 需开发更符合人类感知的评估指标，以提升生成音频系统的实用性与质量评估的准确性。

The results indicate that currently used objective metrics are insufficient to describe the perceptual quality of current systems. 近年来，深度生成模型的音频合成取得了长足的进步。然而，最先进的技术很难量化；不同的研究在报告结果时通常使用不同的评估方法和不同的指标，这使得与其他系统的直接比较变得困难甚至不可能。此外，在大多数情况下，所报告的指标的感知相关性和意义是未知的，这阻碍了对实际可用性和音频质量的任何结论性见解。本文提出了一项研究，该研究将最先进的方法与（i）一组先前提出的音频重建客观指标和（ii）听力研究并列进行研究。结果表明，当前使用的客观指标不足以描述当前系统的感知质量。 本文旨在通过对比客观指标与听觉实验，评估生成音频系统及其评价指标的有效性。 Ashvala Vinay,Alexander Lerch cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Yi-Ting Shen,Yaesop Lee,Heesung Kwon,Damon M. Conover,Shuvra S. Bhattacharyya,Nikolas Vale,Joshua D. Gray,G. Jeremy Leong,Kenneth Evensen,Frank Skirlo
title: Archangel: A Hybrid UAV-based Human Detection Benchmark with Position and Pose Metadata
title_zh: Archangel：基于混合无人机的人体检测基准，具有位置和姿态元数据
abstract: Learning to detect objects, such as humans, in imagery captured by an unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) usually suffers from tremendous variations caused by the UAV's position towards the objects. In addition, existing UAV-based benchmark datasets do not provide adequate dataset metadata, which is essential for precise model diagnosis and learning features invariant to those variations. In this paper, we introduce Archangel, the first UAV-based object detection dataset composed of real and synthetic subsets captured with similar imagining conditions and UAV position and object pose metadata. A series of experiments are carefully designed with a state-of-the-art object detector to demonstrate the benefits of leveraging the metadata during model evaluation. Moreover, several crucial insights involving both real and synthetic data during model optimization are presented. In the end, we discuss the advantages, limitations, and future directions regarding Archangel to highlight its distinct value for the broader machine learning community.
summary: Learning to detect objects, such as humans, in imagery captured by an unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) usually suffers from tremendous variations caused by the UAV's position towards the objects. In addition, existing UAV-based benchmark datasets do not provide adequate dataset metadata, which is essential for precise model diagnosis and learning features invariant to those variations. In this paper, we introduce Archangel, the first UAV-based object detection dataset composed of real and synthetic subsets captured with similar imagining conditions and UAV position and object pose metadata. A series of experiments are carefully designed with a state-of-the-art object detector to demonstrate the benefits of leveraging the metadata during model evaluation. Moreover, several crucial insights involving both real and synthetic data during model optimization are presented. In the end, we discuss the advantages, limitations, and future directions regarding Archangel to highlight its distinct value for the broader machine learning community.
abstract_zh: 学习在无人机 (UAV) 捕获的图像中检测物体（例如人类）通常会受到无人机相对于物体的位置造成的巨大变化的影响。此外，现有的基于无人机的基准数据集没有提供足够的数据集元数据，而这对于精确的模型诊断和学习不受这些变化影响的特征至关重要。在本文中，我们介绍了Archangel，这是第一个基于无人机的物体检测数据集，由使用相似的成像条件捕获的真实和合成子集以及无人机位置和物体姿态元数据组成。使用最先进的对象检测器精心设计了一系列实验，以展示在模型评估期间利用元数据的好处。此外，还提出了模型优化过程中涉及真实数据和合成数据的几个重要见解。最后，我们讨论了 Archangel 的优势、局限性和未来方向，以强调其对更广泛的机器学习社区的独特价值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Archangel，首个包含真实与合成数据的无人机人体检测基准数据集，附带位置和姿态元数据以提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机检测数据集缺乏关键元数据，导致模型难以应对视角变化和特征学习，制约了性能诊断与优化。
AI.method: 构建包含真实与合成图像的混合数据集，确保成像条件一致并标注无人机位置及人体姿态信息；设计实验验证元数据对模型评估的辅助作用，并分析数据组合对优化的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明元数据可提升检测性能，揭示真实与合成数据在模型训练中的互补性，同时指出数据集在覆盖性和标注精度上的局限。
AI.conclusion: Archangel为无人机检测研究提供新基准，其元数据驱动的方法论具有普适价值，未来需拓展更多场景与标注维度。

authors_text: Santiago Rodrigo,Domenico Spanò,Medina Bandic,Sergi Abadal,Hans van Someren,Anabel Ovide,Sebastian Feld,Carmen G. Almudever,Eduard Alarcón
title: Characterizing Qubit Traffic of a Quantum Intranet aiming at Modular Quantum Computers
title_zh: 针对模块化量子计算机的量子内联网的量子比特流量特征
comment: 7 pages, to be presented at the ACM NanoCom 2022
comments: 7 pages, to be presented at the ACM NanoCom 2022
abstract: Quantum many-core processors are envisioned as the ultimate solution for the scalability of quantum computers. Based upon Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) chips interconnected in a sort of quantum intranet, they enable large algorithms to be executed on current and close future technology. In order to optimize such architectures, it is crucial to develop tools that allow specific design space explorations. To this aim, in this paper we present a technique to perform a spatio-temporal characterization of quantum circuits running in multi-chip quantum computers. Specifically, we focus on the analysis of the qubit traffic resulting from operations that involve qubits residing in different cores, and hence quantum communication across chips, while also giving importance to the amount of intra-core operations that occur in between those communications. Using specific multi-core performance metrics and a complete set of benchmarks, our analysis showcases the opportunities that the proposed approach may provide to guide the design of multi-core quantum computers and their interconnects.
summary: Quantum many-core processors are envisioned as the ultimate solution for the scalability of quantum computers. Based upon Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) chips interconnected in a sort of quantum intranet, they enable large algorithms to be executed on current and close future technology. In order to optimize such architectures, it is crucial to develop tools that allow specific design space explorations. To this aim, in this paper we present a technique to perform a spatio-temporal characterization of quantum circuits running in multi-chip quantum computers. Specifically, we focus on the analysis of the qubit traffic resulting from operations that involve qubits residing in different cores, and hence quantum communication across chips, while also giving importance to the amount of intra-core operations that occur in between those communications. Using specific multi-core performance metrics and a complete set of benchmarks, our analysis showcases the opportunities that the proposed approach may provide to guide the design of multi-core quantum computers and their interconnects.
abstract_zh: 量子众核处理器被认为是量子计算机可扩展性的最终解决方案。它们基于在某种量子内联网中互连的噪声中尺度量子（NISQ）芯片，使大型算法能够在当前和不久的将来的技术上执行。为了优化此类架构，开发允许特定设计空间探索的工具至关重要。为此，在本文中，我们提出了一种对多芯片量子计算机中运行的量子电路进行时空表征的技术。具体来说，我们重点分析涉及驻留在不同核心中的量子位的操作所产生的量子位流量，以及跨芯片的量子通信，同时也重视这些通信之间发生的核心内操作的数量。使用特定的多核性能指标和一整套基准，我们的分析展示了所提出的方法可能为指导多核量子计算机及其互连的设计提供的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于分析多芯片量子计算机中量子比特流量的时空特征化技术，以优化模块化量子计算机的架构设计。
AI.motivation: 量子多核处理器被视为实现量子计算机可扩展性的关键，但需要工具来探索多芯片量子系统的设计空间，特别是跨芯片量子通信与核心内操作的平衡。
AI.method: 通过定义多核性能指标和基准测试集，对跨核心操作产生的量子比特流量进行时空分析，量化芯片间通信与核心内计算的交互关系。
AI.result: 分析结果展示了该方法在指导多核量子计算机及其互连架构设计中的潜力，揭示了不同算法对量子通信需求的差异性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为模块化量子系统的优化提供了理论依据，强调了量子比特流量分析在提升多芯片量子计算机性能中的重要性。

title: Addressing Class Imbalance in Semi-supervised Image Segmentation: A Study on Cardiac MRI
title_zh: 解决半监督图像分割中的类别不平衡：心脏 MRI 的研究
abstract: Due to the imbalanced and limited data, semi-supervised medical image segmentation methods often fail to produce superior performance for some specific tailed classes. Inadequate training for those particular classes could introduce more noise to the generated pseudo labels, affecting overall learning. To alleviate this shortcoming and identify the under-performing classes, we propose maintaining a confidence array that records class-wise performance during training. A fuzzy fusion of these confidence scores is proposed to adaptively prioritize individual confidence metrics in every sample rather than traditional ensemble approaches, where a set of predefined fixed weights are assigned for all the test cases. Further, we introduce a robust class-wise sampling method and dynamic stabilization for a better training strategy. Our proposed method considers all the under-performing classes with dynamic weighting and tries to remove most of the noises during training. Upon evaluation on two cardiac MRI datasets, ACDC and MMWHS, our proposed method shows effectiveness and generalizability and outperforms several state-of-the-art methods found in the literature.
summary: Due to the imbalanced and limited data, semi-supervised medical image segmentation methods often fail to produce superior performance for some specific tailed classes. Inadequate training for those particular classes could introduce more noise to the generated pseudo labels, affecting overall learning. To alleviate this shortcoming and identify the under-performing classes, we propose maintaining a confidence array that records class-wise performance during training. A fuzzy fusion of these confidence scores is proposed to adaptively prioritize individual confidence metrics in every sample rather than traditional ensemble approaches, where a set of predefined fixed weights are assigned for all the test cases. Further, we introduce a robust class-wise sampling method and dynamic stabilization for a better training strategy. Our proposed method considers all the under-performing classes with dynamic weighting and tries to remove most of the noises during training. Upon evaluation on two cardiac MRI datasets, ACDC and MMWHS, our proposed method shows effectiveness and generalizability and outperforms several state-of-the-art methods found in the literature.
abstract_zh: 由于数据不平衡且有限，半监督医学图像分割方法通常无法对某些特定的尾类产生优异的性能。对这些特定类别的训练不足可能会给生成的伪标签带来更多噪音，从而影响整体学习。为了缓解这一缺点并识别表现不佳的类别，我们建议维护一个置信数组，记录训练期间各类别的表现。提出了这些置信度分数的模糊融合，以自适应地优先考虑每个样本中的各个置信度指标，而不是传统的集成方法，在传统的集成方法中，为所有测试用例分配一组预定义的固定权重。此外，我们引入了稳健的按类别采样方法和动态稳定性，以实现更好的训练策略。我们提出的方法通过动态加权考虑所有表现不佳的类别，并尝试在训练期间消除大部分噪声。经过对两个心脏 MRI 数据集 ACDC 和 MMWHS 的评估，我们提出的方法显示了有效性和通用性，并且优于文献中发现的几种最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 解决半监督图像分割中的类别不平衡问题，提升心脏MRI分割效果
AI.motivation: 现有半监督方法在类别不平衡时伪标签噪声多，影响分割效果，需改进
AI.method: 提出置信度数组与模糊融合动态调整权重，结合类别采样和动态稳定策略减少噪声

search_text: Addressing Class Imbalance in Semi-supervised Image Segmentation: A Study on Cardiac MRI 解决半监督图像分割中的类别不平衡：心脏 MRI 的研究 Due to the imbalanced and limited data, semi-supervised medical image segmentation methods often fail to produce superior performance for some specific tailed classes. Inadequate training for those particular classes could introduce more noise to the generated pseudo labels, affecting overall learning. To alleviate this shortcoming and identify the under-performing classes, we propose maintaining a confidence array that records class-wise performance during training. A fuzzy fusion of these confidence scores is proposed to adaptively prioritize individual confidence metrics in every sample rather than traditional ensemble approaches, where a set of predefined fixed weights are assigned for all the test cases. Further, we introduce a robust class-wise sampling method and dynamic stabilization for a better training strategy. Our proposed method considers all the under-performing classes with dynamic weighting and tries to remove most of the noises during training. Upon evaluation on two cardiac MRI datasets, ACDC and MMWHS, our proposed method shows effectiveness and generalizability and outperforms several state-of-the-art methods found in the literature. 由于数据不平衡且有限，半监督医学图像分割方法通常无法对某些特定的尾类产生优异的性能。对这些特定类别的训练不足可能会给生成的伪标签带来更多噪音，从而影响整体学习。为了缓解这一缺点并识别表现不佳的类别，我们建议维护一个置信数组，记录训练期间各类别的表现。提出了这些置信度分数的模糊融合，以自适应地优先考虑每个样本中的各个置信度指标，而不是传统的集成方法，在传统的集成方法中，为所有测试用例分配一组预定义的固定权重。此外，我们引入了稳健的按类别采样方法和动态稳定性，以实现更好的训练策略。我们提出的方法通过动态加权考虑所有表现不佳的类别，并尝试在训练期间消除大部分噪声。经过对两个心脏 MRI 数据集 ACDC 和 MMWHS 的评估，我们提出的方法显示了有效性和通用性，并且优于文献中发现的几种最先进的方法。 解决半监督图像分割中的类别不平衡问题，提升心脏MRI分割效果 Hritam Basak,Sagnik Ghosal,Ram Sarkar cs.CV
